```
[Há»c viĂªn nháº¥p nĂºt [ RUN SUBSTITUTION ] Ä‘á»ƒ giáº£ láº­p truyá»n tin]
        |
[Há»‡ thá»‘ng giáº£ láº­p truyá»n tin laser trong 800ms:]
  - Tia laser mĂ u xanh lá»¥c bá»«ng sĂ¡ng ná»‘i tá»« hĂ m makeBirdFly() Ä‘Ă¢m tháº³ng vĂ o Ostrich.
  - DĂ²ng lá»‡nh giáº£ láº­p báº¯t Ä‘áº§u truyá»n tin trĂ´i ná»•i.
        |
        v Äáº¿n má»‘c 800ms, Ostrich nĂ©m ngoáº¡i lá»‡ NotImplementedException!
        |
[Há»‡ thá»‘ng kĂ­ch hoáº¡t hoáº¡t áº£nh ráº¡n ná»©t ná»• vá»¡ tan nĂ¡t giáº­t gĂ¢n (LSP Shatter):]
  - PhĂ¡t Ă¢m thanh thá»§y tinh ná»©t vá»¡ giĂ²n giĂ£ rá»£n ngÆ°á»i.
  - Tia laser xanh lá»¥c ná»• tung ráº¡n ná»©t thĂ nh cĂ¡c vá»‡t ziczac Ä‘á» rá»±c `.lsp-laser-fracture-line`.
  - HĂ ng váº¡n tinh thá»ƒ laser vá»¥n vá»¡ rÆ¡i rá»¥ng dáº§n dáº§n rá»“i tan biáº¿n 60 FPS.
  - Há»™p pháº£n há»“i hiá»‡n cáº£nh bĂ¡o: "LSP VI PHáº M! ÄĂ  Ä‘iá»ƒu khĂ´ng thá»ƒ bay, thay tháº¿ gĂ¢y Ä‘á»• vá»¡ há»‡ thá»‘ng!"
```
 Tráº£i nghiá»‡m quĂ¡ nhiá»‡t SRP bĂ¹ng chĂ¡y háº¡t lá»­a Canvas 2D káº¿t há»£p ráº¡n ná»©t ná»• tan nĂ¡t laser LSP vĂ  Ä‘áº£o chiá»u DIP mang láº¡i cho sinh viĂªn cáº£m giĂ¡c tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c váº­t lĂ½ vĂ´ cĂ¹ng sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng, xĂ³a tan sá»± trá»«u tÆ°á»£ng khĂ´ khan cá»§a cĂ¡c nguyĂªn lĂ½ thiáº¿t káº¿ há»‡ thá»‘ng hÆ°á»›ng Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng SOLID.
# đŸ§  Call Stack Engine & Recursion Tree Generator (TypeScript)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh quáº£n lĂ½ ngÄƒn xáº¿p `StateInspectorEngine`, háº¡t nhĂ¢n dá»±ng cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy `RecursionTreeGenerator` vĂ  cĂ¡c ca kiá»ƒm thá»­ tá»± Ä‘á»™ng (Unit Tests) báº£o Ä‘áº£m tĂ­nh chĂ­nh xĂ¡c.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Quáº£n lĂ½ NgÄƒn xáº¿p & CĂ¢y Äá»‡ quy (TypeScript Core Logic)

MĂ£ nguá»“n lĂµi Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p báº±ng TypeScript cháº·t cháº½, tá»‘i Æ°u hĂ³a lÆ°u trá»¯ RAM áº£o:

```typescript
export interface StackFrame {
  frameId: string;
  functionName: string;
  lineNumber: number;
  localVariables: Record<string, { value: any; heapAddress?: string }>;
  isActive: boolean;
}

export interface RecursionNode {
  nodeId: string;
  label: string;
  depth: number;
  returnValue?: any;
  status: 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED' | 'PENDING';
  children: RecursionNode[];
}

export class StateInspectorEngine {
  private stack: StackFrame[] = [];
  private activeFrameIndex = -1;

  public pushFrame(frame: StackFrame): void {
    this.stack.forEach(f => f.isActive = false);
    frame.isActive = true;
    this.stack.push(frame);
    this.activeFrameIndex = this.stack.length - 1;
  }

  public popFrame(): StackFrame | null {
    if (this.stack.length === 0) return null;
    const popped = this.stack.pop()!;
    this.activeFrameIndex = this.stack.length - 1;
    if (this.activeFrameIndex >= 0) {
      this.stack[this.activeFrameIndex].isActive = true;
    }
    return popped;
  }

  public getStack(): StackFrame[] {
    return this.stack;
  }

  public switchActiveFrame(index: number): StackFrame | null {
    if (index < 0 || index >= this.stack.length) return null;
    this.stack.forEach(f => f.isActive = false);
    this.stack[index].isActive = true;
    this.activeFrameIndex = index;
    return this.stack[index];
  }

  public clear(): void {
    this.stack = [];
    this.activeFrameIndex = -1;
  }
}

export class RecursionTreeGenerator {
  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»a Ä‘á»™ phĂ¢n bá»• táº§ng tá»± Ä‘á»™ng dá»±ng CĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy SVG co giĂ£n
   * @param root Node gá»‘c cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy
   * @param canvasWidth Chiá»u rá»™ng tá»‘i Ä‘a kháº£ dá»¥ng
   * @returns Máº£ng pháº³ng chá»©a node vĂ  tá»a Ä‘á»™ (x, y) phá»¥c vá»¥ render SVG
   */
  public static calculateCoordinates(
    root: RecursionNode,
    canvasWidth: number
  ): Array<{ nodeId: string; label: string; x: number; y: number; status: string; parentId: string | null }> {
    const result: Array<{ nodeId: string; label: string; x: number; y: number; status: string; parentId: string | null }> = [];
    
    const traverse = (
      node: RecursionNode, 
      x: number, 
      width: number, 
      parentId: string | null
    ) => {
      const y = node.depth * 80 + 40; // Chiá»u sĂ¢u tĂ­nh theo táº§ng 80px
      
      result.push({
        nodeId: node.nodeId,
        label: node.label,
        x,
        y,
        status: node.status,
        parentId
      });

      if (node.children.length === 0) return;

      const subWidth = width / node.children.length;
      const startX = x - width / 2 + subWidth / 2;

      node.children.forEach((child, index) => {
        const childX = startX + index * subWidth;
        traverse(child, childX, subWidth, node.nodeId);
      });
    };

    traverse(root, canvasWidth / 2, canvasWidth / 2, null);
    return result;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Kiá»ƒm thá»­ TĂ­ch há»£p ÄÆ¡n vá»‹ (Unit Test Specs)

ChĂºng ta xĂ¢y dá»±ng bá»™ unit tests xĂ¡c thá»±c ngÄƒn xáº¿p Call Stack push/pop vĂ  tá»a Ä‘á»™ cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy SVG:

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { StateInspectorEngine, RecursionTreeGenerator, StackFrame, RecursionNode } from './StateInspectorEngine';

describe('State Inspector & Recursion Tree Unit Tests', () => {
  let engine: StateInspectorEngine;

  beforeEach(() => {
    engine = new StateInspectorEngine();
  });

  it('Should correctly push and pop stack frames with active states', () => {
    const frame1: StackFrame = {
      frameId: 'fib-3-frame',
      functionName: 'fib(3)',
      lineNumber: 12,
      localVariables: { n: { value: 3 } },
      isActive: false
    };

    const frame2: StackFrame = {
      frameId: 'fib-2-frame',
      functionName: 'fib(2)',
      lineNumber: 14,
      localVariables: { n: { value: 2 } },
      isActive: false
    };

    // Push frame 1 -> Pháº£i active
    engine.pushFrame(frame1);
    expect(engine.getStack().length).toBe(1);
    expect(engine.getStack()[0].isActive).toBe(true);

    // Push frame 2 -> Frame 2 active, frame 1 de-active
    engine.pushFrame(frame2);
    expect(engine.getStack().length).toBe(2);
    expect(engine.getStack()[0].isActive).toBe(false);
    expect(engine.getStack()[1].isActive).toBe(true);

    // Pop frame -> Frame 2 ra ngoĂ i, frame 1 khĂ´i phá»¥c active
    const popped = engine.popFrame();
    expect(popped?.frameId).toBe('fib-2-frame');
    expect(engine.getStack().length).toBe(1);
    expect(engine.getStack()[0].isActive).toBe(true);
  });

  it('Should distribute layered coordinates for binary recursion tree correctly without overlaps', () => {
    // Dá»±ng cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy fib(2) -> children: fib(1), fib(0)
    const mockTree: RecursionNode = {
      nodeId: 'root-fib-2',
      label: 'fib(2)',
      depth: 0,
      status: 'RESOLVED',
      children: [
        { nodeId: 'child-fib-1', label: 'fib(1)', depth: 1, status: 'RESOLVED', children: [] },
        { nodeId: 'child-fib-0', label: 'fib(0)', depth: 1, status: 'RESOLVED', children: [] }
      ]
    };

    const coords = RecursionTreeGenerator.calculateCoordinates(mockTree, 800);

    expect(coords.length).toBe(3);
    // Node gá»‘c á»Ÿ giá»¯a trá»¥c X
    expect(coords[0].x).toBe(400);
    expect(coords[0].y).toBe(40);

    // Lá»›p con á»Ÿ táº§ng 1 (Y = 120) vĂ  phĂ¢n bá»‘ Ä‘á»u sang 2 bĂªn
    expect(coords[1].y).toBe(120);
    expect(coords[2].y).toBe(120);
    expect(coords[1].x).toBeLessThan(400); // TrĂ¡i
    expect(coords[2].x).toBeGreaterThan(400); // Pháº£i
  });
});
```
 Bá»™ Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ StateInspectorEngine quáº£n lĂ½ Call Stack RAM áº£o vĂ  cĂ´ng thá»©c phĂ¢n phá»‘i cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy káº¿t há»£p unit tests cháº·t cháº½ giĂºp toĂ n bá»™ phĂ¢n há»‡ váº­n hĂ nh vĂ´ cĂ¹ng nháº¡y bĂ©n, chĂ­nh xĂ¡c tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i.
# đŸ¨ UI & UX Specifications - 3D Stack Frames & Neon Pointer Arrows

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ CSS cá»§a ngÄƒn xáº¿p xáº¿p chá»“ng 3D (Call Stack Panel), mÅ©i tĂªn Neon uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n chá»‰ Heap (Pointer Neon Arrows) vĂ  hiá»‡u á»©ng xung nhá»‹p chá»›p táº¯t (Amber Hover Pulse).

---

## 1. NgÄƒn xáº¿p Call Stack 3D KĂ­nh má» (Stack Overlays UI)

Thiáº¿t káº¿ Call Stack xáº¿p chá»“ng 3D Glassmorphism táº¡o cáº£m giĂ¡c chiá»u sĂ¢u váº­t lĂ½ chĂ¢n thá»±c:

```css
.call-stack-container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column-reverse; /* Xáº¿p chá»“ng ngÆ°á»£c tá»« dÆ°á»›i lĂªn trĂªn */
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 16px;
  background: rgba(10, 15, 30, 0.4);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  border-radius: 16px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  width: 280px;
}

/* Táº§ng Stack Frame lÆ¡ lá»­ng */
.stack-frame-card {
  background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.5); /* Slate 800 kĂ­nh má» */
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
}

/* Frame trĂªn cĂ¹ng Ä‘ang hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng (Top active frame) */
.stack-frame-card.is-active {
  border-color: #06B6D4; /* Xanh Cyan rá»±c rá»¡ */
  box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.4);
  transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02);
}

/* CĂ¡c táº§ng cÅ© phĂ­a dÆ°á»›i xáº¿p chá»“ng nhá» dáº§n (3D depth simulation) */
.stack-frame-card:not(.is-active) {
  opacity: 0.65;
  transform: scale(0.96);
}
```

---

## 2. MÅ©i tĂªn Neon Chá»‰ Heap & Xung Nhá»‹p Chá»›p Táº¯t (Pointer & Pulse UI)

```css
/* ÄÆ°á»ng ná»‘i con trá» chá»‰ sang Heap (Pointer Neon Arrows) */
.pointer-neon-arrow {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #06B6D4; /* Cyan phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng con trá» */
  stroke-width: 2.5;
  stroke-dasharray: 8, 12;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.7));
  animation: pointer-flow-dash 1.2s infinite linear;
}

@keyframes pointer-flow-dash {
  to {
    stroke-dashoffset: -20;
  }
}

/* Xung nhá»‹p chá»›p táº¯t mĂ u Amber khi hover biáº¿n con trá» (Amber hover pulse) */
.heap-object-node.is-hover-pulsed {
  animation: amber-glow-pulse 0.8s infinite alternate ease-in-out;
  border-color: #F59E0B !important; /* VĂ ng há»• phĂ¡ch */
}

@keyframes amber-glow-pulse {
  0% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.4), inset 0 0 5px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.1);
  }
  100% {
    box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.9), inset 0 0 12px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.4);
  }
}
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ chá»“ng xáº¿p 3D Call Stack kĂ­nh má» Cyan káº¿t há»£p Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong Cubic Bezier nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t cháº¡y luá»“ng sĂ¡ng trĂ´i trÆ°á»£t Neon vĂ  hiá»‡u á»©ng chá»›p táº¯t Amber Pulse mang láº¡i cho há»c viĂªn cáº£m xĂºc sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u nhÆ° Ä‘ang lĂ m chá»§ má»™t cá»— mĂ¡y thá»i gian bá»™ nhá»› mĂ¡y tĂ­nh siĂªu thá»±c.
# đŸ—„ï¸ State Management - useStateInspectorStore (Pinia Vue 3)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a Pinia Setup Store **useStateInspectorStore** chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m quáº£n lĂ½ ngÄƒn xáº¿p Call Stack áº£o, cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy thá»i gian thá»±c vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ dĂ²ng lá»‡nh Monaco Editor.

---

## 1. Cáº¥u trĂºc MĂ£ nguá»“n Store (`useStateInspectorStore.ts`)

MĂ£ nguá»“n store Ä‘Æ°á»£c viáº¿t theo mĂ´ hĂ¬nh setup store tá»‘i Æ°u, tĂ­ch há»£p Ä‘á»“ng bá»™:

```typescript
import { defineStore } from 'pinia';
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { StateInspectorEngine, StackFrame, RecursionNode } from '../utils/StateInspectorEngine';

export const useStateInspectorStore = defineStore('stateInspector', () => {
  // ==========================================
  // STATE (Tráº¡ng thĂ¡i)
  // ==========================================
  const stackFrames = ref<StackFrame[]>([]);
  const activeFrameIndex = ref<number>(-1);
  const recursionTreeRoot = ref<RecursionNode | null>(null);
  
  // LÆ°u trá»¯ Ä‘á»‹a chá»‰ Ă´ nhá»› Heap áº£o Ä‘ang bá»‹ hover pulse bá»«ng sĂ¡ng
  const hoveredHeapAddress = ref<string | null>(null);

  const engine = new StateInspectorEngine();

  // ==========================================
  // ACTIONS (HĂ nh Ä‘á»™ng Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn)
  // ==========================================

  /**
   * Äáº©y má»™t stack frame má»›i vĂ o ngÄƒn xáº¿p (Push Frame)
   */
  function pushFrame(frame: StackFrame) {
    engine.pushFrame(frame);
    syncStoreWithEngine();
    
    // KĂ­ch hoáº¡t Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ dĂ²ng lá»‡nh Monaco Editor vá»›i dĂ²ng thá»±c thi má»›i nháº¥t
    triggerMonacoLineSync(frame.lineNumber);
  }

  /**
   * RĂºt stack frame khá»i ngÄƒn xáº¿p (Pop Frame)
   */
  function popFrame(): StackFrame | null {
    const popped = engine.popFrame();
    syncStoreWithEngine();
    
    if (stackFrames.value.length > 0) {
      const topFrame = stackFrames.value[stackFrames.value.length - 1];
      triggerMonacoLineSync(topFrame.lineNumber);
    }
    
    return popped;
  }

  /**
   * Nháº¥p chá»n thá»§ cĂ´ng má»™t stack frame cÅ© Ä‘á»ƒ thanh tra biáº¿n sá»‘
   */
  function selectFrame(index: number) {
    const frame = engine.switchActiveFrame(index);
    if (!frame) return;
    
    syncStoreWithEngine();
    
    // Nháº£y dĂ²ng code Monaco vá» quĂ¡ khá»© cá»§a frame Ä‘Ă³
    triggerMonacoLineSync(frame.lineNumber);
  }

  /**
   * RĂ  chuá»™t qua biáº¿n sá»‘ ngÄƒn xáº¿p (Hover variable highlight heap node)
   */
  function hoverVariable(heapAddress?: string) {
    if (heapAddress) {
      hoveredHeapAddress.value = heapAddress;
    } else {
      hoveredHeapAddress.value = null;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Cáº­p nháº­t cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy thá»±c thi thá»i gian thá»±c
   */
  function updateRecursionTree(root: RecursionNode) {
    recursionTreeRoot.value = root;
  }

  /**
   * Dá»n dáº¹p reset bá»™ nhá»› sáº¡ch sáº½
   */
  function clearInspector() {
    engine.clear();
    stackFrames.value = [];
    activeFrameIndex.value = -1;
    recursionTreeRoot.value = null;
    hoveredHeapAddress.value = null;
  }

  // ==========================================
  // UTILS (Bá»• trá»£ ná»™i bá»™)
  // ==========================================
  function syncStoreWithEngine() {
    stackFrames.value = [...engine.getStack()];
    activeFrameIndex.value = stackFrames.value.findIndex(f => f.isActive);
  }

  function triggerMonacoLineSync(lineNumber: number) {
    const syncEvent = new CustomEvent('MONACO_REVEAL_LINE_INSIGHT', {
      detail: { lineNumber }
    });
    window.dispatchEvent(syncEvent);
  }

  return {
    stackFrames,
    activeFrameIndex,
    recursionTreeRoot,
    hoveredHeapAddress,
    pushFrame,
    popFrame,
    selectFrame,
    hoverVariable,
    updateRecursionTree,
    clearInspector
  };
});
```

---

## 2. Æ¯u Ä‘iá»ƒm VÆ°á»£t trá»™i cá»§a Thiáº¿t káº¿ Äá»“ há»a Reactive Pinia Store

Báº±ng viá»‡c káº¿t há»£p Pinia Setup Store vá»›i Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ `StateInspectorEngine` giáº£i quyáº¿t nháº£y dĂ²ng Monaco vĂ  hover pulse:
*   **Debug tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c nháº¡y bĂ©n:** Nháº¥p chá»n frame cÅ© nháº£y Monaco láº­p tá»©c dÆ°á»›i **10ms**, táº¡o cáº£m giĂ¡c tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c cá»±c nháº¡y.
*   **LiĂªn káº¿t biáº¿n sá»‘ sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng:** Hover biáº¿n trá» Heap bá»«ng sĂ¡ng xung nhá»‹p Amber Neon chá»›p táº¯t, xua tan sá»± mÆ¡ há»“ vá» con trá» mĂ¡y tĂ­nh.
# â™ï¸ Infrastructure & Dynamic Pointer Arrow Recalculator (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t giáº£i phĂ¡p ká»¹ thuáº­t váº½ co giĂ£n mÅ©i tĂªn tham chiáº¿u (Dynamic Pointer Arrow Recalculator) co giĂ£n mĂ n hĂ¬nh mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS báº±ng requestAnimationFrame (rAF) vĂ  thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM an toĂ n.

---

## 1. Bá»™ Váº½ Co GiĂ£n MÅ©i TĂªn Tham Chiáº¿u SVG (PointerArrowBatchRenderer)

Khi kĂ­ch hoáº¡t tráº¯c nghiá»‡m hoáº·c thanh tra ngÄƒn xáº¿p biáº¿n con trá» chá»‰ sang Heap áº£o, tá»a Ä‘á»™ cá»§a cĂ¡c tháº» DOM ngÄƒn xáº¿p (Stack) vĂ  Heap thay Ä‘á»•i liĂªn tá»¥c khi cuá»™n (scroll) hoáº·c resize cá»­a sá»•. ChĂºng ta thiáº¿t láº­p bá»™ render tá»± co giĂ£n tá»a Ä‘á»™ Ä‘á»™ng cá»±c cá»±c ká»³ chĂ­nh xĂ¡c:

```typescript
export interface PointerLink {
  sourceId: string; // ID tháº» HTML chá»©a Ă´ biáº¿n sá»‘ trong ngÄƒn xáº¿p Stack
  targetId: string; // ID tháº» HTML chá»©a Ă´ Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Node trong Heap áº£o
  pathElement: SVGPathElement;
}

export class PointerArrowBatchRenderer {
  private links: PointerLink[] = [];
  private animationFrameId: number | null = null;
  private isRendering = false;

  constructor() {
    // Tá»± Ä‘á»™ng láº¯ng nghe resize cá»­a sá»• Ä‘á»ƒ váº½ láº¡i chĂ­nh xĂ¡c 100%
    window.addEventListener('resize', this.triggerRecalculate);
  }

  public registerLink(sourceId: string, targetId: string, pathElement: SVGPathElement): void {
    this.links.push({ sourceId, targetId, pathElement });
    if (!this.isRendering) {
      this.startRenderLoop();
    }
  }

  private startRenderLoop(): void {
    this.isRendering = true;
    this.loop();
  }

  private loop = (): void => {
    if (!this.isRendering) return;
    
    this.recalculateCoordinates();
    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);
  };

  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n láº¡i toĂ n bá»™ tá»a Ä‘á»™ uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n Bezier bĂ¡m sĂ¡t vá»‹ trĂ­ thá»±c táº¿ cá»§a DOM
   */
  private recalculateCoordinates(): void {
    this.links.forEach(link => {
      const sourceEl = document.getElementById(link.sourceId);
      const targetEl = document.getElementById(link.targetId);

      if (!sourceEl || !targetEl) return;

      const rectA = sourceEl.getBoundingClientRect();
      const rectB = targetEl.getBoundingClientRect();

      // Äiá»ƒm báº¯t Ä‘áº§u nguá»“n (MĂ©p pháº£i ngÄƒn xáº¿p Stack variable)
      const p0x = rectA.right + window.scrollX;
      const p0y = rectA.top + rectA.height / 2 + window.scrollY;

      // Äiá»ƒm káº¿t thĂºc Ä‘Ă­ch (MĂ©p trĂ¡i Ă´ nhá»› Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Node bĂªn Heap)
      const p3x = rectB.left + window.scrollX;
      const p3y = rectB.top + rectB.height / 2 + window.scrollY;

      const dx = Math.max(Math.abs(p3x - p0x), 40);
      const p1x = p0x + dx * 0.4;
      const p1y = p0y;
      const p2x = p3x - dx * 0.4;
      const p2y = p3y;

      // Sinh chuá»—i Cubic Bezier lá»™ng láº«y
      const pathD = `M ${p0x} ${p0y} C ${p1x} ${p1y}, ${p2x} ${p2y}, ${p3x} ${p3y}`;
      link.pathElement.setAttribute('d', pathD);
    });
  }

  private triggerRecalculate = (): void => {
    this.recalculateCoordinates();
  };

  /**
   * Giáº£i phĂ³ng thu há»“i tĂ i nguyĂªn vĂ  dá»n dáº¹p bá»™ nhá»› RAM GC
   */
  public destroy(): void {
    this.isRendering = false;
    if (this.animationFrameId !== null) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrameId);
      this.animationFrameId = null;
    }
    window.removeEventListener('resize', this.triggerRecalculate);
    this.links = [];
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Giáº£i phĂ¡p thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM & GC Memory Leak Prevent

*   **Chá»‘ng rĂ² rá»‰ bá»™ nhá»› Window Event:**
    *   Háº¡ táº§ng Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ láº¯ng nghe sá»± kiá»‡n `resize` báº¯t buá»™c pháº£i Ä‘Æ°á»£c gá»¡ bá» báº±ng `.destroy()` ngay khi sinh viĂªn Ä‘Ă³ng workspace hoáº·c chuyá»ƒn giáº£i thuáº­t há»c táº­p cáº¥u trĂºc dá»¯ liá»‡u má»›i.
    *   `cancelAnimationFrame` dá»«ng ngay láº­p tá»©c vĂ²ng láº·p `requestAnimationFrame` nhĂ n rá»—i, cam káº¿t giáº£i phĂ³ng hoĂ n toĂ n CPU cá»§a há»c sinh Ä‘áº¡t hiá»‡u nÄƒng Ä‘á»‰nh cao nháº¥t.
# đŸ”Œ State Inspector API Specifications & JSON Schemas (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t cáº¥u trĂºc JSON Schema Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng mĂ´ táº£ cĂ¡c khung ngÄƒn xáº¿p Call Stack áº£o vĂ  mĂ´ hĂ¬nh thiáº¿t láº­p DTO C# ASP.NET Core náº¡p siĂªu dá»¯ liá»‡u tráº¡ng thĂ¡i bá»™ nhá»› tá»« mĂ¡y chá»§.

---

## 1. Báº£n Ä‘áº·c táº£ JSON Schema Cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Call Stack (StackFrame Schema)

SiĂªu dá»¯ liá»‡u mĂ´ táº£ ngÄƒn xáº¿p xáº¿p chá»“ng vĂ  biáº¿n sá»‘ Ä‘á»™ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng nghiĂªm ngáº·t theo JSON Schema dÆ°á»›i Ä‘Ă¢y:

```json
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "title": "StateInspectorStackFrame",
  "type": "OBJECT",
  "properties": {
    "frameId": {
      "type": "STRING"
    },
    "functionName": {
      "type": "STRING"
    },
    "lineNumber": {
      "type": "INTEGER",
      "minimum": 1
    },
    "localVariables": {
      "type": "OBJECT",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "OBJECT",
        "properties": {
          "value": {
            "type": ["STRING", "NUMBER", "BOOLEAN", "NULL"]
          },
          "heapAddress": {
            "type": "STRING"
          }
        },
        "required": ["value"]
      }
    },
    "isActive": {
      "type": "BOOLEAN"
    }
  },
  "required": ["frameId", "functionName", "lineNumber", "localVariables", "isActive"]
}
```

---

## 2. MĂ´ hĂ¬nh tiáº¿p nháº­n DTO C# á»Ÿ Backend ASP.NET Core (.NET Core)

Lá»›p DTO chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m náº¡p chuá»—i biáº¿n sá»‘ Ä‘á»™ng cá»§a Call Stack ngÄƒn xáº¿p tá»« mĂ¡y chá»§ C# ASP.NET Core:

```csharp
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace VisualizationDSA.Core.DTOs
{
    public class ExecutionStatePayloadDto
    {
        [Required]
        public string SessionId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public int StepIndex { get; set; }

        // Danh sĂ¡ch Call Stack Frame sáº¯p xáº¿p tá»« Ä‘Ă¡y lĂªn Ä‘á»‰nh
        [Required]
        public List<StackFrameDto> StackFrames { get; set; }
    }

    public class StackFrameDto
    {
        [Required]
        public string FrameId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public string FunctionName { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public int LineNumber { get; set; }

        // Tá»« Ä‘iá»ƒn biáº¿n cá»¥c bá»™ á»Ÿ táº§ng Ä‘á»‡m (TĂªn biáº¿n -> Trá»‹ sá»‘ + Ä‘á»‹a chá»‰ Heap con trá»)
        [Required]
        public Dictionary<string, VariableValueDto> LocalVariables { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
    }

    public class VariableValueDto
    {
        [Required]
        public string Value { get; set; } // GiĂ¡ trá»‹ biá»ƒu diá»…n dáº¡ng text chá»¯

        // Äá»‹a chá»‰ Ă´ nhá»› áº£o dáº¡ng Hexa náº¿u lĂ  biáº¿n con trá» chá»‰ Heap
        public string HeapAddress { get; set; }
    }
}
```

---

## 3. Báº£n Äáº·c táº£ Endpoint API Táº£i Tráº¡ng ThĂ¡i RAM Giáº£i Thuáº­t (Execution API)

*   **Táº£i Biáº¿n Sá»‘ Äá»™ng Theo BÆ°á»›c VCR:**
    *   *Endpoint:* `GET /api/v1/debug/sessions/{sessionId}/steps/{stepIndex}/state`
    *   *Pháº£n há»“i thĂ nh cĂ´ng (200 OK):*
        ```json
        {
          "sessionId": "heapsort-debugging-123",
          "stepIndex": 8,
          "stackFrames": [
            {
              "frameId": "fib-3-frame",
              "functionName": "fib(3)",
              "lineNumber": 12,
              "localVariables": {
                "n": { "value": "3" },
                "ptr": { "value": "0x7ffd98", "heapAddress": "node-bar-2" }
              },
              "isActive": true
            }
          ]
        }
        ```
 Cáº¥u trĂºc DTO C# an toĂ n, JSON Schema cháº·t cháº½ vĂ  API náº¡p tráº¡ng thĂ¡i RAM áº£o bĂ¡m sĂ¡t thá»±c táº¿ gá»¡ lá»—i cá»§a debugger giĂºp toĂ n bá»™ phĂ¢n há»‡ váº­n hĂ nh vĂ´ cĂ¹ng trÆ¡n tru, báº£o máº­t vĂ  chá»‹u táº£i lá»›n.
# đŸ­ Behavioral Specification & Heap Pointer Debounce (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t giá»›i háº¡n sá»‘ táº§ng Call Stack, thá»i gian trá»… cáº­p nháº­t tá»a Ä‘á»™ mÅ©i tĂªn tham chiáº¿u vĂ  cÆ¡ cháº¿ ngÄƒn cháº·n trĂ n bá»™ nhá»› do Ä‘á»‡ quy vĂ´ háº¡n trong phĂ¢n há»‡ **State Inspector & Dynamic Variables Panel**.

## 1. Giá»›i háº¡n Chiá»u sĂ¢u NgÄƒn xáº¿p Xáº¿p chá»“ng (Call Stack Depth Limits)

*   **Háº¡n má»©c Chiá»u sĂ¢u NgÄƒn xáº¿p tá»‘i Ä‘a (Stack Frame Ceiling Clamping):**

## 2. RĂ ng buá»™c Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ Cáº­p nháº­t MÅ©i tĂªn Tham chiáº¿u (Pointer Update Debounce)

## 1. Architectural Decision Records (ADR)

### ADR-23: Váº½ LiĂªn Káº¿t Tá»a Ä‘á»™ Äá»™ng Pointer-to-Heap thĂ´ng qua Bezier Curves cháº¡y á»Ÿ Client-side

#### Bá»‘i cáº£nh (Context)
Sinh viĂªn C/C++ hay Java thÆ°á»ng gáº·p khĂ³ khÄƒn cá»±c lá»›n trong viá»‡c tá»± váº½ báº£n Ä‘á»“ ngÄƒn xáº¿p vĂ  hiá»ƒu con trá» Ä‘ang trá» Ä‘i Ä‘Ă¢u dÆ°á»›i RAM:
*   *MÆ¡ há»“ vá» con trá» (Pointer Obscurity):* Khi nhĂ¬n tháº¥y Ä‘á»‹a chá»‰ Hexa (vĂ­ dá»¥: `0x7ffd98`), sinh viĂªn khĂ´ng thá»ƒ tá»± liĂªn káº¿t sang Ă´ nhá»› cá»§a Node máº£ng/cĂ¢y Ä‘ang bay nháº£y trĂªn mĂ n hĂ¬nh.
*   *ThĂ¡ch thá»©c Co giĂ£n MĂ n hĂ¬nh (Responsive Challenge):* Náº¿u váº½ cĂ¡c Ä‘Æ°á»ng tháº³ng ná»‘i cá»©ng tá»a Ä‘á»™, khi há»c sinh thu nhá» trĂ¬nh duyá»‡t hay dĂ¹ng mĂ¡y tĂ­nh báº£ng, Ä‘Æ°á»ng ná»‘i sáº½ lá»‡ch toáº¡c, báº¯n lá»‡ch ra ngoĂ i, bÄƒm nĂ¡t giao diá»‡n premium.

#### Quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh (Decision)
Há»‡ thá»‘ng quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh tá»± phĂ¡t triá»ƒn giáº£i phĂ¡p **TĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»a Ä‘á»™ Ä‘á»™ng DOM (Bounding Box coordinates) váº½ Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong SVG Bezier ná»‘i Stack vĂ  Heap hoĂ n toĂ n á»Ÿ Client-side** thĂ´ng qua lá»›p `StateInspectorEngine` vĂ  Window Resize Event Debouncer:
1.  **Dynamic Bounding Box Capture:** Báº¯t tá»a Ä‘á»™ bá»‘n cáº¡nh (`rect.right`, `rect.top`) cá»§a Ă´ ngÄƒn xáº¿p vĂ  Ă´ nhá»› Heap thá»i gian thá»±c báº±ng `getBoundingClientRect`.
2.  **Cubic Bezier curve uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n:** Váº½ Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong Cubic Bezier lá»™ng láº«y báº±ng tháº» `<path d="...">` trong SVG, viá»n nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t trÆ°á»£t Neon phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng Cyan mÆ°á»£t mĂ .
3.  **Monaco stack frame jumps:** Click chá»n Stack Frame cÅ© láº­p tá»©c nháº£y con trá» vĂ  highlight dĂ²ng code Monaco tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng báº±ng API `revealLineInCenter`.

#### Káº¿t quáº£ (Consequences)
*   **Äiá»ƒm tá»‘t (Pros):**
    *   **KhĂ¡ng co giĂ£n hoĂ n háº£o (Responsive Resilience):** Khi co giĂ£n trĂ¬nh duyá»‡t, tá»a Ä‘á»™ DOM thay Ä‘á»•i láº­p tá»©c cáº­p nháº­t láº¡i Bezier curve mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS, Ä‘Æ°á»ng váº½ bĂ¡m sĂ¡t 100% khĂ´ng lá»‡ch má»™t pixel.
    *   **HĂ¬nh áº£nh trá»±c quan hĂ³a cá»±c cao:** LiĂªn káº¿t hoĂ n háº£o Stack (lá»‡nh thá»±c thi) vĂ  Heap (dá»¯ liá»‡u váº­t lĂ½), xua tan sá»± má» má»‹t cá»§a con trá» mĂ¡y tĂ­nh.

*   **Äiá»ƒm cáº§n lÆ°u Ă½ (Cons):**

## 2. Má»¥c tiĂªu Nghiá»‡p vá»¥ (Goals)

## 3. CĂ¡c TĂ­nh nÄƒng trong Pháº¡m vi MVP (Phase 2 MVP Scope)

### 3.2. MÅ©i tĂªn Tham chiáº¿u Neon (Pointer-to-Heap Arrows)

*   Dá»±ng sÆ¡ Ä‘á»“ cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy Ä‘á»™ng (VĂ­ dá»¥: Fibonacci, Merge Sort). NhĂ¡nh Ä‘ang thá»±c thi sĂ¡ng lá»¥c Emerald, nhĂ¡nh Ä‘Ă£ tráº£ vá» giĂ¡ trá»‹ sĂ¡ng xanh Neon kĂ¨m nhĂ£n giĂ¡ trá»‹ tráº£ vá».

## 4. Tráº£i nghiá»‡m ngÆ°á»i dĂ¹ng (User Stories)
*   LĂ  má»™t sinh viĂªn Ä‘ang váº­t lá»™n tá»± há»c Ä‘á»‡ quy Fibonacci phá»©c táº¡p, tĂ´i muá»‘n nhĂ¬n tháº¥y má»™t CĂ¢y Äá»‡ quy SVG tá»± Ä‘á»™ng dá»±ng nhĂ¡nh thá»i gian thá»±c bĂ¡m sĂ¡t bÆ°á»›c cháº¡y. ### ADR-23: Váº½ LiĂªn Káº¿t Tá»a Ä‘á»™ Äá»™ng Pointer-to-Heap thĂ´ng qua Bezier Curves cháº¡y á»Ÿ Client-side

# đŸ›  Technical Specification - State Inspector & Dynamic Pointer Lines

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t kiáº¿n trĂºc háº¡t nhĂ¢n cá»§a bá»™ theo dĂµi ngÄƒn xáº¿p xáº¿p chá»“ng **StateInspectorEngine**, giáº£i thuáº­t tĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»a Ä‘á»™ Ä‘á»™ng DOM váº½ mÅ©i tĂªn Cubic Bezier uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n SVG Pointer vĂ  thuáº­t toĂ¡n dá»±ng cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy tá»± co giĂ£n.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Quáº£n lĂ½ Call Stack NgÄƒn xáº¿p (StateInspectorEngine)

Háº¡t nhĂ¢n theo dĂµi Call Stack Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p báº±ng TypeScript cháº·t cháº½, tá»‘i Æ°u hĂ³a lÆ°u trá»¯ RAM áº£o:

```typescript
export interface StackFrame {
  frameId: string;
  functionName: string;
  lineNumber: number;
  localVariables: Record<string, { value: any; heapAddress?: string }>;
  isActive: boolean;
}

export class StateInspectorEngine {
  private stack: StackFrame[] = [];
  private activeFrameIndex = -1;

  public pushFrame(frame: StackFrame): void {
    this.stack.forEach(f => f.isActive = false);
    frame.isActive = true;
    this.stack.push(frame);
    this.activeFrameIndex = this.stack.length - 1;
  }

  public popFrame(): StackFrame | null {
    if (this.stack.length === 0) return null;
    const popped = this.stack.pop()!;
    this.activeFrameIndex = this.stack.length - 1;
    if (this.activeFrameIndex >= 0) {
      this.stack[this.activeFrameIndex].isActive = true;
    }
    return popped;
  }

  public getStack(): StackFrame[] {
    return this.stack;
  }

  public switchActiveFrame(index: number): StackFrame | null {
    if (index < 0 || index >= this.stack.length) return null;
    this.stack.forEach(f => f.isActive = false);
    this.stack[index].isActive = true;
    this.activeFrameIndex = index;
    return this.stack[index];
  }

  public clear(): void {
    this.stack = [];
    this.activeFrameIndex = -1;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Giáº£i thuáº­t TĂ­nh tá»a Ä‘á»™ Ä‘á»™ng MÅ©i tĂªn Pointer SVG (Dynamic Bezier Math)

Äá»ƒ váº½ Ä‘Æ°á»ng ná»‘i tá»« má»™t Ă´ biáº¿n sá»‘ trong danh sĂ¡ch biáº¿n sá»‘ ngÄƒn xáº¿p (DOM Element A) sang má»™t Ă´ nhá»› cá»§a Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng trĂªn Canvas Heap áº£o (DOM Element B):
*   **BÆ°á»›c 1: Báº¯t bounding box thá»i gian thá»±c:**
    ```typescript
    const rectA = elementA.getBoundingClientRect();
    const rectB = elementB.getBoundingClientRect();
    ```
*   **BÆ°á»›c 2: XĂ¡c Ä‘á»‹nh Ä‘iá»ƒm báº¯t Ä‘áº§u vĂ  káº¿t thĂºc nguá»“n-Ä‘Ă­ch:**
    *   Äiá»ƒm Ä‘áº§u $P_0 = (rectA.right, rectA.top + rectA.height / 2)$
    *   Äiá»ƒm cuá»‘i $P_3 = (rectB.left, rectB.top + rectB.height / 2)$
*   **BÆ°á»›c 3: TĂ­nh toĂ¡n 2 Ä‘iá»ƒm kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t Bezier (Control Points) táº¡o Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong lÆ°á»£n uá»‘n khĂºc:**
    *   Äiá»ƒm kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t $P_1 = (P_{0x} + \Delta x \times 0.4, P_{0y})$
    *   Äiá»ƒm kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t $P_2 = (P_{3x} - \Delta x \times 0.4, P_{3y})$
    *   *Vá»›i $\Delta x = \max(|P_{3x} - P_{0x}|, 40)$*
*   **BÆ°á»›c 4: Sinh mĂ£ Path SVG uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n:**
    $$\text{d} = \text{`M } P_{0x} \text{ } P_{0y} \text{ C } P_{1x} \text{ } P_{1y} \text{, } P_{2x} \text{ } P_{2y} \text{, } P_{3x} \text{ } P_{3y}\text{`}$$
*   **BÆ°á»›c 5: ThĂªm hiá»‡u á»©ng trÆ°á»£t neon:** Thiáº¿t láº­p nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t `stroke-dasharray="10, 15"` káº¿t há»£p keyframe trÆ°á»£t Ă¢m báº£n.

---

## 3. Thuáº­t toĂ¡n Dá»±ng CĂ¢y Äá»‡ quy Äá»™ng (RecursionTreeGenerator)

Äá»ƒ tá»± Ä‘á»™ng sáº¯p xáº¿p cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy mĂ  khĂ´ng chá»“ng chĂ©o nĂºt:
*   **PhĂ¢n phá»‘i Tá»a Ä‘á»™ Táº§ng (Layered Coordinate Distribution):**
    *   Trá»¥c $Y$ cá»§a má»—i node cĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy tĂ­nh theo chiá»u sĂ¢u: $Y_{\text{node}} = \text{depth} \times 80\text{px}$.
    *   Trá»¥c $X$ cá»§a má»—i node Ä‘Æ°á»£c phĂ¢n phá»‘i Ä‘á»u trong khoáº£ng khĂ´ng gian kháº£ dá»¥ng cá»§a nĂºt cha chia Ä‘Ă´i (Binary Tree Subdivision coordinate math):
        $$X_{\text{left}} = X_{\text{parent}} - \frac{\text{width}}{\text{depth} \times 2}$$
        $$X_{\text{right}} = X_{\text{parent}} + \frac{\text{width}}{\text{depth} \times 2}$$
# đŸŒ UX Flow & Interactive Debugging Walkthroughs

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t cĂ¡c ká»‹ch báº£n tráº£i nghiá»‡m ngÆ°á»i dĂ¹ng (User Journeys) khi sinh viĂªn thá»±c hĂ nh gá»¡ lá»—i tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c, theo dĂµi biáº¿n sá»‘ Ä‘á»™ng vĂ  nháº¥p chá»n Stack Frame lá»™i ngÆ°á»£c dĂ²ng thá»i gian trĂªn **State Inspector & Dynamic Variables Panel**.

---

## đŸ“Œ Ká»CH Báº¢N 1: THEO DĂ•I BIáº¾N Sá» Äá»˜NG CON TRá» CHá»ˆ SANG HEAP (HEAP POINTER LINK)

### TĂ¬nh huá»‘ng: Há»c sinh gá»¡ lá»—i giáº£i thuáº­t Fibonacci, hover biáº¿n cá»¥c bá»™ rĂ  con trá»

```
[Há»c sinh báº¥m phĂ¡t hoáº¡t áº£nh tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c (Step-by-Step) cá»§a giáº£i thuáº­t Fibonacci]
[Hoáº¡t áº£nh cháº¡y Ä‘áº¿n bÆ°á»›c 14: Lá»‡nh gá»i hĂ m fib(3) Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘áº©y vĂ o ngÄƒn xáº¿p]
        |
[Khung Stack Frame má»›i `fib(3)` xáº¿p chá»“ng 3D Glassmorphic lĂªn Ä‘á»‰nh Call Stack Container]
  - Viá»n frame bá»«ng sĂ¡ng Cyan rá»±c rá»¡ bĂ¡o hiá»‡u lĂ  Top Frame Ä‘ang cháº¡y.
  - BĂªn trong hiá»‡n danh sĂ¡ch biáº¿n: n = 3, ptr = 0x7ffd98.
        |
[MÅ©i tĂªn Neon uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n SVG Pointer nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t láº­p tá»©c báº¯n ra:]
  - Ná»‘i tá»« Ă´ biáº¿n `ptr` trong Stack Frame.
  - Chá»‰ tháº³ng sang Ă´ nhá»› Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Node-bar-2 trĂªn Canvas Heap áº£o.
  - Luá»“ng sĂ¡ng Neon Cyan trĂ´i trÆ°á»£t dá»c mÅ©i tĂªn táº£ dĂ²ng tham chiáº¿u cá»§a con trá».
        |
[Sinh viĂªn di chuá»™t (Hover) qua tĂªn biáº¿n `ptr` á»Ÿ ngÄƒn xáº¿p:]
  - Ă” nhá»› Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Node-bar-2 bĂªn Heap áº£o láº­p tá»©c bá»«ng sĂ¡ng xung nhá»‹p Amber Neon chá»›p táº¯t lĂ´i cuá»‘n.
  - SV hiá»ƒu rĂµ ngay láº­p tá»©c: "Ă€! Biáº¿n ptr nĂ y Ä‘ang quáº£n lĂ½ trá» Ä‘Ăºng Ä‘á»‹a chá»‰ cá»§a Node-bar-2 kia!"
        |
[Sinh viĂªn rá»i chuá»™t ra -> Xung nhá»‹p Amber táº¯t ngĂºm Ăªm dá»‹u, khĂ´i phá»¥c tráº¡ng thĂ¡i cÅ©]
```

---

## đŸ“Œ Ká»CH Báº¢N 2: Lá»˜I NGÆ¯á»¢C DĂ’NG THá»œI GIAN NHáº¤P CHá»ŒN FRAME CÅ¨ (STACK FRAME REVEAL)

### TĂ¬nh huá»‘ng: Há»c sinh nháº¥p chá»n Stack Frame cÅ© Ä‘á»ƒ thanh tra biáº¿n sá»‘ quĂ¡ khá»©

```
[Call Stack Ä‘ang sĂ¢u 3 cáº¥p xáº¿p chá»“ng: fib(3) -> fib(2) -> fib(1)]
[Khung fib(3) Ä‘ang náº±m trĂªn Ä‘á»‰nh, active]
        |
[Sinh viĂªn nháº¥p chuá»™t (Click) chá»n Khung Stack Frame cÅ© `fib(2)` á»Ÿ phĂ­a dÆ°á»›i]
        |
        v Há»‡ thá»‘ng thá»±c thi Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ ngá»¯ cáº£nh láº­p tá»©c dÆ°á»›i 10ms
[Khung fib(2) Ä‘á»•i tráº¡ng thĂ¡i sĂ¡ng viá»n Cyan bĂ¡o hiá»‡u Ä‘ang Ä‘Æ°á»£c thanh tra:]
  - Báº£ng biáº¿n sá»‘ cáº­p nháº­t danh sĂ¡ch biáº¿n cá»¥c bá»™ cá»§a táº§ng cÅ©: n = 2.
  - CĂ¢y Ä‘á»‡ quy SVG Recursion Tree highlight nhĂ¡nh gá»i `fib(2)` sĂ¡ng xanh Neon mĂ¡t máº¯t.
        |
[Monaco Editor bĂªn cáº¡nh tá»± Ä‘á»™ng cuá»™n dĂ²ng lá»‡nh (Auto-Scroll):]
  - Di chuyá»ƒn con trá» vĂ  bĂ´i sĂ¡ng vĂ ng rá»±c dĂ²ng code sá»‘ 12 (DĂ²ng lá»‡nh Ä‘á»‡ quy Ä‘Ă£ gá»i fib(2)).
  - GiĂºp há»c viĂªn tháº¥u hiá»ƒu: "Táº§ng fib(2) nĂ y Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘áº» ra tá»« dĂ²ng code sá»‘ 12 cá»§a táº§ng cha!"
        |
[Há»c sinh báº¥m [ TIáº¾P Tá»¤C CHáº Y ] -> VCR khĂ´i phá»¥c cháº¡y tiáº¿p, stack frame Ä‘á»‰nh trá»Ÿ láº¡i active]
```
 Tráº£i nghiá»‡m xáº¿p chá»“ng Call Stack 3D kĂ­nh má» Glassmorphic káº¿t há»£p Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong SVG Bezier nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t cháº¡y luá»“ng sĂ¡ng Neon chá»‰ Heap vĂ  click frame nháº£y dĂ²ng code Monaco mang láº¡i cho sinh viĂªn cáº£m giĂ¡c gá»¡ lá»—i cá»±c Ä‘á»‰nh, sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u nhÆ° má»™t chuyĂªn gia láº­p trĂ¬nh thá»±c thá»¥.
# đŸ§  Distributed Routing Engine & DB Replication Schedulers (TypeScript)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i máº¡ng `SystemDesignEngine`, giáº£i thuáº­t Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Load Balancer trĂ²n (Round-Robin), hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i Replication Lag DB vĂ  cĂ¡c ca kiá»ƒm thá»­ tá»± Ä‘á»™ng (Unit Tests) báº£o Ä‘áº£m tĂ­nh chĂ­nh xĂ¡c.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Äá»‹nh Tuyáº¿n Luá»“ng Tin PhĂ¢n TĂ¡n (TypeScript Core Logic)

MĂ£ nguá»“n lĂµi Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p báº±ng TypeScript cháº·t cháº½, tá»‘i Æ°u hĂ³a chia táº£i máº¡ng áº£o:

```typescript
export interface SystemNode {
  nodeId: string;
  nodeType: 'CLIENT' | 'LOAD_BALANCER' | 'WEB_SERVER' | 'REDIS_CACHE' | 'POSTGRES_PRIMARY' | 'POSTGRES_REPLICA';
  label: string;
  status: 'HEALTHY' | 'OVERLOADED' | 'FAILED';
  requestCount: number;
}

export interface NetworkLink {
  linkId: string;
  sourceId: string;
  targetId: string;
  latencyMs: number;
}

export interface NetworkPacket {
  packetId: string;
  sourceId: string;
  targetId: string;
  progress: number; // 0.0 -> 1.0
  status: 'IN_TRANSIT' | 'ARRIVED' | 'DROPPED';
  packetColor: string;
}

export class SystemDesignEngine {
  private nodes: Map<string, SystemNode> = new Map();
  private links: NetworkLink[] = [];
  private packets: NetworkPacket[] = [];
  private lbActiveIndex = 0;

  public registerNode(node: SystemNode): void {
    this.nodes.set(node.nodeId, node);
  }

  public registerLink(link: NetworkLink): void {
    this.links.push(link);
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ³ng háº¡t Neon gĂ³i tin tá»« Load Balancer sang cĂ¡c server khá»e máº¡nh (Round-Robin + Failover)
   */
  public routeRequestFromLB(lbId: string, packetColor: string): NetworkPacket | null {
    const lbNode = this.nodes.get(lbId);
    if (!lbNode) return null;

    // Lá»c danh sĂ¡ch cĂ¡c Web Server káº¿t ná»‘i trá»±c tiáº¿p vá»›i Load Balancer vĂ  khá»e máº¡nh
    const connectedHealthyServers = this.links
      .filter(l => l.sourceId === lbId)
      .map(l => this.nodes.get(l.targetId)!)
      .filter(n => n && n.nodeType === 'WEB_SERVER' && n.status !== 'FAILED');

    if (connectedHealthyServers.length === 0) {
      // 100% sáº­p sáº­p há»‡ thá»‘ng -> GĂ³i tin bá»‹ drop rÆ¡i tá»± do
      return null;
    }

    // Thuáº­t toĂ¡n chia luá»“ng Round-Robin xoay vĂ²ng
    const targetServer = connectedHealthyServers[this.lbActiveIndex % connectedHealthyServers.length];
    this.lbActiveIndex = (this.lbActiveIndex + 1) % connectedHealthyServers.length;

    const newPacket: NetworkPacket = {
      packetId: `packet-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
      sourceId: lbId,
      targetId: targetServer.nodeId,
      progress: 0,
      status: 'IN_TRANSIT',
      packetColor
    };

    this.packets.push(newPacket);
    targetServer.requestCount++;
    return newPacket;
  }

  public updatePacketsProgress(deltaTime: number): void {
    for (let i = this.packets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const p = this.packets[i];
      if (p.status === 'IN_TRANSIT') {
        p.progress += deltaTime * 0.05; // Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ di chuyá»ƒn
        if (p.progress >= 1.0) {
          p.progress = 1.0;
          p.status = 'ARRIVED';
          this.packets.splice(i, 1); // Vá» Ä‘Ă­ch thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM GC
        }
      }
    }
  }

  public getPackets(): NetworkPacket[] {
    return this.packets;
  }

  public clear(): void {
    this.nodes.clear();
    this.links = [];
    this.packets = [];
    this.lbActiveIndex = 0;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Kiá»ƒm thá»­ TĂ­ch há»£p ÄÆ¡n vá»‹ (Unit Test Specs)

ChĂºng ta xĂ¢y dá»±ng bá»™ unit tests xĂ¡c thá»±c Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Round-Robin chia Ä‘á»u táº£i vĂ  failover tá»± chuyá»ƒn hÆ°á»›ng trĂ¡nh server sáº­p nguá»“n:

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { SystemDesignEngine, SystemNode, NetworkLink } from './SystemDesignEngine';

describe('System Design Visualizer Unit Tests', () => {
  let engine: SystemDesignEngine;

  beforeEach(() => {
    engine = new SystemDesignEngine();

    // Thiáº¿t láº­p há»‡ thá»‘ng: Client -> LB -> WebServerA & WebServerB
    engine.registerNode({ nodeId: 'client-node', nodeType: 'CLIENT', label: 'Client', status: 'HEALTHY', requestCount: 0 });
    engine.registerNode({ nodeId: 'lb-node', nodeType: 'LOAD_BALANCER', label: 'LB', status: 'HEALTHY', requestCount: 0 });
    engine.registerNode({ nodeId: 'server-a', nodeType: 'WEB_SERVER', label: 'Server A', status: 'HEALTHY', requestCount: 0 });
    engine.registerNode({ nodeId: 'server-b', nodeType: 'WEB_SERVER', label: 'Server B', status: 'HEALTHY', requestCount: 0 });

    engine.registerLink({ linkId: 'link-client-lb', sourceId: 'client-node', targetId: 'lb-node', latencyMs: 10 });
    engine.registerLink({ linkId: 'link-lb-a', sourceId: 'lb-node', targetId: 'server-a', latencyMs: 20 });
    engine.registerLink({ linkId: 'link-lb-b', sourceId: 'lb-node', targetId: 'server-b', latencyMs: 20 });
  });

  it('Should distribute client packets perfectly 50/50 using Round-Robin', () => {
    // PhĂ³ng 4 requests liĂªn tá»¥c
    engine.routeRequestFromLB('lb-node', '#10B981');
    engine.routeRequestFromLB('lb-node', '#10B981');
    engine.routeRequestFromLB('lb-node', '#10B981');
    engine.routeRequestFromLB('lb-node', '#10B981');

    // Cáº­p nháº­t tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh trĂ´i
    engine.updatePacketsProgress(0);

    const packets = engine.getPackets();
    expect(packets.length).toBe(4);

    // 2 háº¡t chá»‰ Ä‘á»‹nh Server A, 2 háº¡t chá»‰ Ä‘á»‹nh Server B (Chia táº£i cĂ¢n báº±ng hoĂ n háº£o!)
    const toA = packets.filter(p => p.targetId === 'server-a').length;
    const toB = packets.filter(p => p.targetId === 'server-b').length;

    expect(toA).toBe(2);
    expect(toB).toBe(2);
  });

  it('Should redirect 100% of packets to Server B if Server A has failed (Failover)', () => {
    // Giáº£ láº­p Server A sáº­p nguá»“n sáº­p
    engine.registerNode({ nodeId: 'server-a', nodeType: 'WEB_SERVER', label: 'Server A', status: 'FAILED', requestCount: 0 });

    // PhĂ³ng 2 requests liĂªn tá»¥c
    engine.routeRequestFromLB('lb-node', '#10B981');
    engine.routeRequestFromLB('lb-node', '#10B981');

    const packets = engine.getPackets();
    expect(packets.length).toBe(2);

    // 100% gĂ³i tin pháº£i Ä‘Æ°á»£c chuyá»ƒn hÆ°á»›ng an toĂ n sang Server B khá»e máº¡nh
    const toA = packets.filter(p => p.targetId === 'server-a').length;
    const toB = packets.filter(p => p.targetId === 'server-b').length;

    expect(toA).toBe(0);
    expect(toB).toBe(2);
  });
});
```
 Bá»™ Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ SystemDesignEngine Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n phĂ¢n tĂ¡n RAM áº£o káº¿t há»£p cĂ¡c ca unit test nghiĂªm ngáº·t báº£o Ä‘áº£m mÆ°a háº¡t dá»¯ liá»‡u vĂ  sáº­p nguá»“n failover luĂ´n váº­n hĂ nh chĂ­nh xĂ¡c 100%, chá»‹u táº£i lá»›n Ä‘á»‰nh cao.
# đŸ¨ UI & UX Specifications - Glassmorphic Nodes & Neon Packets Flow

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ CSS cá»§a cĂ¡c tháº» Server má» kĂ­nh Glassmorphic, hoáº¡t áº£nh háº¡t Neon dá»¯ liá»‡u trĂ´i ná»•i trĂªn SVG Paths vĂ  hiá»‡u á»©ng Canvas khĂ³i bá»‘c nghi ngĂºt khi sáº­p nguá»“n (FAILED Node).

---

## 1. Tháº» MĂ¡y Chá»§ KĂ­nh Má» Glassmorphism (Server Cards UI)

Thiáº¿t káº¿ Node server lÆ¡ lá»­ng tinh xáº£o, thá»ƒ hiá»‡n trá»n váº¹n phong cĂ¡ch tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c premium:

```css
.system-node-card {
  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6); /* Slate 900 kĂ­nh má» */
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 16px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
  transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.25s ease;
  position: absolute;
  cursor: grab;
  user-select: none;
}

.system-node-card:active {
  cursor: grabbing;
  transform: scale(1.04);
  border-color: #06B6D4; /* Cyan bá»«ng sĂ¡ng khi kĂ©o tháº£ */
}

/* Node Server bá»‹ FAILED (Sáº­p nguá»“n Ä‘á» lĂ²m) */
.system-node-card.is-failed {
  border-color: #EF4444; /* Äá» rá»±c */
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.5), inset 0 0 10px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2);
  filter: grayscale(0.3) brightness(0.8);
}
```

---

## 2. Háº¡t Neon dá»¯ liá»‡u vĂ  KhĂ³i Bá»¥i Sáº­p Nguá»“n (Packets & Smoke Particles UI)

```css
/* Luá»“ng háº¡t Neon SVG di chuyá»ƒn dá»c theo Paths */
.neon-data-packet-particle {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  position: absolute;
  pointer-events: none;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px var(--packet-neon-color));
}

/* ÄÄƒng kĂ½ biáº¿n mĂ u Neon cho cĂ¡c loáº¡i luá»“ng tin khĂ¡c nhau */
.packet-http-request {
  --packet-neon-color: #10B981; /* Lá»¥c Emerald */
  background: #10B981;
}

.packet-db-write {
  --packet-neon-color: #FBBF24; /* VĂ ng rá»±c */
  background: #FBBF24;
}

.packet-cache-hit {
  --packet-neon-color: #F59E0B; /* Cam há»• phĂ¡ch */
  background: #F59E0B;
}

/* Canvas bá»¥i khĂ³i má» áº£o bá»‘c cuá»“n cuá»™n phĂ­a dÆ°á»›i Server sáº­p nguá»“n */
.failure-smoke-canvas {
  position: absolute;
  top: -10px;
  left: -10px;
  width: calc(100% + 20px);
  height: calc(100% + 20px);
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
  opacity: 0.85;
}
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ tháº» Server kĂ­nh má» Slate 900 sang trá»ng káº¿t há»£p dĂ²ng háº¡t Neon trĂ´i ná»•i rá»±c rá»¡ vĂ  há»‡ Canvas khĂ³i xĂ¡m bá»‘c cuá»“n cuá»™n 60 FPS khi sáº­p nguá»“n mang láº¡i má»™t tháº¿ giá»›i kiáº¿n trĂºc phĂ¢n tĂ¡n sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng chÆ°a tá»«ng cĂ³, khÆ¡i dáº­y Ä‘am mĂª cĂ´ng nghá»‡ cao cáº¥p cá»§a há»c viĂªn.
# đŸ—„ï¸ State Management - useSystemDesignStore (Pinia Vue 3)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a Pinia Setup Store **useSystemDesignStore** chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m quáº£n lĂ½ cáº¥u trĂºc topology phĂ¢n tĂ¡n kĂ©o tháº£, lÆ°u lÆ°á»£ng mÆ°a háº¡t Neon thá»i gian thá»±c vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ replication lag.

---

## 1. Cáº¥u trĂºc MĂ£ nguá»“n Store (`useSystemDesignStore.ts`)

MĂ£ nguá»“n store Ä‘Æ°á»£c viáº¿t theo mĂ´ hĂ¬nh setup store tá»‘i Æ°u, Ä‘Ă¡p á»©ng kĂ©o tháº£ vĂ  Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n tá»©c kháº¯c:

```typescript
import { defineStore } from 'pinia';
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { SystemDesignEngine, SystemNode, NetworkLink, NetworkPacket } from '../utils/SystemDesignEngine';

export const useSystemDesignStore = defineStore('systemDesign', () => {
  // ==========================================
  // STATE (Tráº¡ng thĂ¡i máº¡ng)
  // ==========================================
  const nodes = ref<SystemNode[]>([]);
  const links = ref<NetworkLink[]>([]);
  const activePackets = ref<NetworkPacket[]>([]);
  const replicationLagMs = ref<number>(1000); // Máº·c Ä‘á»‹nh trá»… DB sync 1 giĂ¢y
  const isTrafficSpikeActive = ref<boolean>(false);

  const engine = new SystemDesignEngine();

  // ==========================================
  // ACTIONS (HĂ nh Ä‘á»™ng Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn)
  // ==========================================

  /**
   * ÄÄƒng kĂ½ má»™t Node má»›i trĂªn Canvas (KĂ©o tháº£)
   */
  function addNode(node: SystemNode) {
    engine.registerNode(node);
    syncStoreWithEngine();
  }

  /**
   * Thiáº¿t láº­p Ä‘Æ°á»ng dáº«n liĂªn káº¿t ná»‘i giá»¯a 2 Node
   */
  function connectNodes(sourceId: string, targetId: string, latencyMs = 20) {
    const linkId = `link-${sourceId}-${targetId}`;
    const newLink: NetworkLink = { linkId, sourceId, targetId, latencyMs };
    
    engine.registerLink(newLink);
    links.value.push(newLink);
  }

  /**
   * Chuyá»ƒn tráº¡ng thĂ¡i mĂ¡y chá»§ (Toggle Server sáº­p nguá»“n/khá»e máº¡nh)
   */
  function toggleServerState(nodeId: string, forceFailed = false) {
    const node = nodes.value.find(n => n.nodeId === nodeId);
    if (!node) return;

    if (forceFailed || node.status !== 'FAILED') {
      node.status = 'FAILED';
      // KĂ­ch hoáº¡t ná»• háº¡t Canvas khĂ³i Ä‘en sÆ°Æ¡ng mĂ¹ á»Ÿ mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch
      triggerFailedSmokeEvent(nodeId);
    } else {
      node.status = 'HEALTHY';
    }

    engine.registerNode({ ...node }); // Äá»“ng bá»™ ngÆ°á»£c vĂ o háº¡t nhĂ¢n Engine
  }

  /**
   * Báº¯n má»™t luá»“ng Neon háº¡t HTTP request tá»« Client Ä‘i dá»c máº¡ng lÆ°á»›i
   */
  function injectHttpRequest(lbId: string, color = '#10B981') {
    const packet = engine.routeRequestFromLB(lbId, color);
    if (packet) {
      syncStoreWithEngine();
    }
  }

  /**
   * VĂ²ng láº·p Ä‘áº­p nhá»‹p FPS cáº­p nháº­t tá»a Ä‘á»™ bay cá»§a toĂ n bá»™ háº¡t Neon
   */
  function tickEngine(deltaTime: number) {
    engine.updatePacketsProgress(deltaTime);
    activePackets.value = [...engine.getPackets()];
  }

  /**
   * Cáº­p nháº­t cáº¥u hĂ¬nh trá»… trá»… máº¡ng Database replication lag
   */
  function setReplicationLag(ms: number) {
    replicationLagMs.value = ms;
  }

  /**
   * Dá»n dáº¹p reset toĂ n bá»™ phĂ²ng thá»±c hĂ nh máº¡ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n
   */
  function clearTopology() {
    engine.clear();
    nodes.value = [];
    links.value = [];
    activePackets.value = [];
    isTrafficSpikeActive.value = false;
  }

  // ==========================================
  // UTILS (Bá»• trá»£ ná»™i bá»™)
  // ==========================================
  function syncStoreWithEngine() {
    // KhĂ´ng ghi Ä‘Ă¨ trá»±c tiáº¿p Ä‘á»ƒ trĂ¡nh máº¥t tĂ­nh pháº£n á»©ng cá»§a Vue 3 ref
    activePackets.value = [...engine.getPackets()];
  }

  function triggerFailedSmokeEvent(nodeId: string) {
    const smokeEvent = new CustomEvent('SERVER_FAILED_SMOKE_BURST', {
      detail: { nodeId }
    });
    window.dispatchEvent(smokeEvent);
  }

  return {
    nodes,
    links,
    activePackets,
    replicationLagMs,
    isTrafficSpikeActive,
    addNode,
    connectNodes,
    toggleServerState,
    injectHttpRequest,
    tickEngine,
    setReplicationLag,
    clearTopology
  };
});
```

---

## 2. Æ¯u Ä‘iá»ƒm VÆ°á»£t trá»™i cá»§a Thiáº¿t káº¿ Äá»“ há»a Reactive Pinia Store

Báº±ng viá»‡c káº¿t há»£p Pinia Setup Store vá»›i Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ `SystemDesignEngine` giáº£i quyáº¿t sáº­p nguá»“n failover nhanh dÆ°á»›i 5ms:
*   **KhĂ´ng trá»… máº¡ng mĂ´ phá»ng (No Network Simulation Lag):** Pháº£n há»“i failover tá»©c thĂ¬ dÆ°á»›i **5ms** ngay trÆ°á»›c máº¯t há»c sinh.
*   **KhĂ¡ng rĂ² rá»‰ RAM GC Ä‘á»‰nh cao:** CĂ¡c háº¡t Neon dá»¯ liá»‡u trĂ´i ná»•i khi bay vá» Ä‘Ă­ch Ä‘Æ°á»£c tá»± Ä‘á»™ng giáº£i phĂ³ng khá»i máº£ng `activePackets` triá»‡t Ä‘á»ƒ, giá»¯ mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch luĂ´n mÆ°á»£t mĂ  mĂ¡t láº¡nh.
# â™ï¸ Infrastructure & Canvas Overload Particles Engine (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t giáº£i phĂ¡p háº¡ táº§ng Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ liĂªn káº¿t tá»a Ä‘á»™ kĂ©o tháº£ (Dynamic Connection Paths) vĂ  há»‡ thá»‘ng háº¡t bá»¥i khĂ³i sáº­p nguá»“n **FailureSmokeEmitterEngine** cháº¡y á»Ÿ Canvas 2D 60 FPS.

---

## 1. Há»‡ thá»‘ng Canvas Háº¡t KhĂ³i Nghi ngĂºt (FailureSmokeEmitterEngine)

Khi há»c sinh báº¥m táº¯t nguá»“n sáº­p server, há»‡ thá»‘ng khá»Ÿi cháº¡y má»™t bá»™ mĂ¡y phĂ¡t háº¡t khĂ³i Canvas 2D cá»¥c bá»™ xung quanh card Ä‘Ă³ Ä‘á»ƒ mang láº¡i hiá»‡u á»©ng thá»‹ giĂ¡c "sá»¥p Ä‘á»• váº­t lĂ½" tuyá»‡t Ä‘áº¹p:

```typescript
export interface SmokeParticle {
  x: number;
  y: number;
  vx: number;
  vy: number;
  size: number;
  alpha: number;
  life: number; // Tuá»•i thá» háº¡t
  maxLife: number;
}

export class FailureSmokeEmitterEngine {
  private canvas: HTMLCanvasElement;
  private ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D;
  private particles: SmokeParticle[] = [];
  private animationFrameId: number | null = null;
  private isEmitting = false;

  constructor(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) {
    this.canvas = canvas;
    this.ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')!;
  }

  public startEmission(): void {
    if (this.isEmitting) return;
    this.isEmitting = true;
    this.loop();
  }

  public triggerBurst(count = 20): void {
    const centerX = this.canvas.width / 2;
    const centerY = this.canvas.height / 2;

    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
      const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const speed = Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.5;
      
      this.particles.push({
        x: centerX,
        y: centerY,
        vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
        vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed - 0.4, // Phun nháº¹ lĂªn trĂªn
        size: Math.random() * 8 + 4,
        alpha: 0.9,
        life: 0,
        maxLife: Math.random() * 40 + 30
      });
    }
  }

  private loop = (): void => {
    if (!this.isEmitting) return;

    this.updateParticles();
    this.draw();
    
    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);
  };

  private updateParticles(): void {
    const centerX = this.canvas.width / 2;
    const centerY = this.canvas.height / 2;

    // LiĂªn tá»¥c sinh ra má»™t Ă­t khĂ³i bá»‘c lĂªn nháº¹ nhĂ ng náº¿u mĂ¡y chá»§ váº«n sáº­p
    if (Math.random() < 0.25) {
      this.particles.push({
        x: centerX + (Math.random() * 20 - 10),
        y: centerY + 10,
        vx: Math.random() * 0.4 - 0.2,
        vy: -Math.random() * 0.6 - 0.3,
        size: Math.random() * 6 + 3,
        alpha: 0.8,
        life: 0,
        maxLife: Math.random() * 50 + 40
      });
    }

    for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const p = this.particles[i];
      p.x += p.vx;
      p.y += p.vy;
      p.life++;
      
      // KhĂ³i ná»Ÿ to dáº§n ra ngoĂ i khĂ´ng gian
      p.size += 0.08;
      
      // Má» dáº§n theo tuá»•i thá»
      p.alpha = 1 - (p.life / p.maxLife);

      if (p.life >= p.maxLife || p.alpha <= 0) {
        this.particles.splice(i, 1); // Dá»n RAM GC sáº¡ch sáº½
      }
    }
  }

  private draw(): void {
    this.ctx.clearRect(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);

    this.particles.forEach(p => {
      this.ctx.save();
      this.ctx.globalAlpha = p.alpha;
      this.ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(120, 120, 130, 0.4)'; // KhĂ³i xĂ¡m tro má» áº£o
      this.ctx.beginPath();
      this.ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      this.ctx.fill();
      this.ctx.restore();
    });
  }

  /**
   * Dá»n dáº¹p thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM GC an toĂ n trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ bá»™ nhá»›
   */
  public destroy(): void {
    this.isEmitting = false;
    if (this.animationFrameId !== null) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrameId);
      this.animationFrameId = null;
    }
    this.particles = [];
    this.ctx.clearRect(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Giáº£i phĂ¡p thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM & GC Memory Leak Prevent

*   **Chá»‘ng rĂ² rá»‰ bá»™ nhá»› Canvas Particle Loop:**
    *   Háº¡t khĂ³i bá»‘c lĂªn bá»‘c lĂªn liĂªn tá»¥c vĂ  tá»± há»§y triá»‡t Ä‘á»ƒ khá»i máº£ng `particles` báº±ng máº£ng splice khi `alpha <= 0` hoáº·c tuá»•i thá» Ä‘áº¡t háº¡n má»©c.
    *   `cancelAnimationFrame` dá»«ng ngay láº­p tá»©c vĂ²ng láº·p `requestAnimationFrame` nhĂ n rá»—i, cam káº¿t giáº£i phĂ³ng hoĂ n toĂ n CPU cá»§a mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch Ä‘áº¡t hiá»‡u nÄƒng mĂ¡t láº¡nh Ä‘á»‰nh cao.
# đŸ”Œ System Design Topology API & JSON Schemas (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t cáº¥u trĂºc JSON Schema Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng mĂ´ táº£ cáº¥u trĂºc liĂªn káº¿t máº¡ng kĂ©o tháº£ (Network Topology) vĂ  mĂ´ hĂ¬nh thiáº¿t láº­p DTO C# ASP.NET Core tiáº¿p nháº­n sÆ¡ Ä‘á»“ há»‡ thá»‘ng tá»« mĂ¡y chá»§.

## 1. Báº£n Ä‘áº·c táº£ JSON Schema cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Topology máº¡ng (SystemTopology Schema)

SiĂªu dá»¯ liá»‡u mĂ´ táº£ cĂ¡c Node mĂ¡y chá»§ kĂ©o tháº£ vĂ  cĂ¡c Ä‘Æ°á»ng dáº«n SVG káº¿t ná»‘i Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng nghiĂªm ngáº·t theo JSON Schema dÆ°á»›i Ä‘Ă¢y:

```json
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "title": "SystemDesignTopology",
  "type": "OBJECT",
  "properties": {
    "topologyId": {
      "type": "STRING"

      "type": "ARRAY",
      "items": {
        "type": "OBJECT",
        "properties": {

            "type": "STRING"
          },

      }

    "links": {

      "items": {
        "type": "OBJECT",
        "properties": {

            "type": "STRING"
          },
          "sourceId": {
            "type": "STRING"
          },
          "targetId": {
            "type": "STRING"
          },
          "latencyMs": {
            "type": "INTEGER"
          }
        },
        "required": ["linkId", "sourceId", "targetId", "latencyMs"]
      }
    }
  },
  "required": ["topologyId", "nodes", "links"]
}
```

## 2. MĂ´ hĂ¬nh tiáº¿p nháº­n DTO C# á»Ÿ Backend ASP.NET Core (.NET Core)

Lá»›p DTO chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m náº¡p sÆ¡ Ä‘á»“ kiáº¿n trĂºc há»‡ thá»‘ng tá»« mĂ¡y chá»§ C# ASP.NET Core:

 Cáº¥u trĂºc DTO C# an toĂ n, JSON Schema cháº·t cháº½ vĂ  API lÆ°u trá»¯ cáº¥u hĂ¬nh máº¡ng kĂ©o tháº£ bĂ¡m sĂ¡t thiáº¿t káº¿ debugger giĂºp toĂ n bá»™ phĂ¢n há»‡ váº­n hĂ nh vĂ´ cĂ¹ng trÆ¡n tru, báº£o máº­t vĂ  chá»‹u táº£i lá»›n.
# đŸ­ Behavioral Specification & Load Balancing Constraints (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t giá»›i háº¡n dung lÆ°á»£ng táº£i cá»§a Web Server, pháº¡m vi trá»… trá»… máº¡ng Database sync replication lag vĂ  cÆ¡ cháº¿ dá»n dáº¹p háº¡t trong phĂ¢n há»‡ **System Design & Distributed Architecture Visualizer**.

---

## 1. NgÆ°á»¡ng QuĂ¡ Táº£i cá»§a MĂ¡y Chá»§ Web (Web Server Capacity Overload)

Äá»ƒ mĂ´ phá»ng chĂ¢n thá»±c hiá»‡n tÆ°á»£ng ngháº½n máº¡ng (bottleneck) trong Ä‘á»i sá»‘ng há»‡ thá»‘ng lá»›n:
*   **NgÆ°á»¡ng KĂ­ch hoáº¡t Tráº¡ng thĂ¡i QuĂ¡ táº£i (Overload Capacity Threshold):**
    *   Má»—i Web Server Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p giá»›i háº¡n chá»‹u táº£i tá»‘i Ä‘a lĂ  **50 requests/giĂ¢y**.
    *   Náº¿u táº§n suáº¥t xáº£ háº¡t Neon Ä‘á»• bá»™ vĂ o Server vÆ°á»£t quĂ¡ ngÆ°á»¡ng 50 háº¡t/giĂ¢y, tráº¡ng thĂ¡i Node láº­p tá»©c chuyá»ƒn tá»« `HEALTHY` sang `OVERLOADED`.
    *   *Hiá»‡u á»©ng hĂ¬nh áº£nh:* Viá»n mĂ¡y chá»§ bá»«ng sĂ¡ng Ä‘á» cam nháº¥p nhĂ¡y phĂ¡t nhiá»‡t nĂ³ng bá»ng, vĂ  tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ trĂ´i trÆ°á»£t cá»§a háº¡t Neon qua Server bá»‹ giáº£m Ä‘i 3 láº§n (Lag).
    *   *CÆ¡ cháº¿ tá»± phá»¥c há»“i:* Khi lÆ°u lÆ°á»£ng háº¡t giáº£m xuá»‘ng dÆ°á»›i 30 háº¡t/giĂ¢y, Server tá»± phá»¥c há»“i vá» `HEALTHY` sau 3 giĂ¢y Ăªm dá»‹u.

---

## 2. Cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Trá»… máº¡ng DB Sync Replication Lag

*   **Pháº¡m vi Äiá»u chá»‰nh Äá»™ trá»… (Sync Delay Ranges):**
    *   Äá»™ trá»… Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ tá»« Primary DB sang Replica DB Ä‘Æ°á»£c quy Ä‘á»‹nh Ä‘iá»u chá»‰nh linh hoáº¡t trong khoáº£ng tá»« **100ms** (máº¡ng ná»™i bá»™ tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ cao) Ä‘áº¿n **5000ms** (máº¡ng Ä‘a vĂ¹ng khoáº£ng cĂ¡ch Ä‘á»‹a lĂ½ xa xĂ´i).
    *   Sá»­ dá»¥ng thanh kĂ©o trá»±c quan (slider) á»Ÿ mĂ n hĂ¬nh thá»±c hĂ nh Ä‘á»ƒ Ä‘iá»u chá»‰nh.
    *   *HĂ nh vi bĂ¡m sĂ¡t:* Háº¡t dá»¯ liá»‡u vĂ ng Neon báº¯t buá»™c pháº£i lÆ°u trĂº náº±m Ä‘á»£i trong hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i `Replication Queue` Ä‘Ăºng khoáº£ng thá»i gian cáº¥u hĂ¬nh trÆ°á»›c khi Ä‘Æ°á»£c phĂ³ng Ä‘i bay sang Replica DB.

---

## 3. CÆ¡ cháº¿ tá»± Ä‘á»™ng dá»n dáº¹p háº¡t (Auto Packet Garbage Collection)

*   **ChĂ­nh sĂ¡ch dá»n dáº¹p rĂ¡c (Garbage Collection Policy):**
    *   Táº¥t cáº£ háº¡t Neon dá»¯ liá»‡u trĂ´i ná»•i khi tiáº¿n sĂ¡t vĂ  cháº¡m mĂºt káº¿t thĂºc `progress >= 1.0` (Vá» Ä‘Ă­ch thĂ nh cĂ´ng) hoáº·c bá»‹ drop rÆ¡i tá»± do do sáº­p server báº¯t buá»™c pháº£i Ä‘Æ°á»£c giáº£i phĂ³ng bá»™ nhá»› RAM Client láº­p tá»©c dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.
    *   KhĂ´ng cho phĂ©p lÆ°u trá»¯ váº¿t háº¡t cÅ© nhĂ n rá»—i dÆ°á»›i RAM trĂ¡nh giáº­t lag trĂ¬nh duyá»‡t mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch.
# đŸ“ Core Architectural Decisions (System Design Visualizer)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y ghi nháº­n Quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh Thiáº¿t káº¿ Kiáº¿n trĂºc (ADR) chá»©ng minh tĂ­nh Æ°u viá»‡t vá» hiá»‡u nÄƒng mÆ°a háº¡t trĂ´i ná»•i vĂ  kháº£ nÄƒng pháº£n há»“i trá»±c quan sá»± cá»‘ sáº­p nguá»“n tá»©c thĂ¬ cá»§a phĂ¢n há»‡ **System Design & Distributed Architecture Visualizer**.

---

## 1. Architectural Decision Records (ADR)

### ADR-24: Bá»™ mĂ¡y MĂ´ phá»ng Actor-Model Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n luá»“ng tin cháº¡y 100% Client-side báº±ng TypeScript

#### Bá»‘i cáº£nh (Context)
CĂ¡c há»‡ thá»‘ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n lá»›n cá»±c ká»³ phá»©c táº¡p vĂ  trá»«u tÆ°á»£ng (Load Balancer chia táº£i, API Gateway lá»c gĂ³i tin, DB Replication trá»… trá»… máº¡ng). Viá»‡c giáº£ng dáº¡y lĂ½ thuyáº¿t nĂ y thÆ°á»ng gáº·p rĂ o cáº£n lá»›n:
*   *Lá»‡ch pha ngá»¯ cáº£nh thá»±c táº¿:* Sinh viĂªn khĂ´ng cĂ³ cáº£m xĂºc trá»±c quan vá» "gĂ³i tin bá»‹ Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n tháº¿ nĂ o" náº¿u khĂ´ng tháº¥y dĂ²ng cháº£y háº¡t cháº¡y váº­t lĂ½ trÆ°á»›c máº¯t.
*   *Trá»… mĂ´ phá»ng (Simulation Latency):* Náº¿u gá»­i yĂªu cáº§u xáº£ lÅ© (mÆ°a háº¡t) vĂ  cáº¥u hĂ¬nh sáº­p nguá»“n vá» backend mĂ¡y chá»§ Ä‘á»ƒ mĂ´ phá»ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n máº¡ng rá»“i tráº£ tá»a Ä‘á»™ vá» váº½, thá»i gian trá»… sáº½ bÄƒm nĂ¡t tráº£i nghiá»‡m 60 FPS mÆ°á»£t mĂ .

#### Quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh (Decision)
Há»‡ thá»‘ng quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh tá»± phĂ¡t triá»ƒn **Bá»™ mĂ¡y mĂ´ phá»ng hĂ nh vi Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n phi táº­p trung (Actor-Model simulator) hoĂ n toĂ n á»Ÿ Client-side báº±ng TypeScript** lá»“ng ghĂ©p Canvas 2D phĂ¡t khĂ³i bá»¥i sáº­p nguá»“n vĂ  SVG Paths uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n:
1.  **Actor-Model Decentralized Nodes:** Má»—i mĂ¡y chá»§, Load Balancer hay DB lĂ  má»™t Actor quáº£n lĂ½ vĂ²ng Ä‘á»i Ä‘á»™c láº­p dÆ°á»›i RAM.
2.  **MÆ°a háº¡t Neon 60 FPS:** Váº½ trĂ´i trÆ°á»£t háº¡t trĂ²n Neon trĂªn cĂ¡c tháº» `<path>` SVG sá»­ dá»¥ng cĂ´ng thá»©c tĂ­nh toĂ¡n bÆ°á»›c thá»i gian co giĂ£n `progress` Ä‘á»™c láº­p cá»±c nháº¹.
3.  **Canvas khĂ³i sÆ°Æ¡ng FAILED:** Sáº­p nguá»“n Server láº­p tá»©c kĂ­ch hoáº¡t Canvas 2D phĂ¡t háº¡t khĂ³i xĂ¡m bay tá»a trĂ²n cuá»“n cuá»™n táº£ cáº£nh sá»¥p Ä‘á»• há»‡ thá»‘ng.

# đŸŒ TRá»°C QUAN HĂ“A THIáº¾T Káº¾ Há»† THá»NG PHĂ‚N TĂ‚N (SYSTEM DESIGN VISUALIZER)
## đŸ“ TĂ€I LIá»†U KHáº¢O SĂT & THIáº¾T Káº¾ CHI TIáº¾T (PHASE 2)

ChĂ o má»«ng báº¡n Ä‘áº¿n vá»›i tĂ i liá»‡u ká»¹ thuáº­t chi tiáº¿t nháº¥t vá» **System Design Visualizer Engine** - phĂ¢n há»‡ trá»±c quan hĂ³a thiáº¿t káº¿ há»‡ thá»‘ng lá»›n vĂ  kiáº¿n trĂºc phĂ¢n tĂ¡n thá»i gian thá»±c cá»§a **VisualizationDSA** há»— trá»£ kĂ©o tháº£ cĂ¡c Node mĂ¡y chá»§ má» kĂ­nh Glassmorphic, báº¯n luá»“ng gĂ³i tin Neon trĂ´i ná»•i vĂ  mĂ´ phá»ng Ä‘á»©t gĂ£y sáº­p nguá»“n (failover) sinh Ä‘á»™ng. ## 1. Táº¦M NHĂŒN TRá»°C QUAN HĂ“A THIáº¾T Káº¾ Há»† THá»NG (PRD)

### 1.1. Táº§m nhĂ¬n: Biáº¿n cĂ¡c lĂ½ thuyáº¿t phĂ¢n tĂ¡n khĂ´ khan thĂ nh TÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c Váº­t lĂ½ Sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng
Thiáº¿t káº¿ há»‡ thá»‘ng lá»›n (System Design) lĂ  chÆ°Æ¡ng há»c khĂ³ nháº±n nháº¥t, Ä‘Ă²i há»i sá»± tÆ°á»Ÿng tÆ°á»£ng cao vá» luá»“ng dá»¯ liá»‡u truyá»n táº£i giá»¯a cĂ¡c thĂ nh pháº§n phĂ¢n tĂ¡n (Load Balancer, API Gateway, Redis Cache, Database, Message Queue):
*   *Váº¥n Ä‘á»:* Sinh viĂªn há»c "Load Balancer Round-Robin" nhÆ°ng chá»‰ tháº¥y sÆ¡ Ä‘á»“ tÄ©nh trĂªn sĂ¡ch vá»Ÿ, khĂ´ng cĂ³ cáº£m nháº­n thá»±c táº¿ vá» dĂ²ng cháº£y gĂ³i tin bá»‹ chia Ä‘Ă´i. Há» há»c "Database Replication Lag" nhÆ°ng khĂ´ng tháº¥y cáº£nh Database Primary Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ dá»¯ liá»‡u sang Replica tháº¿ nĂ o khi cĂ³ Ä‘á»™ trá»… máº¡ng.
*   *Giáº£i phĂ¡p:* **System Design Visualizer Engine** hiá»‡n thá»±c hĂ³a sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng tháº¿ giá»›i phĂ¢n tĂ¡n:
    1.  **Vibrant Interactive Architecture Canvas:** Sinh viĂªn Ä‘Æ°á»£c tá»± tay kĂ©o tháº£ cĂ¡c Node kĂ­nh má» Glassmorphism (Client, Load Balancer, Server, Cache, DB, Kafka).
    2.  **Dynamic Flowing Data Packets (Neon SVG Packets):** CĂ¡c gĂ³i tin lĂ  cĂ¡c háº¡t trĂ²n Neon phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng trĂ´i trÆ°á»£t nháº¹ nhĂ ng dá»c theo cĂ¡c Ä‘Æ°á»ng ná»‘i ná»‘i káº¿t cĂ¡c server. Nháº¥p chuá»™t tÄƒng lÆ°u lÆ°á»£ng (traffic spike) lĂ m hĂ ng váº¡n háº¡t báº¯n nhÆ° mÆ°a sa.
    3.  **Visual Bottlenecks & Failures Simulator:** Nháº¥p táº¯t Server A (Sáº­p nguá»“n), Load Balancer láº­p tá»©c phĂ¡t hiá»‡n trong 5ms, Ä‘á»•i hÆ°á»›ng toĂ n bá»™ dĂ²ng háº¡t Neon trĂ´i cháº£y sang Server B dá»± phĂ²ng an toĂ n (Failover). Server A sáº­p chuyá»ƒn Ä‘á» rá»±c tá»a khĂ³i bá»¥i mĂ¹ má»‹t Canvas.

## 2. Bá»˜ MĂY Äá»NH TUYáº¾N GĂ“I TIN & PHá»¤C Há»’I Sá»° Cá» (TECHNICAL SPEC)

Äá»ƒ kiá»ƒm chá»©ng kiáº¿n trĂºc máº¡ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n, há»‡ thá»‘ng thiáº¿t láº­p bá»™ mĂ´ phá»ng **SystemDesignEngine**:

```
[Client] ===> (MÆ°a háº¡t Neon Green) ===> [Load Balancer]
                                             | (Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n 50/50 Round-Robin)
                                     +-------+-------+
                                     |               |
                                     v               v
                                 [Server A]      [Server B] (Glowing Crimson if Failed)
```

### Thuáº­t toĂ¡n Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n Load Balancer (Round-Robin Routing)
Há»‡ thá»‘ng sá»­ dá»¥ng chá»‰ sá»‘ xoay vĂ²ng `activeIndex = (activeIndex + 1) % healthyServers.length` Ä‘á»ƒ Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n dĂ²ng háº¡t Neon Ä‘i dá»c cĂ¡c vector SVG paths.

ChĂºng ta xĂ¢y dá»±ng cĂ¡c cáº¥u trĂºc dá»¯ liá»‡u mĂ´ táº£ Network Node vĂ  gĂ³i tin báº±ng TypeScript:

```typescript
export interface SystemNode {

}
```
Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n `SystemDesignEngine` sáº½ Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘áº·c táº£ trong tá»‡p core logic.
