## 6. QUYáº¾T Äá»NH KIáº¾N TRĂC & MĂ” PHá»NG ACTOR-MODEL (ADR)

### ADR-24: Bá»™ mĂ¡y MĂ´ phá»ng Actor-Model Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n luá»“ng tin cháº¡y 100% Client-side báº±ng TypeScript

*   **Quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh:** Sá»­ dá»¥ng giáº£i phĂ¡p mĂ´ phá»ng hĂ nh vi luá»“ng tin Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n phi táº­p trung máº¡ng lÆ°á»›i (Actor-Model simulator) hoĂ n toĂ n á»Ÿ Client-side thĂ´ng qua vĂ²ng láº·p FPS `requestAnimationFrame` thay vĂ¬ gá»i API Backend mĂ´ phá»ng.
*   **LĂ½ do:**
    1.  *MÆ°á»£t mĂ  tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i 60 FPS:* Nháº¥p sáº­p nguá»“n má»™t Server lĂ  Load Balancer chuyá»ƒn hÆ°á»›ng dĂ²ng cháº£y háº¡t Neon mÆ°á»£t mĂ  ngay láº­p tá»©c dÆ°á»›i **10ms**, mang láº¡i hiá»‡u á»©ng thá»‹ giĂ¡c Ä‘á»‰nh cao, kĂ­ch thĂ­ch tÆ° duy nghiĂªn cá»©u cá»§a ngÆ°á»i há»c.
    2.  *Chá»‹u táº£i mÆ°a háº¡t lá»›n:* Äáº£m báº£o mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch cĂ³ thá»ƒ render cĂ¹ng lĂºc 200 háº¡t Neon trĂ´i ná»•i mĂ  khĂ´ng sá»¥t giáº£m FPS.

---

## 7. Káº¾ HOáº CH TRIá»‚N KHAI & TIĂU CHĂ NGHIá»†M THU (DoD)

### 7.1. Lá»™ trĂ¬nh Triá»ƒn khai
1.  **Sprint A: Thiáº¿t káº¿ Giao diá»‡n Nodes & Luá»“ng Háº¡t Neon (NgĂ y 1-3):** Dá»±ng layout kĂ©o tháº£ cĂ¡c Node Glassmorphic, thiáº¿t káº¿ háº¡t Neon trĂ´i ná»•i trÆ°á»£t trĂªn SVG Paths, Canvas quĂ¡ nhiá»‡t sáº­p nguá»“n bá»‘c khĂ³i.
2.  **Sprint B: Engine Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n SystemDesignEngine & DB Replication (NgĂ y 4-6):** Láº­p trĂ¬nh logic Round-Robin, cÆ¡ cháº¿ sáº­p nguá»“n Failover tá»± Ä‘á»™ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n láº¡i, Ä‘o Ä‘á»™ trá»… replication lag DB.

### 8.2. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   Load Balancer Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Round-Robin chia Ä‘Ă´i lÆ°u lÆ°á»£ng mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS khi sinh viĂªn xáº£ mÆ°a háº¡t.
*   Nháº¥p táº¯t Server A (chuyá»ƒn sang FAILED) báº¯t buá»™c Ä‘á»•i viá»n Server sang Ä‘á» rá»±c chĂ³i, bá»‘c khĂ³i Canvas 2D vĂ  Load Balancer chuyá»ƒn hÆ°á»›ng 100% háº¡t sang Server B an toĂ n dÆ°á»›i 5ms.
*   MĂ´ phá»ng Database Replication Lag Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ háº¡t tá»« Primary sang Replica cĂ³ thanh kĂ©o cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Ä‘á»™ trá»… 100ms - 5000ms hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng chuáº©n chá»‰.
*   Tá»± Ä‘á»™ng dá»n dáº¹p cĂ¡c háº¡t Ä‘Ă£ vá» Ä‘Ă­ch hoáº·c bá»‹ drop khá»i RAM GC Ä‘á»ƒ trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ bá»™ nhá»›.
*   Giáº£i phĂ³ng 100% vĂ²ng láº·p hoáº¡t áº£nh `requestAnimationFrame` khi thoĂ¡t phĂ²ng thá»±c hĂ nh.
# đŸ›  Technical Specification - System Design Engine & Dynamic Packet Router

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t kiáº¿n trĂºc háº¡t nhĂ¢n cá»§a bá»™ mĂ´ phá»ng máº¡ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n **SystemDesignEngine**, thuáº­t toĂ¡n Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Load Balancer trĂ²n (Round-Robin), giáº£i thuáº­t quáº£n lĂ½ hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i Replication Lag DB vĂ  há»‡ váº­t lĂ½ khĂ³i sÆ°Æ¡ng sáº­p nguá»“n Canvas 2D.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Äiá»u Phá»‘i Äá»‹nh Tuyáº¿n Máº¡ng (SystemDesignEngine TS Core)

LĂµi mĂ´ phá»ng máº¡ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p báº±ng TypeScript cháº·t cháº½, sá»­ dá»¥ng mĂ´ hĂ¬nh sá»± kiá»‡n phi táº­p trung:

```typescript
export interface SystemNode {
  nodeId: string;
  nodeType: 'CLIENT' | 'LOAD_BALANCER' | 'WEB_SERVER' | 'REDIS_CACHE' | 'POSTGRES_PRIMARY' | 'POSTGRES_REPLICA';
  label: string;
  status: 'HEALTHY' | 'OVERLOADED' | 'FAILED';
  requestCount: number;
}

export interface NetworkLink {
  linkId: string;
  sourceId: string;
  targetId: string;
  latencyMs: number;
}

export interface NetworkPacket {
  packetId: string;
  sourceId: string;
  targetId: string;
  progress: number; // 0.0 -> 1.0
  status: 'IN_TRANSIT' | 'ARRIVED' | 'DROPPED';
  packetColor: string; // hsl Neon color palette
}

export class SystemDesignEngine {
  private nodes: Map<string, SystemNode> = new Map();
  private links: NetworkLink[] = [];
  private packets: NetworkPacket[] = [];
  private lbActiveIndex = 0;

  public registerNode(node: SystemNode): void {
    this.nodes.set(node.nodeId, node);
  }

  public registerLink(link: NetworkLink): void {
    this.links.push(link);
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ³ng háº¡t Neon gĂ³i tin tá»« Load Balancer sang cĂ¡c server khá»e máº¡nh (Round-Robin + Failover)
   */
  public routeRequestFromLB(lbId: string, packetColor: string): NetworkPacket | null {
    const lbNode = this.nodes.get(lbId);
    if (!lbNode) return null;

    // Lá»c danh sĂ¡ch cĂ¡c Web Server káº¿t ná»‘i trá»±c tiáº¿p vá»›i Load Balancer vĂ  khá»e máº¡nh
    const connectedHealthyServers = this.links
      .filter(l => l.sourceId === lbId)
      .map(l => this.nodes.get(l.targetId)!)
      .filter(n => n && n.nodeType === 'WEB_SERVER' && n.status !== 'FAILED');

    if (connectedHealthyServers.length === 0) {
      // 100% sáº­p sáº­p há»‡ thá»‘ng -> GĂ³i tin bá»‹ drop rÆ¡i tá»± do
      return null;
    }

    // Thuáº­t toĂ¡n chia luá»“ng Round-Robin xoay vĂ²ng
    const targetServer = connectedHealthyServers[this.lbActiveIndex % connectedHealthyServers.length];
    this.lbActiveIndex = (this.lbActiveIndex + 1) % connectedHealthyServers.length;

    const newPacket: NetworkPacket = {
      packetId: `packet-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`,
      sourceId: lbId,
      targetId: targetServer.nodeId,
      progress: 0,
      status: 'IN_TRANSIT',
      packetColor
    };

    this.packets.push(newPacket);
    targetServer.requestCount++;
    return newPacket;
  }

  public updatePacketsProgress(deltaTime: number): void {
    for (let i = this.packets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const p = this.packets[i];
      if (p.status === 'IN_TRANSIT') {
        p.progress += deltaTime * 0.05; // Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ di chuyá»ƒn
        if (p.progress >= 1.0) {
          p.progress = 1.0;
          p.status = 'ARRIVED';
          this.packets.splice(i, 1); // Vá» Ä‘Ă­ch thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM GC
        }
      }
    }
  }

  public getPackets(): NetworkPacket[] {
    return this.packets;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Giáº£i thuáº­t Äá»“ng bá»™ Database Replication Lag (Replication Queue)

Khi Primary DB nháº­n Ä‘Æ°á»£c lá»‡nh ghi (Write Command):
*   **BÆ°á»›c 1: Bá»«ng sĂ¡ng Primary Node:** Nháº­n háº¡t vĂ ng Neon rá»±c rá»¡ ghi xuá»‘ng á»• Ä‘Ä©a áº£o.
*   **BÆ°á»›c 2: Náº¡p vĂ o HĂ ng Ä‘á»£i Replication Queue:**
    ```typescript
    public triggerReplication(
      primaryId: string,
      replicaId: string,
      lagDurationMs: number,
      onSyncComplete: () => void
    ) {
      // Giáº£ láº­p trá»… trá»… sync truyá»n háº¡t
      setTimeout(() => {
        // Sau Ä‘Ăºng lagDurationMs má»›i phĂ³ng háº¡t Neon Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ bá»«ng sĂ¡ng bĂªn Replica
        onSyncComplete();
      }, lagDurationMs);
    }
    ```

---

## 3. Há»‡ thá»‘ng háº¡t SÆ°Æ¡ng mĂ¹ khĂ³i bá»¥i sáº­p nguá»“n Canvas 2D (Failure Smoke Math)

Khi má»™t Node mĂ¡y chá»§ sáº­p nguá»“n (`status === 'FAILED'`):
*   **Canvas khĂ³i bá»¥i:** Canvas lá»“ng phĂ­a sau card phun luá»“ng khĂ³i xĂ¡m cuá»“n cuá»™n 60 FPS.
*   **Váº­t lĂ½ khĂ³i:** Háº¡t khĂ³i sinh ra lan tá»a trĂ²n Ä‘á»u $\theta = \text{random}(0, 2\pi)$ co giĂ£n ná»Ÿ rá»™ng rá»“i nháº¡t mĂ u dáº§n:
    $$s = s_0 + \text{rate} \times t$$
    $$\text{alpha} = 1 - \frac{t}{\text{life}}$$
    *   *MĂ u khĂ³i:* `rgba(100, 100, 110, alpha)` xĂ¡m Ä‘en má» má».
# đŸŒ UX Flow & System Design Simulator Walkthroughs

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t cĂ¡c ká»‹ch báº£n tráº£i nghiá»‡m ngÆ°á»i dĂ¹ng (User Journeys) khi sinh viĂªn kĂ©o tháº£ thiáº¿t káº¿ máº¡ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n, báº¥m sáº­p nguá»“n mĂ¡y chá»§ vĂ  Ä‘iá»u chá»‰nh replication lag DB trĂªn **System Design & Distributed Architecture Visualizer**.

---

## đŸ“Œ Ká»CH Báº¢N 1: CĂ‚N Báº°NG Táº¢I TRĂ’N VĂ€ MĂ” PHá»NG Sáº¬P NGUá»’N (ROUND-ROBIN & FAILOVER)

### TĂ¬nh huá»‘ng: Há»c sinh gá»¡ lá»—i sáº­p nguá»“n Web Server, Load Balancer tá»± phá»¥c há»“i dĂ²ng háº¡t

```
[Há»c sinh kĂ©o tháº£ sÆ¡ Ä‘á»“ máº¡ng: 1 Client, 1 Load Balancer, 2 Web Server A vĂ  B]
[Há»c sinh báº¥m nĂºt [ Xáº¢ LÅ¨ Háº T NEON ] phĂ¡t lÆ°u lÆ°á»£ng HTTP Requests:]
        |
[CĂ¡c háº¡t Neon Green (Lá»¥c Emerald) phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng trĂ´i ná»•i dá»“n dáº­p báº¯n ra:]
  - Cháº¡y dá»c tá»« Client Ä‘áº¿n Load Balancer.
  - Load Balancer thá»±c thi Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n xoay vĂ²ng Round-Robin:
    + 5 háº¡t bay uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n ráº½ trĂ¡i sang Web Server A.
    + 5 háº¡t bay uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n ráº½ pháº£i sang Web Server B.
  - Sinh viĂªn reo lĂªn vĂ¬ tháº¥y dĂ²ng háº¡t chia Ä‘Ă´i hoĂ n háº£o cĂ¢n báº±ng!
        |
[Sinh viĂªn báº¥m nĂºt [ Sáº¬P NGUá»’N ] ngay trĂªn Web Server A:]
  - Tháº» Web Server A láº­p tá»©c Ä‘á»•i mĂ u Ä‘á» rá»±c chĂ³i, bá»c viá»n Ä‘á» phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng sá»¥p tá»‘i.
  - Canvas 2D phĂ­a sau phun háº¡t khĂ³i xĂ¡m cuá»“n cuá»™n bay nháº¹ tá»a trĂ²n sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng.
        |
[Load Balancer phĂ¡t hiá»‡n sá»± cá»‘ Web Server A sáº­p nguá»“n láº­p tá»©c dÆ°á»›i 5ms:]
  - TĂ¡i Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n chuyá»ƒn hÆ°á»›ng 100% dĂ²ng háº¡t Neon Ä‘ang bay dá»“n dáº­p ráº½ háº¿t sang Server B.
  - KhĂ´ng cĂ²n má»™t háº¡t Neon nĂ o bay lá»‡ch sang hÆ°á»›ng Server A bá»‹ sáº­p ná»¯a.
  - Minh há»a trá»±c quan tuyá»‡t má»¹ cho giáº£i phĂ¡p thiáº¿t káº¿ an toĂ n chá»‘ng chá»‹u lá»—i (Failover).
```

---

## đŸ“Œ Ká»CH Báº¢N 2: THá»¬ NGHIá»†M Äá»’NG Bá»˜ TRá»„ DB (REPLICATION LAG TIME TRIAL)

### TĂ¬nh huá»‘ng: Há»c sinh kiá»ƒm thá»­ lá»‡ch dá»¯ liá»‡u DB Primary sang Replica

```
[MĂ´ hĂ¬nh há»‡ thá»‘ng chá»©a: Web Server, Database Primary, Database Replica]
[Há»c sinh Ä‘iá»u chá»‰nh thanh kĂ©o cáº¥u hĂ¬nh trá»… Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ (Sync Delay) lĂªn má»©c: 2000ms]
        |
[Web Server báº¯n lá»‡nh ghi dá»¯ liá»‡u xuá»‘ng Database Primary:]
  - Má»™t háº¡t Neon vĂ ng rá»±c rá»¡ (DB Write packet) bay lÆ°á»›t tá»« Server rÆ¡i xuá»‘ng Primary DB.
  - Primary DB bá»«ng sĂ¡ng Neon vĂ ng tá»a nhiá»‡t bĂ¡o hiá»‡u: "ÄĂ£ ghi nháº­n dá»¯ liá»‡u má»›i!"
        |
[Háº¡t dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ náº±m Ä‘á»£i trong hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i Sync Queue Ä‘Ăºng 2000ms:]
  - Trong lĂºc chá», Database Replica váº«n tá»‘i Ä‘Ă¨n, chÆ°a cĂ³ dá»¯ liá»‡u má»›i (TĂ­nh lá»‡ch pha dá»¯ liá»‡u).
        |
[Äá»“ng há»“ Ä‘áº¿m ngÆ°á»£c háº¿t trá»… 2 giĂ¢y -> Háº¡t Neon vĂ ng báº¯n bay dá»c nĂ©t ná»‘i sang Replica DB:]
  - Replica DB bá»«ng sĂ¡ng rá»±c rá»¡ vĂ ng Neon.
  - Há»c viĂªn tháº¥u hiá»ƒu sĂ¢u sáº¯c: "Ă€! ÄĂ¢y chĂ­nh lĂ  replication lag gĂ¢y lá»‡ch dá»¯ liá»‡u trong thá»±c táº¿!"
```
 Tráº£i nghiá»‡m kĂ©o tháº£ thiáº¿t káº¿ máº¡ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n, xáº£ lÅ© mÆ°a háº¡t Neon rá»±c rá»¡ vĂ  chá»©ng kiáº¿n cáº£nh tÆ°á»£ng sáº­p nguá»“n bá»‘c khĂ³i Canvas 2D failover mang láº¡i sá»± tháº¥u hiá»ƒu kiáº¿n trĂºc há»‡ thá»‘ng trá»±c quan Ä‘á»‰nh cao, sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u nháº¥t.
# đŸ§  VCR Playback Engine & High-Res Scheduling Loop (TypeScript)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i phĂ¡t láº¡i giáº£i thuáº­t `VCRPlaybackEngine`, bá»™ láº­p lá»‹ch xung Ä‘á»“ng há»“ Ä‘á»™ phĂ¢n giáº£i cao vĂ  cĂ¡c ca kiá»ƒm thá»­ tá»± Ä‘á»™ng (Unit Tests) báº£o Ä‘áº£m tĂ­nh chĂ­nh xĂ¡c.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Láº­p Lá»‹ch Khung HĂ¬nh Tá»‘c Äá»™ Cao (TypeScript Core Logic)

MĂ£ nguá»“n lĂµi Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p báº±ng TypeScript cháº·t cháº½, tá»‘i Æ°u hĂ³a Ä‘áº­p nhá»‹p xung Ä‘á»“ng há»“ thá»±c táº¿:

```typescript
export type PlaybackStatus = 'PLAYING' | 'PAUSED' | 'STOPPED';

export interface PlaybackFrame {
  stepIndex: number;
  canvasStateSnapshot: any; // Cáº¥u trĂºc dá»¯ liá»‡u lÆ°u trá»¯
  lineNumber: number;
  description: string;
}

export class VCRPlaybackEngine {
  private frames: PlaybackFrame[] = [];
  private currentStepIndex = 0;
  private status: PlaybackStatus = 'PAUSED';
  private playbackSpeed = 1.0; // Há»‡ sá»‘ tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ (0.1x -> 5.0x)
  
  private lastTickTime = 0;
  private animationFrameId: number | null = null;
  private onStepCallback: (frame: PlaybackFrame) => void;

  constructor(onStep: (frame: PlaybackFrame) => void) {
    this.onStepCallback = onStep;
  }

  public setFrames(frames: PlaybackFrame[]): void {
    this.frames = frames;
    this.currentStepIndex = 0;
  }

  public play(): void {
    if (this.status === 'PLAYING') return;
    this.status = 'PLAYING';
    this.lastTickTime = performance.now();
    this.loop();
  }

  public pause(): void {
    this.status = 'PAUSED';
    if (this.animationFrameId !== null) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrameId);
      this.animationFrameId = null;
    }
  }

  public setSpeed(speed: number): void {
    this.playbackSpeed = speed;
  }

  public seekToStep(index: number): PlaybackFrame | null {
    if (index < 0 || index >= this.frames.length) return null;
    this.currentStepIndex = index;
    const frame = this.frames[index];
    this.onStepCallback(frame);
    return frame;
  }

  private loop = (): void => {
    if (this.status !== 'PLAYING') return;

    const now = performance.now();
    const elapsed = now - this.lastTickTime;
    const stepInterval = 1000 / this.playbackSpeed; // Máº·c Ä‘á»‹nh 1 giĂ¢y/bÆ°á»›c á»Ÿ tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ 1.0x

    if (elapsed >= stepInterval) {
      this.nextStep();
      this.lastTickTime = now;
    }

    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);
  };

  private nextStep(): void {
    if (this.currentStepIndex < this.frames.length - 1) {
      this.currentStepIndex++;
      this.onStepCallback(this.frames[this.currentStepIndex]);
    } else {
      this.pause(); // Káº¿t thĂºc
    }
  }

  public stepBack(): PlaybackFrame | null {
    if (this.currentStepIndex > 0) {
      this.currentStepIndex--;
      const frame = this.frames[this.currentStepIndex];
      this.onStepCallback(frame);
      return frame;
    }
    return null;
  }

  public stepForward(): PlaybackFrame | null {
    if (this.currentStepIndex < this.frames.length - 1) {
      this.currentStepIndex++;
      const frame = this.frames[this.currentStepIndex];
      this.onStepCallback(frame);
      return frame;
    }
    return null;
  }

  public getCurrentStep(): number {
    return this.currentStepIndex;
  }

  public getStatus(): PlaybackStatus {
    return this.status;
  }

  public destroy(): void {
    this.pause();
    this.frames = [];
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Kiá»ƒm thá»­ TĂ­ch há»£p ÄÆ¡n vá»‹ (Unit Test Specs)

ChĂºng ta xĂ¢y dá»±ng bá»™ unit tests xĂ¡c thá»±c lĂ¹i bÆ°á»›c, tiáº¿n bÆ°á»›c, tua quĂ©t seek step vĂ  dá»«ng phĂ¡t chuáº©n xĂ¡c:

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import { VCRPlaybackEngine, PlaybackFrame } from './VCRPlaybackEngine';

describe('VCR Playback Engine Unit Tests', () => {
  let engine: VCRPlaybackEngine;
  let mockCallback: any;
  let mockFrames: PlaybackFrame[];

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockCallback = vi.fn();
    engine = new VCRPlaybackEngine(mockCallback);

    mockFrames = [
      { stepIndex: 0, canvasStateSnapshot: { data: [1, 2] }, lineNumber: 10, description: 'Khá»Ÿi táº¡o máº£ng' },
      { stepIndex: 1, canvasStateSnapshot: { data: [2, 1] }, lineNumber: 12, description: 'HoĂ¡n vá»‹ 1-2' },
      { stepIndex: 2, canvasStateSnapshot: { data: [2, 1] }, lineNumber: 15, description: 'HoĂ n thĂ nh' }
    ];

    engine.setFrames(mockFrames);
  });

  it('Should seek to step index correctly and trigger snapshot callbacks', () => {
    const frame = engine.seekToStep(1);

    expect(frame?.stepIndex).toBe(1);
    expect(frame?.lineNumber).toBe(12);
    expect(engine.getCurrentStep()).toBe(1);
    expect(mockCallback).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
    expect(mockCallback).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockFrames[1]);
  });

  it('Should successfully step forward and step backward with bounding clamps', () => {
    // Äang á»Ÿ bÆ°á»›c 0 -> Tiáº¿n 1 bÆ°á»›c -> BÆ°á»›c 1
    let frame = engine.stepForward();
    expect(frame?.stepIndex).toBe(1);
    expect(engine.getCurrentStep()).toBe(1);

    // Tiáº¿n thĂªm 1 bÆ°á»›c -> BÆ°á»›c 2
    frame = engine.stepForward();
    expect(frame?.stepIndex).toBe(2);

    // Äáº¡t giá»›i háº¡n tiáº¿n -> KhĂ´ng thá»ƒ tiáº¿n thĂªm
    frame = engine.stepForward();
    expect(frame).toBeNull();
    expect(engine.getCurrentStep()).toBe(2);

    // LĂ¹i 1 bÆ°á»›c -> KhĂ´i phá»¥c bÆ°á»›c 1
    frame = engine.stepBack();
    expect(frame?.stepIndex).toBe(1);
    expect(engine.getCurrentStep()).toBe(1);
  });

  it('Should correctly set and change playback speed dynamic modifiers', () => {
    engine.setSpeed(2.0);
    // VĂ²ng láº·p Ä‘áº­p nhá»‹p interval sáº½ tá»± Ä‘á»™ng rĂºt ngáº¯n cĂ²n 500ms thay vĂ¬ 1000ms
    expect(engine['playbackSpeed']).toBe(2.0);
  });
});
```
 Háº¡t nhĂ¢n VCRPlaybackEngine quáº£n lĂ½ phĂ¡t giáº£i thuáº­t áº£o bĂ¡m sĂ¡t xung nhá»‹p thá»±c táº¿ káº¿t há»£p cĂ¡c ca unit test nghiĂªm ngáº·t báº£o Ä‘áº£m tua Ä‘i lĂ¹i bÆ°á»›c vĂ  kĂ©o scrubber luĂ´n chuáº©n chá»‰, nháº¡y bĂ©n tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i.
# đŸ¨ UI & UX Specifications - VCR Panels & Neon Progress Tracks

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ CSS cá»§a cá»¥m phĂ­m Ä‘iá»u hÆ°á»›ng VCR má» kĂ­nh Glassmorphic, thanh trÆ°á»£t Scrubber Neon Cyan phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng vĂ  háº¡t indicator bĂ¡m chuá»™t.

---

## 1. Cá»¥m PhĂ­m Äiá»u HÆ°á»›ng VCR KĂ­nh Má» (VCR Panel UI)

Thiáº¿t káº¿ thanh Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn VCR náº±m ngang, táº¡o cáº£m giĂ¡c sang trá»ng bĂ³ng báº©y vĂ  nháº¡y bĂ©n xĂºc giĂ¡c:

```css
.vcr-controller-panel {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.45); /* Slate 900 kĂ­nh má» */
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  border-radius: 9999px; /* Bo trĂ²n kĂ©n nhá»™ng */
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
  width: fit-content;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

/* CĂ¡c nĂºt báº¥m xĂºc giĂ¡c VCR */
.vcr-button {
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  color: #94A3B8; /* Slate 400 */
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.vcr-button:hover {
  color: #06B6D4; /* Cyan rá»±c rá»¡ */
  background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.1);
  transform: scale(1.12);
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
}

.vcr-button:active {
  transform: scale(0.92);
}
```

---

## 2. Thanh trÆ°á»£t Scrubber Neon vĂ  Indicator QuĂ©t (Scrubber UI)

```css
/* ÄÆ°á»ng cháº¡y trÆ°á»£t má»ng cá»§a Scrubber */
.vcr-scrubber-track {
  width: 100%;
  height: 6px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  border-radius: 3px;
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: height 0.2s ease;
}

.vcr-scrubber-track:hover {
  height: 8px; /* DĂ y ra má»™t chĂºt khi hover Ä‘á»ƒ dá»… thao tĂ¡c */
}

/* Tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh Ä‘Ă£ phĂ¡t qua (Neon Filled Progress) */
.vcr-scrubber-filled {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0891B2, #06B6D4); /* Dáº£i Cyan phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng */
  border-radius: 3px;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.6);
}

/* Háº¡t indicator trĂ²n lÆ¡ lá»­ng bĂ¡m quĂ©t ngĂ³n tay (Scrubber Indicator Knob) */
.vcr-scrubber-knob {
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: #FFFFFF;
  border: 3px solid #06B6D4; /* Cyan */
  border-radius: 50%;
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  cursor: grab;
  box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.8);
  transition: transform 0.1s ease, box-shadow 0.1s ease;
}

.vcr-scrubber-knob:active {
  cursor: grabbing;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.3); /* Phá»“ng to khi Ä‘ang miáº¿t quĂ©t */
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.95);
}
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ cá»¥m phĂ­m kĂ©n nhá»™ng VCR má» kĂ­nh tinh xáº£o káº¿t há»£p Ä‘Æ°á»ng trÆ°á»£t Scrubber Neon Cyan vĂ  háº¡t indicator phá»“ng to lÆ¡ lá»­ng khi miáº¿t kĂ©o mang láº¡i cho ngÆ°á»i há»c cáº£m giĂ¡c gá»¡ lá»—i cá»±c Ä‘á»‰nh, sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u nhÆ° Ä‘ang lĂ m chá»§ cuá»‘n phim Ä‘iá»‡n áº£nh giáº£i thuáº­t.
# đŸ—„ï¸ State Management - useVCRTimelineStore (Pinia Vue 3)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a Pinia Setup Store **useVCRTimelineStore** chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m quáº£n lĂ½ dĂ²ng thá»i gian giáº£i thuáº­t, lÆ°u trá»¯ cĂ¡c khung hĂ¬nh Caching Snapshot dÆ°á»›i RAM Client vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ nháº£y dĂ²ng Monaco.

---

## 1. Cáº¥u trĂºc Giao diá»‡n MĂ£ Store (`useVCRTimelineStore.ts`)

MĂ£ nguá»“n store Ä‘Æ°á»£c viáº¿t theo cáº¥u hĂ¬nh setup store tá»‘i Æ°u, tĂ­ch há»£p Ä‘á»“ng há»“ VCRPlaybackEngine:

```typescript
import { defineStore } from 'pinia';
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { VCRPlaybackEngine, PlaybackFrame, PlaybackStatus } from '../utils/VCRPlaybackEngine';

export const useVCRTimelineStore = defineStore('vcrTimeline', () => {
  // ==========================================
  // STATE (Tráº¡ng thĂ¡i dĂ²ng thá»i gian)
  // ==========================================
  const currentStep = ref<number>(0);
  const totalSteps = ref<number>(0);
  const playbackSpeed = ref<number>(1.0);
  const status = ref<PlaybackStatus>('PAUSED');
  const currentDescription = ref<string>('Khá»Ÿi táº¡o giáº£i thuáº­t');

  let engine: VCRPlaybackEngine | null = null;

  // ==========================================
  // ACTIONS (HĂ nh Ä‘á»™ng Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn VCR)
  // ==========================================

  /**
   * Khá»Ÿi táº¡o náº¡p danh sĂ¡ch snapshot máº£ng/cĂ¢y giáº£i thuáº­t
   */
  function initializeFrames(frames: PlaybackFrame[]) {
    if (engine) {
      engine.destroy();
    }

    totalSteps.value = frames.length;
    currentStep.value = 0;
    status.value = 'PAUSED';

    // Táº¡o má»›i Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ mĂ¡y láº­p lá»‹ch vĂ  láº¯ng nghe callback Ä‘á»•i bÆ°á»›c
    engine = new VCRPlaybackEngine((frame) => {
      currentStep.value = frame.stepIndex;
      currentDescription.value = frame.description;
      
      // Báº¯n sá»± kiá»‡n nháº£y dĂ²ng Monaco Editor Client-side cá»±c nhanh
      triggerMonacoLineSync(frame.lineNumber);
      
      // Báº¯n sá»± kiá»‡n cáº­p nháº­t hĂ¬nh váº½ Canvas Ä‘á»“ há»a
      triggerCanvasStateUpdate(frame.canvasStateSnapshot);
    });

    engine.setFrames(frames);
    engine.seekToStep(0); // Vá» Ä‘áº§u
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¡t giáº£i thuáº­t (Play)
   */
  function play() {
    if (engine) {
      engine.play();
      status.value = engine.getStatus();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Táº¡m dá»«ng phĂ¡t (Pause)
   */
  function pause() {
    if (engine) {
      engine.pause();
      status.value = engine.getStatus();
    }
  }

  /**
   * LĂ¹i láº¡i má»™t bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t
   */
  function stepBack() {
    if (engine) {
      engine.stepBack();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Tiáº¿n lĂªn má»™t bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t
   */
  function stepForward() {
    if (engine) {
      engine.stepForward();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Tua quĂ©t nhanh Ä‘áº¿n chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c K (Scrubbing Seek)
   */
  function seekTo(stepIndex: number) {
    if (engine) {
      engine.seekToStep(stepIndex);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Thay Ä‘á»•i há»‡ sá»‘ nhĂ¢n tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ phĂ¡t (0.1x -> 5x)
   */
  function changeSpeed(speed: number) {
    playbackSpeed.value = speed;
    if (engine) {
      engine.setSpeed(speed);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Dá»n dáº¹p thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM vĂ  GC sáº¡ch sáº½
   */
  function clearTimeline() {
    if (engine) {
      engine.destroy();
      engine = null;
    }
    currentStep.value = 0;
    totalSteps.value = 0;
    playbackSpeed.value = 1.0;
    status.value = 'PAUSED';
    currentDescription.value = 'Giáº£i phĂ³ng tĂ i nguyĂªn';
  }

  // ==========================================
  // UTILS (Bá»• trá»£ ná»™i bá»™)
  // ==========================================
  function triggerMonacoLineSync(lineNumber: number) {
    const syncEvent = new CustomEvent('MONACO_REVEAL_LINE_INSIGHT', {
      detail: { lineNumber }
    });
    window.dispatchEvent(syncEvent);
  }

  function triggerCanvasStateUpdate(snapshot: any) {
    const syncEvent = new CustomEvent('CANVAS_REDRAW_STATE_SNAPSHOT', {
      detail: { snapshot }
    });
    window.dispatchEvent(syncEvent);
  }

  return {
    currentStep,
    totalSteps,
    playbackSpeed,
    status,
    currentDescription,
    initializeFrames,
    play,
    pause,
    stepBack,
    stepForward,
    seekTo,
    changeSpeed,
    clearTimeline
  };
});
```

---

## 2. Æ¯u Ä‘iá»ƒm VÆ°á»£t trá»™i cá»§a Thiáº¿t káº¿ Äá»“ há»a Reactive Pinia Store

Báº±ng viá»‡c káº¿t há»£p Pinia Setup Store vá»›i Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ `VCRPlaybackEngine` giáº£i quyáº¿t tua quĂ©t nhanh Scrubber bĂ¡m tay 60 FPS:
*   **Reconcile Canvas cá»±c nháº¡y:** Tua lĂ¹i tiáº¿n bÆ°á»›c bĂ¡m sĂ¡t chá»‰ sá»‘ cache RAM Client pháº£n há»“i dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.
*   **Chá»‘ng rĂ² rá»‰ RAM GC Ä‘á»‰nh cao:** PhÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c `.clearTimeline()` há»§y hoĂ n toĂ n requestAnimationFrame vĂ  dá»n dáº¹p cĂ¡c máº£ng snapshot lá»›n tá»©c kháº¯c khi Ä‘á»•i trang, mĂ¡t láº¡nh mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch.
# â™ï¸ Infrastructure & Monaco Line Syncer Coordinator (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t giáº£i phĂ¡p háº¡ táº§ng bá»™ xung nhá»‹p Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ Monaco Editor (`MonacoLineSyncerCoordinator`) vĂ  cÆ¡ cháº¿ quáº£n lĂ½ thu há»“i RAM an toĂ n chá»‘ng rĂ² rá»‰ khi gá»¡ lá»—i.

---

## 1. Bá»™ MĂ¡y Äá»“ng Bá»™ Monaco Editor (MonacoLineSyncerCoordinator)

Khi há»c sinh cháº¡y giáº£i thuáº­t tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c hoáº·c kĂ©o miáº¿t thanh trÆ°á»£t Scrubber dĂ²ng thá»i gian, Monaco Editor cáº§n nháº£y con trá» vĂ  tĂ´ sĂ¡ng dĂ²ng code tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng thá»i gian thá»±c cá»±c ká»³ nhanh nháº¡y. ChĂºng ta thiáº¿t láº­p háº¡ táº§ng Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i sá»± kiá»‡n:

```typescript
export class MonacoLineSyncerCoordinator {
  private static activeDecorationIds: string[] = [];

  /**
   * Äá»“ng bá»™ cuá»™n vĂ  tĂ´ sĂ¡ng dĂ²ng code trong Monaco Editor cá»±c nhanh dÆ°á»›i 10ms
   * @param editor Thá»±c thá»ƒ Monaco Editor
   * @param lineNumber Sá»‘ dĂ²ng code cáº§n nháº£y Ä‘áº¿n
   */
  public static syncCodeLine(editor: any, lineNumber: number): void {
    if (!editor) return;

    // Cuá»™n dĂ²ng code vá» trung tĂ¢m mĂ n hĂ¬nh mÆ°á»£t mĂ 
    editor.revealLineInCenter(lineNumber, 0); // 0 = ScrollType.Smooth

    // Thiáº¿t láº­p lá»›p CSS Ä‘á»ƒ tĂ´ sĂ¡ng viá»n vĂ ng rá»±c cho dĂ²ng code Ä‘ang cháº¡y
    const newDecorations = [
      {
        range: {
          startLineNumber: lineNumber,
          startColumn: 1,
          endLineNumber: lineNumber,
          endColumn: 1
        },
        options: {
          isWholeLine: true,
          className: 'monaco-vcr-active-line-glow', // TĂªn lá»›p CSS phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng Cyan viá»n trĂ¡i
          marginClassName: 'monaco-vcr-active-line-margin'
        }
      }
    ];

    // Cáº­p nháº­t Ä‘Ă¨ decoration cÅ© trĂ¡nh rĂ¡c chá»“ng chĂ©o
    this.activeDecorationIds = editor.deltaDecorations(
      this.activeDecorationIds,
      newDecorations
    );
  }

  /**
   * Giáº£i phĂ³ng thu há»“i tĂ i nguyĂªn trang trĂ­ dá»n dáº¹p bá»™ nhá»› RAM GC
   */
  public static clearDecorations(editor: any): void {
    if (editor && this.activeDecorationIds.length > 0) {
      editor.deltaDecorations(this.activeDecorationIds, []);
      this.activeDecorationIds = [];
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Giáº£i phĂ¡p thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM & GC Memory Leak Prevent

*   **Chá»‘ng rĂ² rá»‰ bá»™ nhá»› Decorations:**
    *   Háº¡ táº§ng trang trĂ­ dĂ²ng code `deltaDecorations` báº¯t buá»™c pháº£i Ä‘Æ°á»£c dá»n dáº¹p báº±ng phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c `clearDecorations()` ngay khi há»c viĂªn Ä‘Ă³ng phĂ²ng há»c trá»±c quan giáº£i thuáº­t hoáº·c biĂªn dá»‹ch code má»›i.
    *   *Má»¥c Ä‘Ă­ch:* TrĂ¡nh lÆ°u rĂ¡c cĂ¡c ID máº£ng trang trĂ­ cÅ© gĂ¢y náº·ng ná» RAM trĂ¬nh duyá»‡t.
# đŸ”Œ VCR Playback API Specifications & JSON Schemas (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t cáº¥u trĂºc JSON Schema Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng mĂ´ táº£ cĂ¡c khung hĂ¬nh dĂ²ng thá»i gian giáº£i thuáº­t `PlaybackFrame` vĂ  mĂ´ hĂ¬nh thiáº¿t láº­p DTO C# ASP.NET Core náº¡p chuá»—i phim hoáº¡t áº£nh tá»« mĂ¡y chá»§.

---

## 1. Báº£n Ä‘áº·c táº£ JSON Schema Cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Playback Frames (PlaybackFrame Schema)

SiĂªu dá»¯ liá»‡u mĂ´ táº£ danh sĂ¡ch cĂ¡c bÆ°á»›c hoáº¡t áº£nh cá»§a dĂ²ng thá»i gian gá»¡ lá»—i Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng nghiĂªm ngáº·t theo JSON Schema dÆ°á»›i Ä‘Ă¢y:

```json
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "title": "VCRPlaybackFrameList",
  "type": "OBJECT",
  "properties": {
    "algorithmId": {
      "type": "STRING"
    },
    "totalSteps": {
      "type": "INTEGER",
      "minimum": 1
    },
    "frames": {
      "type": "ARRAY",
      "items": {
        "type": "OBJECT",
        "properties": {
          "stepIndex": {
            "type": "INTEGER",
            "minimum": 0
          },
          "lineNumber": {
            "type": "INTEGER",
            "minimum": 1
          },
          "description": {
            "type": "STRING"
          },
          "canvasStateSnapshot": {
            "type": "OBJECT"
          }
        },
        "required": ["stepIndex", "lineNumber", "description", "canvasStateSnapshot"]
      }
    }
  },
  "required": ["algorithmId", "totalSteps", "frames"]
}
```

---

## 2. MĂ´ hĂ¬nh tiáº¿p nháº­n DTO C# á»Ÿ Backend ASP.NET Core (.NET Core)

Lá»›p DTO chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m náº¡p trá»n bá»™ phim hoáº¡t áº£nh giáº£i thuáº­t tá»« mĂ¡y chá»§ C# ASP.NET Core:

```csharp
using System;
```

## 1. Kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t Ranh giá»›i Chá»‰ sá»‘ Frame DĂ²ng thá»i gian (Index Bounds Clamping)

Äá»ƒ Ä‘áº£m báº£o Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ mĂ¡y láº­p lá»‹ch khĂ´ng bao giá» bá»‹ trÆ°á»£t chá»‰ sá»‘ vÆ°á»£t biĂªn dáº«n Ä‘áº¿n vá»¡ mĂ n hĂ¬nh hoáº·c lá»—i Null Reference:
*   **RĂ ng buá»™c chá»‰ sá»‘ cháº·t cháº½ (Index Clamping Constraints):**
    *   Má»i truy xuáº¥t Ä‘á»•i bÆ°á»›c thĂ´ng qua lĂ¹i bÆ°á»›c, tiáº¿n bÆ°á»›c hay kĂ©o tháº£ Scrubber Ä‘á»u pháº£i Ä‘i qua bá»™ lá»c Clamping:
        $$\text{StepIndex}_{\text{valid}} = \text{Clamp}(\text{Index}, 0, \text{totalSteps} - 1)$$
    *   Náº¿u há»c sinh click phĂ­m [ TIáº¾N 1 BÆ¯á»C ] khi Ä‘Ă£ á»Ÿ bÆ°á»›c cuá»‘i cĂ¹ng, há»‡ thá»‘ng tá»± Ä‘á»™ng khĂ³a phĂ­m báº¥m (Disabled style) vĂ  dá»«ng phĂ¡t láº¡i VCR (PAUSED).
    *   Náº¿u há»c sinh click phĂ­m [ LĂ™I 1 BÆ¯á»C ] khi Ä‘ang á»Ÿ bÆ°á»›c 0, há»‡ thá»‘ng tá»± Ä‘á»™ng khĂ³a phĂ­m lĂ¹i vĂ  khĂ´ng thá»±c hiá»‡n thĂªm hĂ nh Ä‘á»™ng nĂ o.

## 2. RĂ ng buá»™c Pháº¡m vi Äiá»u cháº¿ Tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ phĂ¡t (Speed Modulation Ranges)

## 1. Architectural Decision Records (ADR)

Äá»ƒ tua ngÆ°á»£c vá» bÆ°á»›c cÅ©, náº¿u khĂ´ng cĂ³ cÆ¡ cháº¿ lÆ°u giá»¯ tráº¡ng thĂ¡i, há»‡ thá»‘ng báº¯t buá»™c pháº£i tĂ­nh toĂ¡n biĂªn dá»‹ch láº¡i giáº£i thuáº­t tá»« bÆ°á»›c 0 cháº¡y dá»“n lĂªn bÆ°á»›c Ä‘Ă³, gĂ¢y giáº­t lag cá»±c náº·ng (LĂªn tá»›i 500ms trá»… pháº£n há»“i).
*   *Ngháº½n bÄƒng thĂ´ng API:* Náº¿u má»—i láº§n tua ngÆ°á»£c hoáº·c kĂ©o scrubber Ä‘á»u gá»­i request API vá» mĂ¡y chá»§ Ä‘á»ƒ láº¥y láº¡i tráº¡ng thĂ¡i váº½ máº£ng/cĂ¢y, mĂ¡y chá»§ sáº½ sáº­p táº£i khi cĂ³ hĂ ng ngĂ n há»c sinh cĂ¹ng xáº£ quĂ©t dá»“n dáº­p.

#### Quyáº¿t Ä‘á»‹nh (Decision)

Khi sinh viĂªn tua Ä‘i tua láº¡i hoáº·c kĂ©o scrubber, há»‡ thá»‘ng chá»‰ viá»‡c bá»‘c dá»¯ liá»‡u snapshot á»©ng vá»›i chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c Ä‘áº¯p tháº³ng vĂ o Vue reactive state cá»±c ká»³ nhanh gá»n:
1.  **Client-side Memory Cache:** ÄĂ³ng gĂ³i toĂ n bá»™ biáº¿n cá»¥c bá»™, Ä‘á»‹a chá»‰ Heap con trá» vĂ  danh sĂ¡ch máº£ng áº£o cá»§a tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c thĂ nh cáº¥u trĂºc JSON pháº³ng siĂªu nháº¹ (Má»—i bÆ°á»›c náº·ng khoáº£ng **2KB**).

#### Káº¿t quáº£ (Consequences)

# đŸ€ Product Requirements Document (PRD) - VCR Timeline & Playback (Phase 2)

## 1. Tá»•ng quan Nghiá»‡p vá»¥ (Overview)

## 2. Má»¥c tiĂªu Nghiá»‡p vá»¥ (Goals)

## 3. CĂ¡c TĂ­nh nÄƒng trong Pháº¡m vi MVP (Phase 2 MVP Scope)

### 3.1. Glassmorphic VCR Controller Panel

### 3.2. Dynamic Scrubber Slider Track (Thanh trÆ°á»£t Scrubber)
*   Thanh trÆ°á»£t má»ng phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng Neon Cyan, cĂ³ háº¡t trĂ²n indicator quĂ©t phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng dá»‹u nháº¹ bĂ¡m Ä‘uá»•i ngĂ³n tay.

## 6. QUYáº¾T Äá»NH KIáº¾N TRĂC & CACHING RECONCILIATION (ADR)

*   **LĂ½ do:**

## 7. Káº¾ HOáº CH TRIá»‚N KHAI & TIĂU CHĂ NGHIá»†M THU (DoD)

### 8.2. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)

*   Thao tĂ¡c kĂ©o miáº¿t trÆ°á»£t thanh Scrubber cáº­p nháº­t hĂ¬nh áº£nh máº£ng/cĂ¢y trĂªn Canvas mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS khĂ´ng cĂ³ Ä‘á»™ trá»… cáº£m nháº­n Ä‘Æ°á»£c.

*   Há»§y bá» 100% listeners vĂ  vĂ²ng láº·p hoáº¡t áº£nh `requestAnimationFrame` khi unmount trĂ¡nh trĂ n bá»™ nhá»› RAM mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch.
*   Äáº§y Ä‘á»§ mĂ£ nguá»“n gá»¡ lá»—i vĂ  Unit tests bao phá»§ 100% logic VCR Engine.
# đŸ›  Technical Specification - VCR Playback Engine & High-Res Scheduler

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t kiáº¿n trĂºc háº¡t nhĂ¢n cá»§a bá»™ láº­p lá»‹ch Ä‘áº­p nhá»‹p **VCRPlaybackEngine**, giáº£i thuáº­t hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i bá»™ nhá»› Ä‘á»‡m Caching Snapshot vĂ  thuáº­t toĂ¡n tĂ­nh toĂ¡n vá»‹ trĂ­ Scrubber co giĂ£n.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Láº­p Lá»‹ch Xung Nhá»‹p Äá»™ PhĂ¢n Giáº£i Cao (VCRPlaybackEngine TS)

Háº¡t nhĂ¢n Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i dĂ²ng thá»i gian Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p báº±ng TypeScript cháº·t cháº½, sá»­ dá»¥ng `requestAnimationFrame` vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng há»“ sai sá»‘ cá»±c tháº¥p `performance.now()`:

```typescript
export type PlaybackStatus = 'PLAYING' | 'PAUSED' | 'STOPPED';

export interface PlaybackFrame {
  stepIndex: number;
  canvasStateSnapshot: any; // Cáº¥u trĂºc máº£ng/cĂ¢y lÆ°u trá»¯
  lineNumber: number;
  description: string;
}

export class VCRPlaybackEngine {
  private frames: PlaybackFrame[] = [];
  private currentStepIndex = 0;
  private status: PlaybackStatus = 'PAUSED';
  private playbackSpeed = 1.0; // Há»‡ sá»‘ nhĂ¢n tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ (0.1x -> 5.0x)
  
  private lastTickTime = 0;
  private animationFrameId: number | null = null;
  private onStepCallback: (frame: PlaybackFrame) => void;

  constructor(onStep: (frame: PlaybackFrame) => void) {
    this.onStepCallback = onStep;
  }

  public setFrames(frames: PlaybackFrame[]): void {
    this.frames = frames;
    this.currentStepIndex = 0;
  }

  public play(): void {
    if (this.status === 'PLAYING') return;
    this.status = 'PLAYING';
    this.lastTickTime = performance.now();
    this.loop();
  }

  public pause(): void {
    this.status = 'PAUSED';
    if (this.animationFrameId !== null) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrameId);
      this.animationFrameId = null;
    }
  }

  public setSpeed(speed: number): void {
    this.playbackSpeed = speed;
  }

  public seekToStep(index: number): PlaybackFrame | null {
    if (index < 0 || index >= this.frames.length) return null;
    this.currentStepIndex = index;
    const frame = this.frames[index];
    this.onStepCallback(frame);
    return frame;
  }

  private loop = (): void => {
    if (this.status !== 'PLAYING') return;

    const now = performance.now();
    const elapsed = now - this.lastTickTime;
    const stepInterval = 1000 / this.playbackSpeed; // Máº·c Ä‘á»‹nh 1 giĂ¢y/bÆ°á»›c á»Ÿ tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ 1.0x

    if (elapsed >= stepInterval) {
      this.nextStep();
      this.lastTickTime = now;
    }

    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);
  };

  private nextStep(): void {
    if (this.currentStepIndex < this.frames.length - 1) {
      this.currentStepIndex++;
      this.onStepCallback(this.frames[this.currentStepIndex]);
    } else {
      this.pause(); // Káº¿t thĂºc phim giáº£i thuáº­t
    }
  }

  public stepBack(): PlaybackFrame | null {
    if (this.currentStepIndex > 0) {
      this.currentStepIndex--;
      const frame = this.frames[this.currentStepIndex];
      this.onStepCallback(frame);
      return frame;
    }
    return null;
  }

  public stepForward(): PlaybackFrame | null {
    if (this.currentStepIndex < this.frames.length - 1) {
      this.currentStepIndex++;
      const frame = this.frames[this.currentStepIndex];
      this.onStepCallback(frame);
      return frame;
    }
    return null;
  }

  public destroy(): void {
    this.pause();
    this.frames = [];
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Thuáº­t toĂ¡n Caching Snapshot vĂ  TĂ¡i thiáº¿t láº­p Tráº¡ng thĂ¡i (State Reconciliation)

Há»‡ thá»‘ng lÆ°u giá»¯ toĂ n bá»™ snapshot máº£ng/cĂ¢y áº£o cá»§a tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t vĂ o má»™t `PlaybackFrame[]` dÆ°á»›i RAM Client-side:
*   **QuĂ©t Scrubber:** Khi sinh viĂªn kĂ©o scrubber sang bÆ°á»›c $K$:
    $$\text{Seek}(K) \implies \text{Store.canvasSnapshot} = \text{frames}[K].\text{canvasStateSnapshot}$$
    *   *Thá»i gian pháº£n há»“i:* Truy váº¥n chá»‰ sá»‘ máº£ng dÆ°á»›i **0.1ms**, cáº­p nháº­t DOM Vue pháº£n há»“i dÆ°á»›i **5ms**, cam káº¿t Ä‘á»™ mÆ°á»£t mĂ  tá»‘i cao.

---

## 3. CĂ´ng thá»©c Ä‘á»‹nh vá»‹ chá»‰ sá»‘ thanh trÆ°á»£t Scrubber (Scrubber Math)

Khi con chuá»™t kĂ©o trÆ°á»£t trĂªn thanh trÆ°á»£t cĂ³ chiá»u rá»™ng thá»±c táº¿ $W$ (pixel):
*   Tá»a Ä‘á»™ X tÆ°Æ¡ng Ä‘á»‘i cá»§a con chuá»™t: $X_{\text{rel}} = X_{\text{mouse}} - \text{getBoundingClientRect().left}$
*   Tá»· lá»‡ pháº§n trÄƒm tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh:
    $$\text{percent} = \text{Clamp}\left(\frac{X_{\text{rel}}}{W}, 0.0, 1.0\right)$$
*   Chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng:
    $$\text{StepIndex} = \text{Round}\left(\text{percent} \times (\text{totalSteps} - 1)\right)$$
*   *HĂ nh vi Clamping:* RĂ ng buá»™c cháº·t cháº½ giĂ¡ trá»‹ trong khoáº£ng $[0, \text{totalSteps} - 1]$ ngÄƒn lá»—i chá»‰ sá»‘ vÆ°á»£t biĂªn.
# đŸŒ UX Flow & VCR Debugger Interaction Walkthroughs

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t cĂ¡c ká»‹ch báº£n tráº£i nghiá»‡m ngÆ°á»i dĂ¹ng (User Journeys) khi sinh viĂªn gá»¡ lá»—i tá»«ng bÆ°á»›c thuáº­t toĂ¡n, kĂ©o miáº¿t thanh trÆ°á»£t Scrubber vĂ  Ä‘iá»u cháº¿ tá»‘c Ä‘á»™ phĂ¡t trĂªn **VCR Timeline & Playback Controller**.

---

 Tráº£i nghiá»‡m phĂ­m Ä‘iá»u hÆ°á»›ng VCR má» kĂ­nh tinh xáº£o káº¿t há»£p Ä‘Æ°á»ng trÆ°á»£t Scrubber Neon vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ nháº£y dĂ²ng lá»‡nh Monaco mang láº¡i cho sinh viĂªn cáº£m xĂºc gá»¡ lá»—i tá»‘i cao, tháº¥u hiá»ƒu tÆ°á»ng táº­n má»i ngĂ³c ngĂ¡ch cá»§a cáº¥u trĂºc dá»¯ liá»‡u vĂ  giáº£i thuáº­t.
# đŸ§  Core Animation Engine & Compiler Step Executor Design (Phase 1)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ ká»¹ thuáº­t cá»§a Äá»™ng cÆ¡ hoáº¡t áº£nh **Core Animation Engine**, TrĂ¬nh biĂªn dá»‹ch mĂ£ nguá»“n sinh cĂ¢y AST **Compiler Step Executor** vĂ  bá»™ láº­p lá»‹ch xung Ä‘á»“ng há»“ VCR dĂ²ng thá»i gian cá»§a Phase 1.

---

## 1. Äá»™ng CÆ¡ Hoáº¡t áº¢nh Äá»“ng Bá»™ Nhá»‹p FPS (Core Animation Engine)

Äá»™ng cÆ¡ hoáº¡t áº£nh chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m váº½ cĂ¡c chuyá»ƒn Ä‘á»™ng hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng, cĂ¢n báº±ng cĂ¢y xoay vĂ  truyá»n luá»“ng tin máº¡ng bĂ¡m sĂ¡t táº§n sá»‘ quĂ©t mĂ n hĂ¬nh 60 FPS:

```typescript
export interface Point2D {
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

export class CoreAnimationEngine {
  private animationFrameId: number | null = null;
  private isRunning = false;
  private renderCallbacks: Array<(deltaTime: number) => void> = [];
  private lastTimestamp = 0;

  public registerRender(callback: (deltaTime: number) => void): void {
    this.renderCallbacks.push(callback);
    if (!this.isRunning) {
      this.startLoop();
    }
  }

  private startLoop(): void {
    this.isRunning = true;
    this.lastTimestamp = performance.now();
    this.loop();
  }

  private loop = (timestamp: number = performance.now()): void => {
    if (!this.isRunning) return;

    const deltaTime = timestamp - this.lastTimestamp;
    this.lastTimestamp = timestamp;

    // Giá»›i háº¡n deltaTime trĂ¡nh giáº­t lag khi chuyá»ƒn tab (Time clamping spike protection)
    const clampedDelta = Math.min(deltaTime, 32); 

    this.renderCallbacks.forEach(cb => cb(clampedDelta));

    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);
  };

  /**
   * PhĂ©p ná»™i suy Vector má»‹n mĂ ng (Linear Interpolation - Lerp Math)
   */
  public static lerp(start: number, end: number, t: number): number {
    return start + (end - start) * t;
  }

  public static lerpPoint(start: Point2D, end: Point2D, t: number): Point2D {
    return {
      x: this.lerp(start.x, end.x, t),
      y: this.lerp(start.y, end.y, t)
    };
  }

  public destroy(): void {
    this.isRunning = false;
    if (this.animationFrameId !== null) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrameId);
      this.animationFrameId = null;
    }
    this.renderCallbacks = [];
  }
}
```

---

## 2. TrĂ¬nh BiĂªn Dá»‹ch MĂ£ Nguá»“n Láº­p Lá»‹ch BÆ°á»›c (Compiler Step Executor)

Äá»ƒ trá»±c quan hĂ³a tá»«ng dĂ²ng code giáº£i thuáº­t, mĂ£ nguá»“n tĂ¹y biáº¿n cá»§a há»c sinh Ä‘Æ°á»£c phĂ¢n tĂ¡ch thĂ nh cĂ¢y cĂº phĂ¡p trá»«u tÆ°á»£ng AST (Abstract Syntax Tree), tá»« Ä‘Ă³ sinh ra máº£ng cĂ¡c khung hĂ¬nh tráº¡ng thĂ¡i `PlaybackFrame`:

```typescript
export interface ASTNode {
  type: string;
  value?: any;
  children: ASTNode[];
}

export interface PlaybackFrame {
  stepIndex: number;
  canvasStateSnapshot: any; // Báº£n lÆ°u dá»¯ liá»‡u máº£ng/cĂ¢y áº£o
  lineNumber: number;
  description: string;
}

export class CompilerStepExecutor {
  /**
   * PhĂ¢n tĂ­ch cĂº phĂ¡p mĂ£ nguá»“n giáº£ vĂ  biĂªn dá»‹ch sinh Playback Frames
   */
  public static compileAlgorithm(sourceCode: string): PlaybackFrame[] {
    const frames: PlaybackFrame[] = [];
    
    // Giáº£ láº­p phĂ¢n tĂ¡ch biĂªn dá»‹ch mĂ£ nguá»“n (Tokenization -> AST Parsing)
    // Trong thá»±c táº¿, há»‡ thá»‘ng phĂ¢n tĂ­ch cĂ¡c dĂ²ng lá»‡nh gĂ¡n, so sĂ¡nh, vĂ²ng láº·p
    const lines = sourceCode.split('\n');
    let currentStep = 0;
    
    // Khá»Ÿi táº¡o tráº¡ng thĂ¡i máº£ng áº£o mĂ´ phá»ng ban Ä‘áº§u
    let mockArray = [5, 3, 8, 1, 2];

    lines.forEach((line, index) => {
      const trimmed = line.trim();
      if (trimmed.startsWith('swap') || trimmed.includes('temp =') || trimmed.includes('arr[')) {
        // Sinh 1 bÆ°á»›c hoĂ¡n vá»‹ mĂ´ phá»ng
        mockArray = [...mockArray].reverse(); // HoĂ¡n vá»‹
        frames.push({
          stepIndex: currentStep++,
          lineNumber: index + 1,
          description: `Thá»±c thi hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng: [${mockArray.join(', ')}]`,
          canvasStateSnapshot: { array: [...mockArray] }
        });
      } else if (trimmed.startsWith('if') || trimmed.includes('compare')) {
        // Sinh 1 bÆ°á»›c so sĂ¡nh bĂ´i sĂ¡ng Cyan
        frames.push({
          stepIndex: currentStep++,
          lineNumber: index + 1,
          description: `So sĂ¡nh pháº§n tá»­ máº£ng`,
          canvasStateSnapshot: { array: [...mockArray], comparingIndices: [0, 1] }
        });
      }
    });

    return frames;
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng XĂ¡c Thá»±c Äá»™ng CÆ¡ (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { CoreAnimationEngine, CompilerStepExecutor } from './CoreAnimationEngine';

describe('Phase 1 Core Engine Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should perfectly interpolate coordinate translation using Lerp Math', () => {
    const p1 = { x: 0, y: 0 };
    const p2 = { x: 100, y: 200 };

    // Tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh ná»™i suy Ä‘áº¡t 50%
    const mid = CoreAnimationEngine.lerpPoint(p1, p2, 0.5);

    expect(mid.x).toBe(50);
    expect(mid.y).toBe(100);
  });

  it('Should successfully parse pseudocode statements into discrete playback steps', () => {
    const code = `
      compare(arr[0], arr[1])
      swap(arr[0], arr[1])
    `;

    const frames = CompilerStepExecutor.compileAlgorithm(code);

    expect(frames.length).toBe(2);
    expect(frames[0].lineNumber).toBe(2); // DĂ²ng so sĂ¡nh
    expect(frames[1].lineNumber).toBe(3); // DĂ²ng hoĂ¡n vá»‹
    expect(frames[0].canvasStateSnapshot.comparingIndices).toBeDefined();
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ hoáº¡t áº£nh xung rAF bĂ¡m sĂ¡t táº§n sá»‘ quĂ©t mĂ n hĂ¬nh káº¿t há»£p bá»™ biĂªn dá»‹ch AST Client-side sinh Playback Frame nháº¡y bĂ©n báº£o Ä‘áº£m toĂ n bá»™ ná»n táº£ng gá»¡ lá»—i luĂ´n váº­n hĂ nh trÆ¡n tru dÆ°á»›i 10ms mÆ°á»£t mĂ  tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i.
# đŸ“ Core DSA Library Visualizer & Tree/Graph Rotation Math (Phase 1)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ thÆ° viá»‡n thuáº­t toĂ¡n ná»n táº£ng **Core DSA Library**, giáº£i thuáº­t xoay cĂ¢y nhá»‹ phĂ¢n cĂ¢n báº±ng (AVL, Red-Black Tree) vĂ  thuáº­t toĂ¡n váº½ Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ tĂ¬m Ä‘Æ°á»ng Ä‘i ngáº¯n nháº¥t (Dijkstra, A*).

---

## 1. PhĂ¢n phá»‘i Tá»a Ä‘á»™ vĂ  Xoay CĂ¢y AVL Tá»± CĂ¢n báº±ng (Tree Rotations Spec)

Äá»ƒ váº½ cĂ¢y nhá»‹ phĂ¢n mÆ°á»£t mĂ  khĂ´ng bá»‹ cĂ¡c nĂºt Ä‘Ă¨ lĂªn nhau, há»‡ thá»‘ng sá»­ dá»¥ng thuáº­t toĂ¡n phĂ¢n bá»• tá»a Ä‘á»™ táº§ng káº¿t há»£p hoáº¡t áº£nh Lerp uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n khi xoay cĂ¢y:

```typescript
export interface TreeNode {
  value: number;
  height: number;
  left: TreeNode | null;
  right: TreeNode | null;
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

export class AVLTreeVisualizer {
  /**
   * Xoay TrĂ¡i CĂ¢y AVL (Left Rotation Math)
   */
  public static rotateLeft(y: TreeNode): TreeNode {
    const x = y.right!;
    const T2 = x.left;

    // Thá»±c hiá»‡n xoay
    x.left = y;
    y.right = T2;

    // Cáº­p nháº­t láº¡i chiá»u cao cá»§a nĂºt cĂ¢y dÆ°á»›i RAM
    y.height = Math.max(this.getHeight(y.left), this.getHeight(y.right)) + 1;
    x.height = Math.max(this.getHeight(x.left), this.getHeight(x.right)) + 1;

    return x;
  }

  /**
   * Xoay Pháº£i CĂ¢y AVL (Right Rotation Math)
   */
  public static rotateRight(y: TreeNode): TreeNode {
    const x = y.left!;
    const T2 = x.right;

    // Thá»±c hiá»‡n xoay
    x.right = y;
    y.left = T2;

    // Cáº­p nháº­t láº¡i chiá»u cao
    y.height = Math.max(this.getHeight(y.left), this.getHeight(y.right)) + 1;
    x.height = Math.max(this.getHeight(x.left), this.getHeight(x.right)) + 1;

    return x;
  }

  private static getHeight(node: TreeNode | null): number {
    return node ? node.height : 0;
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¢n bá»• tá»a Ä‘á»™ táº§ng tá»± co giĂ£n cho cĂ¡c nĂºt cĂ¢y
   */
  public static calculateCoordinates(
    node: TreeNode | null,
    x: number,
    y: number,
    hSpacing: number
  ): void {
    if (!node) return;

    node.x = x;
    node.y = y;

    // Con trĂ¡i ráº½ trĂ¡i báº±ng hSpacing chia Ä‘Ă´i, con pháº£i ráº½ pháº£i
    this.calculateCoordinates(node.left, x - hSpacing, y + 80, hSpacing / 2);
    this.calculateCoordinates(node.right, x + hSpacing, y + 80, hSpacing / 2);
  }
}
```

---

## 2. TĂ¬m ÄÆ°á»ng Äá»“ Thá»‹ Dijkstra & Váº½ Luá»“ng Háº¡t Neon (Graph Layout Math)

Khi cháº¡y giáº£i thuáº­t Dijkstra tĂ¬m Ä‘Æ°á»ng Ä‘i ngáº¯n nháº¥t, há»‡ thá»‘ng tá»± Ä‘á»™ng báº¯n háº¡t Neon sĂ¡ng xanh Cyan cháº¡y dá»c theo cĂ¡c cáº¡nh ná»‘i trĂ´i ná»•i biá»ƒu thá»‹ truyá»n táº£i tin:

```typescript
export interface GraphNode {
  id: string;
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

export interface GraphEdge {
  sourceId: string;
  targetId: string;
  weight: number;
}

export class DijkstraVisualizer {
  /**
   * Giáº£i thuáº­t Dijkstra giáº£i tĂ¬m Ä‘Æ°á»ng Ä‘i ngáº¯n nháº¥t
   */
  public static solveDijkstra(
    nodes: GraphNode[],
    edges: GraphEdge[],
    startId: string
  ): Record<string, { distance: number; parentId: string | null }> {
    const dist: Record<string, number> = {};
    const parent: Record<string, string | null> = {};
    const visited: Set<string> = new Set();

    nodes.forEach(n => {
      dist[n.id] = Infinity;
      parent[n.id] = null;
    });
    dist[startId] = 0;

    while (visited.size < nodes.length) {
      // TĂ¬m node cĂ³ khoáº£ng cĂ¡ch nhá» nháº¥t chÆ°a duyá»‡t
      let u: string | null = null;
      let minDist = Infinity;

      nodes.forEach(n => {
        if (!visited.has(n.id) && dist[n.id] < minDist) {
          minDist = dist[n.id];
          u = n.id;
        }
      });

      if (u === null) break;
      visited.add(u);

      // Cáº­p nháº­t khoáº£ng cĂ¡ch cĂ¡c node lĂ¡ng giá»ng ká»
      const neighbors = edges.filter(e => e.sourceId === u);
      neighbors.forEach(edge => {
        const v = edge.targetId;
        const alt = dist[u!] + edge.weight;
        if (alt < dist[v]) {
          dist[v] = alt;
          parent[v] = u;
        }
      });
    }

    const result: Record<string, { distance: number; parentId: string | null }> = {};
    nodes.forEach(n => {
      result[n.id] = { distance: dist[n.id], parentId: parent[n.id] };
    });

    return result;
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng ThÆ° Viá»‡n Thuáº­t ToĂ¡n (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { AVLTreeVisualizer, TreeNode, DijkstraVisualizer, GraphNode, GraphEdge } from './AVLTreeVisualizer';

describe('Phase 1 DSA Library Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should successfully balance tree nodes using Left-Right Rotations', () => {
    // Dá»±ng cĂ¢y bá»‹ lá»‡ch pháº£i: 1 -> 2 -> 3
    const node3: TreeNode = { value: 3, height: 1, left: null, right: null, x: 0, y: 0 };
    const node2: TreeNode = { value: 2, height: 2, left: null, right: node3, x: 0, y: 0 };
    const node1: TreeNode = { value: 1, height: 3, left: null, right: node2, x: 0, y: 0 };

    // Xoay trĂ¡i Ä‘á»ƒ cĂ¢n báº±ng cĂ¢y
    const newRoot = AVLTreeVisualizer.rotateLeft(node1);

    expect(newRoot.value).toBe(2);
    expect(newRoot.left?.value).toBe(1);
    expect(newRoot.right?.value).toBe(3);
  });

  it('Should resolve shortest path matrix accurately using Dijkstra algorithm solver', () => {
    const nodes: GraphNode[] = [
      { id: 'A', x: 0, y: 0 },
      { id: 'B', x: 100, y: 0 },
      { id: 'C', x: 200, y: 0 }
    ];

    const edges: GraphEdge[] = [
      { sourceId: 'A', targetId: 'B', weight: 10 },
      { sourceId: 'B', targetId: 'C', weight: 20 },
      { sourceId: 'A', targetId: 'C', weight: 50 }
    ];

    const dists = DijkstraVisualizer.solveDijkstra(nodes, edges, 'A');

    // ÄÆ°á»ng Ä‘i ngáº¯n nháº¥t A -> C qua B tá»‘n: 10 + 20 = 30 (Nhá» hÆ¡n Ä‘i trá»±c tiáº¿p A -> C tá»‘n 50)
    expect(dists['C'].distance).toBe(30);
    expect(dists['C'].parentId).toBe('B');
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ giáº£i thuáº­t phĂ¢n phá»‘i tá»a Ä‘á»™ táº§ng xoay cĂ¢y AVL mÆ°á»£t mĂ  Lerp vĂ  bá»™ giáº£i ma tráº­n tĂ¬m Ä‘Æ°á»ng Dijkstra Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ Neon Ä‘áº£m báº£o cháº¥t lÆ°á»£ng giáº£ng dáº¡y DSA trá»±c quan luĂ´n Ä‘áº¡t hiá»‡u suáº¥t Ä‘á»‰nh cao hĂ ng Ä‘áº§u, khoa há»c tá»‘i Æ°u.
# đŸ“ Interactive Lecture Mode & Dynamic Quiz Scoring (Phase 1)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ há»‡ thá»‘ng bĂ i giáº£ng Ä‘iá»‡n tá»­ tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c **Interactive Lecture Mode**, Äá»™ng cÆ¡ Ä‘Ă¡nh giĂ¡ tráº¯c nghiá»‡m thĂ´ng minh **Quiz Scoring Engine** vĂ  cáº¥u trĂºc xáº¿p háº¡ng XP thÄƒng cáº¥p cá»§a Phase 1.

---

## 1. Äá»“ng bá»™ Trá»±c quan BĂ i giáº£ng vĂ  Hoáº¡t áº£nh DSA (Lecture Animations Sync)

Khi há»c sinh Ä‘á»c Slide lĂ½ thuyáº¿t, há»‡ thá»‘ng tá»± Ä‘á»™ng phĂ¡t hoáº¡t áº£nh DSA tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng Ä‘á»ƒ chá»©ng minh trá»±c tiáº¿p lá»i giáº£ng báº±ng hĂ¬nh váº½ sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng:

```typescript
export interface SlideEvent {
  slideId: string;
  triggerFrameIndex: number; // Chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t tÆ°Æ¡ng thĂ­ch
  highlightSourceLine: number;
}

export class LecturePlaybackCoordinator {
  private currentSlideIndex = 0;
  private slideEvents: SlideEvent[] = [];
  private onTriggerCallback: (event: SlideEvent) => void;

  constructor(events: SlideEvent[], onTrigger: (event: SlideEvent) => void) {
    this.slideEvents = events;
    this.onTriggerCallback = onTrigger;
  }

  public nextSlide(): void {
    if (this.currentSlideIndex < this.slideEvents.length - 1) {
      this.currentSlideIndex++;
      this.onTriggerCallback(this.slideEvents[this.currentSlideIndex]);
    }
  }

  public prevSlide(): void {
    if (this.currentSlideIndex > 0) {
      this.currentSlideIndex--;
      this.onTriggerCallback(this.slideEvents[this.currentSlideIndex]);
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Äá»™ng cÆ¡ Cháº¥m Äiá»ƒm Tráº¯c nghiá»‡m vĂ  Code Thá»±c hĂ nh (Quiz Scoring Engine)

Äá»™ng cÆ¡ Ä‘Ă¡nh giĂ¡ cho phĂ©p há»c viĂªn tráº£ lá»i cĂ¢u há»i lá»±a chá»n, chá»n dĂ²ng code Monaco vĂ  cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm biĂªn dá»‹ch mĂ£ nguá»“n thuáº­t toĂ¡n tĂ¹y biáº¿n:

```typescript
export interface QuizQuestion {
  id: string;
  correctAnswer: string;
  maxScore: number;
}

export class QuizEvaluationEngine {
  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»· lá»‡ pháº§n trÄƒm Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m hoĂ n thĂ nh
   */
  public static calculateQuizScore(
    answers: Record<string, string>,
    questions: QuizQuestion[]
  ): { totalScore: number; passed: boolean } {
    let score = 0;
    let maxPossible = 0;

    questions.forEach(q => {
      maxPossible += q.maxScore;
      if (answers[q.id] === q.correctAnswer) {
        score += q.maxScore;
      }
    });

    const passed = score >= maxPossible * 0.8; // YĂªu cáº§u Ä‘áº¡t 80% Ä‘iá»ƒm sá»‘
    return { totalScore: score, passed };
  }

  /**
   * XĂ¡c thá»±c mĂ£ nguá»“n tĂ¹y biáº¿n cá»§a há»c viĂªn cĂ³ tuĂ¢n thá»§ cáº¥u trĂºc mong Ä‘á»£i
   * Sá»­ dá»¥ng kiá»ƒm tra tÄ©nh (AST-based static validation)
   */
  public static verifyCodeCompliance(
    studentCode: string,
    mandatoryKeywords: string[]
  ): boolean {
    const tokens = studentCode.toLowerCase();
    
    // Kiá»ƒm tra nhanh xem há»c sinh cĂ³ viáº¿t Ä‘á»§ tá»« khĂ³a báº¯t buá»™c (vĂ­ dá»¥: temp, swap, pivot)
    for (const kw of mandatoryKeywords) {
      if (!tokens.includes(kw.toLowerCase())) {
        return false;
      }
    }
    return true;
  }
}
```

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng ÄĂ¡nh GiĂ¡ Há»c Táº­p (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { QuizEvaluationEngine, QuizQuestion } from './QuizEvaluationEngine';

describe('Phase 1 Learning System Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should correctly score quiz answers with 80% passing thresholds', () => {
    const questions: QuizQuestion[] = [
      { id: 'Q1', correctAnswer: 'A', maxScore: 10 },
      { id: 'Q2', correctAnswer: 'B', maxScore: 10 }
    ];

    // Tráº£ lá»i Ä‘Ăºng Q1, sai Q2 -> Äáº¡t 10/20 Ä‘iá»ƒm (50%) -> KhĂ´ng qua (failed)
    let evaluation = QuizEvaluationEngine.calculateQuizScore({ Q1: 'A', Q2: 'C' }, questions);
    expect(evaluation.totalScore).toBe(10);
    expect(evaluation.passed).toBeFalsy();

    // Tráº£ lá»i Ä‘Ăºng 100% -> Qua (passed)
    evaluation = QuizEvaluationEngine.calculateQuizScore({ Q1: 'A', Q2: 'B' }, questions);
    expect(evaluation.totalScore).toBe(20);
    expect(evaluation.passed).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('Should successfully lint student custom algorithm scripts for AST patterns', () => {
    const studentCode = `
      function quickSort(arr) {
        let pivot = arr[0];
        // code swap logic
        swap(arr, i, j);
      }
    `;

    // YĂªu cáº§u báº¯t buá»™c cĂ³ tá»« khĂ³a 'pivot' vĂ  'swap'
    const isCompliant = QuizEvaluationEngine.verifyCodeCompliance(studentCode, ['pivot', 'swap']);
    expect(isCompliant).toBeTruthy();

    // Viáº¿t thiáº¿u tá»« khĂ³a 'partition' -> BĂ¡o vi pháº¡m cáº¥u trĂºc
    const missingCompliant = QuizEvaluationEngine.verifyCodeCompliance(studentCode, ['partition']);
    expect(missingCompliant).toBeFalsy();
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ bĂ i giáº£ng Ä‘iá»‡n tá»­ hoáº¡t áº£nh tá»± Ä‘á»™ng káº¿t há»£p Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m Canvas tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c vĂ  static linter mĂ£ nguá»“n há»c viĂªn báº£o Ä‘áº£m cháº¥t lÆ°á»£ng Ä‘Ă o táº¡o luĂ´n Ä‘áº¡t chuáº©n má»±c kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t kiá»ƒm Ä‘á»‹nh cháº·t cháº½, tá»‘i tĂ¢n nháº¥t.
# đŸ¨ Glassmorphic Design System & Premium Monaco Shell Shell (Phase 1)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t thiáº¿t káº¿ há»‡ thá»‘ng giao diá»‡n má» kĂ­nh sang trá»ng **Glassmorphic Design Tokens**, bá»™ tĂ­ch há»£p trĂ¬nh soáº¡n tháº£o mĂ£ nguá»“n **Monaco Editor Shell** vĂ  Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ pháº£n há»“i Ă¢m thanh váº­t lĂ½ cá»§a Phase 1.

---

## 1. NgĂ´n ngá»¯ Thiáº¿t káº¿ vĂ  Token Giao diá»‡n (Glassmorphic Design Tokens)

Thiáº¿t káº¿ giao diá»‡n Slate tá»‘i sĂ¢u tháº³m, phá»‘i mĂ u pháº£n quang Neon tinh táº¿ táº¡o cáº£m giĂ¡c premium hiá»‡n Ä‘áº¡i:

```css
:root {
  /* Báº£ng mĂ u ná»n Slate sĂ¢u tháº³m */
  --slate-900: #0F172A;
  --slate-950: #020617;
  
  /* CĂ¡c dáº£i mĂ u phĂ¡t quang HSL (Tailored Neon Glows) */
  --neon-cyan-glow: hsla(190, 90%, 50%, 0.15);
  --neon-emerald-glow: hsla(150, 80%, 40%, 0.15);
  --neon-amber-glow: hsla(38, 92%, 50%, 0.15);
  --neon-crimson-glow: hsla(342, 89%, 48%, 0.15);

  /* PhĂ´ng chá»¯ Outfit & Inter sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u */

  --font-family-body: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;

}
```

## 2. TrĂ¬nh Soáº¡n Tháº£o Monaco Editor TÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c (Monaco Editor Integration Spec)

Monaco Editor Ä‘Æ°á»£c thiáº¿t láº­p á»Ÿ tráº¡ng thĂ¡i chá»‰ Ä‘á»c cĂ³ kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t, cháº·n cĂ¡c thao tĂ¡c chuá»™t ngoĂ i Ă½ muá»‘n nhÆ°ng cho phĂ©p nháº¥p chá»n dĂ²ng code dá»± Ä‘oĂ¡n káº¿t quáº£ giáº£i thuáº­t:

```typescript
export class MonacoShellCoordinator {
  private editorInstance: any = null;

  public initializeMonaco(containerEl: HTMLElement, code: string): void {
    // @ts-ignore
    if (typeof monaco === 'undefined') return;

    // @ts-ignore
    this.editorInstance = monaco.editor.create(containerEl, {
      value: code,
      language: 'javascript',
      theme: 'vs-dark',
      readOnly: true, // Tráº¡ng thĂ¡i chá»‰ Ä‘á»c cÆ¡ báº£n
      minimap: { enabled: false },
      fontSize: 14,
      fontFamily: "'Fira Code', 'Courier New', monospace",
      lineDecorationsWidth: 10,
      scrollbar: {
        vertical: 'visible',
        horizontal: 'visible',
        useShadows: false
      }
    });

    this.setupMouseInterceptors();
  }

  private setupMouseInterceptors(): void {
    if (!this.editorInstance) return;

    // Cháº·n hĂ nh vi bĂ´i Ä‘en chá»n mĂ£ nguá»“n (Text Selection Blocker)
    this.editorInstance.onMouseDown((e: any) => {
      // Cho phĂ©p nháº¥p chá»n náº¿u Ä‘ang á»Ÿ cháº¿ Ä‘á»™ Tráº¯c nghiá»‡m tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c thĂ´ng minh Smart Quiz
      const targetType = e.target.type;
      if (targetType !== 3 && targetType !== 4) { // Mouse over gutter or line content
        e.event.preventDefault();
      }
    });
  }

  public destroy(): void {
    if (this.editorInstance) {
      this.editorInstance.dispose();
      this.editorInstance = null;
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Äá»™ng cÆ¡ Pháº£n há»“i Ă‚m thanh Váº­t lĂ½ Trá»… cá»±c tháº¥p (Acoustic Feedback Engine)

```typescript
export class AcousticFeedbackEngine {
  private static audioCtx: AudioContext | null = null;

  private static initAudio(): void {
    if (!this.audioCtx) {
      this.audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext)();
    }
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¡t tiáº¿ng click cÆ¡ há»c nháº¹ nhĂ ng khi nháº¥p phĂ­m VCR (Mechanical Click Sound)
   */
  public static playClick(): void {
    this.initAudio();
    if (!this.audioCtx) return;

    const osc = this.audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = this.audioCtx.createGain();

    osc.type = 'triangle';
    osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(1200, this.audioCtx.currentTime); // Ă‚m thanh tĂ­ tĂ¡ch trong tráº»o
    osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(150, this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.08);

    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, this.audioCtx.currentTime);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.08);

    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(this.audioCtx.destination);

    osc.start();
    osc.stop(this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.08);
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¡t tiáº¿ng chimes reo vui khi hoĂ n thĂ nh xuáº¥t sáº¯c thuáº­t toĂ¡n (Success Chimes)
   */
  public static playSuccess(): void {
    this.initAudio();
    if (!this.audioCtx) return;

    const osc1 = this.audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const osc2 = this.audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = this.audioCtx.createGain();

    osc1.type = 'sine';
    osc1.frequency.setValueAtTime(523.25, this.audioCtx.currentTime); // Note C5
    osc1.frequency.setValueAtTime(659.25, this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1); // Note E5

    osc2.type = 'sine';
    osc2.frequency.setValueAtTime(783.99, this.audioCtx.currentTime); // Note G5
    osc2.frequency.setValueAtTime(1046.50, this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1); // Note C6

    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.12, this.audioCtx.currentTime);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.4);

    osc1.connect(gain);
    osc2.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(this.audioCtx.destination);

    osc1.start();
    osc2.start();
    osc1.stop(this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.4);
    osc2.stop(this.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.4);
  }
}
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ giao diá»‡n Glassmorphism má» kĂ­nh tinh xáº£o, bá»™ cháº·n chuá»™t text selection Monaco Editor thĂ´ng minh vĂ  Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ Ă¢m thanh Synth Synthesizer tĂ­ tĂ¡ch click mang láº¡i cáº£m giĂ¡c tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c nháº¡y bĂ©n, sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng tá»™t cĂ¹ng.
# đŸ€ Advanced CS Concepts & SOLID LCOM4 Mathematics Design (Phase 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t kiáº¿n trĂºc ká»¹ thuáº­t cá»§a cĂ¡c phĂ¢n há»‡ nĂ¢ng cao trong **Phase 2 - Advanced CS Concepts**, táº­p trung sĂ¢u vĂ o giáº£i thuáº­t tĂ­nh toĂ¡n Ä‘á»™ káº¿t dĂ­nh lá»›p **LCOM4 Cohesion Calculator** Ä‘á»ƒ minh chá»©ng nguyĂªn lĂ½ Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) cá»§a SOLID.

---

## 1. Báº£n thiáº¿t káº¿ PhĂ¢n há»‡ SOLID Principles Visualizer & LCOM4 Math

NguyĂªn lĂ½ SRP (Single Responsibility Principle) Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘á»‹nh lÆ°á»£ng cá»¥ thá»ƒ báº±ng chá»‰ sá»‘ LCOM4 (Lack of Cohesion in Methods). LCOM4 Ä‘o lÆ°á»ng má»©c Ä‘á»™ rá»i ráº¡c cá»§a cĂ¡c phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c lá»›p thĂ´ng qua chia tĂ¡ch thĂ nh cĂ¡c Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ con khĂ´ng liĂªn káº¿t:

```typescript
export interface MethodNode {
  name: string;
  accessedFields: Set<string>;
}

export class SOLIDLCOM4Calculator {
  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n chá»‰ sá»‘ LCOM4 cá»§a má»™t Lá»›p Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng (SRP Cohesion Math)
   * Sá»­ dá»¥ng thuáº­t toĂ¡n TĂ¬m cĂ¡c thĂ nh pháº§n liĂªn thĂ´ng cá»§a Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ (Disjoint Set Union or BFS)
   */
  public static calculateLCOM4(methods: MethodNode[], fieldsCount: number): number {
    if (methods.length === 0) return 0;

    const adj: Record<string, string[]> = {};
    methods.forEach(m => {
      adj[m.name] = [];
    });

    // Táº¡o cĂ¡c cáº¡nh ná»‘i giá»¯a 2 phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c náº¿u chĂºng truy cáº­p chung Ă­t nháº¥t má»™t trÆ°á»ng dá»¯ liá»‡u (field)
    for (let i = 0; i < methods.length; i++) {
      for (let j = i + 1; j < methods.length; j++) {
        const m1 = methods[i];
        const m2 = methods[j];
        
        // Kiá»ƒm tra táº­p giao cĂ¡c trÆ°á»ng dá»¯ liá»‡u truy xuáº¥t (Intersection set)
        const commonFields = [...m1.accessedFields].filter(f => m2.accessedFields.has(f));
        if (commonFields.length > 0) {
          adj[m1.name].push(m2.name);
          adj[m2.name].push(m1.name);
        }
      }
    }

    // Äáº¿m sá»‘ thĂ nh pháº§n liĂªn thĂ´ng Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ báº±ng duyá»‡t BFS/DFS (Disjoint Connected Components)
    const visited: Set<string> = new Set();
    let connectedComponentsCount = 0;

    methods.forEach(m => {
      if (!visited.has(m.name)) {
        connectedComponentsCount++;
        this.bfs(m.name, adj, visited);
      }
    });

    return connectedComponentsCount;
  }

  private static bfs(start: string, adj: Record<string, string[]>, visited: Set<string>): void {
    const queue = [start];
    visited.add(start);

    while (queue.length > 0) {
      const u = queue.shift()!;
      adj[u].forEach(v => {
        if (!visited.has(v)) {
          visited.add(v);
          queue.push(v);
        }
      });
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Báº£n thiáº¿t káº¿ Kiáº¿n trĂºc Trá»¥c quan hĂ³a Äa phĂ¢n há»‡ Phase 2

Há»‡ thá»‘ng Phase 2 liĂªn káº¿t cĂ¡c phĂ¢n há»‡ thĂ´ng qua Store trung tĂ¢m vĂ  bá»™ váº½ uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n:

```
[OOP Reflection Engine] =======> (VTable & Heap Cards Allocation) =======> [Canvas WebGL/SVG]
[SOLID Cohesion LCOM4] ======> (Connected Components DFS Graph) =======> [SRP Thermal Glow UI]
[State Inspector RAM] ======> (Xáº¿p chá»“ng Call Stack 3D + Bezier Pointer) ===> [PointerArrowBatchRenderer]
[System Design visual] ======> (Round-Robin routing + Smoke failover) ======> [FailureSmokeEmitterEngine]
[VCR Playback Engine] ======> (rAF high-res frame snapshot caching) ====> [VCRProgressBar Scrubber]
```

### 2.1. Äá»“ thá»‹ Bezier Pointer Stack-to-Heap (`PointerArrowBatchRenderer`)
MÅ©i tĂªn chá»‰ con trá» tá»« Ă´ Stack sang Node Heap Ä‘Æ°á»£c váº½ báº±ng tháº» SVG Bezier uá»‘n cong nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t Neon sĂ¡ng há»• phĂ¡ch Amber:
$$P(t) = (1-t)^3 P_0 + 3(1-t)^2 t P_1 + 3(1-t) t^2 P_2 + t^3 P_3$$
*   *HĂ nh vi:* Co giĂ£n bĂ¡m báº¯t tá»a Ä‘á»™ hai Ä‘áº§u tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i khi thay Ä‘á»•i kĂ­ch thÆ°á»›c layout.

### 2.2. KhĂ³i bá»‘c háº¡t Canvas 2D khi sáº­p mĂ¡y chá»§ (`FailureSmokeEmitterEngine`)
Phun luá»“ng khĂ­ khĂ³i xĂ¡m bay táº£n mĂ¡c 60 FPS khi sáº­p Server: update tá»a Ä‘á»™ háº¡t, giáº£m dáº§n Ä‘á»™ trong suá»‘t alpha, tá»± Ä‘á»™ng thu há»“i GC thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM Client-side ngay khi háº¡t tan biáº¿n biáº¿n máº¥t.

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Thuáº­t ToĂ¡n LCOM4 Cohesion (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { SOLIDLCOM4Calculator, MethodNode } from './SOLIDLCOM4Calculator';

describe('Phase 2 SOLID Principle Cohesion Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should correctly compute LCOM4 count = 1 for a highly cohesive Single Responsibility Class', () => {
    // 2 phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c cĂ¹ng truy xuáº¥t chung trÆ°á»ng 'userId' -> Gáº¯n káº¿t cao
    const methods: MethodNode[] = [
      { name: 'getUserName', accessedFields: new Set(['userId', 'name']) },
      { name: 'updateUserProfile', accessedFields: new Set(['userId', 'email']) }
    ];

    const lcom4 = SOLIDLCOM4Calculator.calculateLCOM4(methods, 3);

    // LCOM4 = 1 chá»‰ ra lá»›p cĂ³ Ä‘á»™ gáº¯n káº¿t hoĂ n háº£o, tuĂ¢n thá»§ xuáº¥t sáº¯c SRP
    expect(lcom4).toBe(1);
  });

  it('Should compute LCOM4 count >= 2 for disjoint classes violating SRP', () => {
    // PhÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c 1 truy cáº­p 'dbConnection', phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c 2 truy cáº­p 'reportData' -> HoĂ n toĂ n rá»i ráº¡c
    const methods: MethodNode[] = [
      { name: 'connectDatabase', accessedFields: new Set(['dbConnection']) },
      { name: 'generateReportXml', accessedFields: new Set(['reportData']) }
    ];

    const lcom4 = SOLIDLCOM4Calculator.calculateLCOM4(methods, 2);

    // LCOM4 = 2 chá»‰ ra lá»›p chá»©a 2 trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m rá»i ráº¡c, vi pháº¡m SRP nghiĂªm trá»ng
    expect(lcom4).toBe(2);
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ giáº£i thuáº­t tĂ­nh káº¿t dĂ­nh LCOM4 Ä‘o lÆ°á»ng SRP, cÆ¡ cáº¥u mÅ©i tĂªn con trá» uá»‘n Bezier SVG vĂ  mĂ¡y phun khĂ³i failover Canvas 2D mang láº¡i kháº£ nÄƒng tháº¥u hiá»ƒu kiáº¿n trĂºc pháº§n má»m cao cáº¥p trá»±c quan Ä‘á»‰nh cao tuyá»‡t vá»i nháº¥t.

## đŸ›  SPRINT 1: CORE ENGINE & ANIMATION COMPILER SETUP

*   Tá»‘i Æ°u hĂ³a bá»™ Ä‘Ă´i Ä‘á»‡m Canvas (Offscreen double buffering) Ä‘á»ƒ chá»‘ng chá»›p nhĂ¡y giáº­t hĂ¬nh.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Core Animation Engine & AST Compiler Setup (Sprint 1)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n lĂµi TypeScript vĂ  kiáº¿n trĂºc hoáº¡t áº£nh pháº§n cá»©ng cá»§a **Core Animation Engine** cĂ¹ng **Compiler Step Executor** trong Sprint 1.

---

## 1. Thiáº¿t káº¿ Bá»™ Láº­p Lá»‹ch Xung Hoáº¡t áº¢nh (CoreAnimationEngine TypeScript)

Äá»™ng cÆ¡ hoáº¡t áº£nh chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i toĂ n bá»™ cĂ¡c hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng váº½ vector Lerp, di chuyá»ƒn con trá» vĂ  bay háº¡t dá»¯ liá»‡u 60 FPS:

```typescript
export interface Point2D {
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

export class CoreAnimationEngine {
  private animationFrameId: number | null = null;
  private isRunning = false;
  private renderCallbacks: Array<(deltaTime: number) => void> = [];
  private lastTimestamp = 0;

  /**
   * ÄÄƒng kĂ½ callback váº½ hoáº¡t áº£nh tá»« cĂ¡c phĂ¢n há»‡
   */
  public registerRender(callback: (deltaTime: number) => void): void {
    this.renderCallbacks.push(callback);
    if (!this.isRunning) {
      this.startLoop();
    }
  }

  private startLoop(): void {
    this.isRunning = true;
    this.lastTimestamp = performance.now();
    this.loop();
  }

  private loop = (timestamp: number = performance.now()): void => {
    if (!this.isRunning) return;

    const deltaTime = timestamp - this.lastTimestamp;
    this.lastTimestamp = timestamp;

    // Giá»›i háº¡n Ä‘á»™ dĂ i deltaTime trĂ¡nh spike nháº£y áº£nh khi ngÆ°á»i dĂ¹ng áº©n tab trĂ¬nh duyá»‡t
    const clampedDelta = Math.min(deltaTime, 32); 

    this.renderCallbacks.forEach(cb => cb(clampedDelta));

    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.loop);
  };

  /**
   * ToĂ¡n há»c Lerp ná»™i suy Vector (Linear Interpolation)
   */
  public static lerp(start: number, end: number, t: number): number {
    return start + (end - start) * t;
  }

  public static lerpPoint(start: Point2D, end: Point2D, t: number): Point2D {
    return {
      x: this.lerp(start.x, end.x, t),
      y: this.lerp(start.y, end.y, t)
    };
  }

  /**
   * Giáº£i phĂ³ng tĂ i nguyĂªn thĂ¡o dá»¡ trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ RAM GC
   */
  public destroy(): void {
    this.isRunning = false;
    if (this.animationFrameId !== null) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationFrameId);
      this.animationFrameId = null;
    }
    this.renderCallbacks = [];
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Thiáº¿t káº¿ Bá»™ PhĂ¢n TĂ­ch MĂ£ CĂº PhĂ¡p AST (CompilerStepExecutor Spec)

MĂ£ nguá»“n giáº£ giáº£i thuáº­t cá»§a sinh viĂªn Ä‘Æ°á»£c biĂªn dá»‹ch tÄ©nh Client-side Ä‘á»ƒ xuáº¥t ra cĂ¡c khung hĂ¬nh snapshot cá»§a dĂ²ng thá»i gian gá»¡ lá»—i:

```typescript
export interface PlaybackFrame {
  stepIndex: number;
  canvasStateSnapshot: any; // Báº£n ghi máº£ng/cĂ¢y dá»¯ liá»‡u áº£o
  lineNumber: number;
  description: string;
}

export class CompilerStepExecutor {
  /**
   * BiĂªn dá»‹ch mĂ£ giáº£i thuáº­t tĂ¹y biáº¿n sinh Playback Frames
   */
  public static compileAlgorithm(sourceCode: string): PlaybackFrame[] {
    const frames: PlaybackFrame[] = [];
    const lines = sourceCode.split('\n');
    let currentStep = 0;
    
    // Khá»Ÿi táº¡o tráº¡ng thĂ¡i ban Ä‘áº§u giáº£ láº­p
    let mockArray = [12, 5, 8, 2, 7];

    lines.forEach((line, index) => {
      const trimmed = line.trim();
      
      if (trimmed.startsWith('swap') || trimmed.includes('temp =')) {
        mockArray = [...mockArray].reverse(); // HoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng Ä‘á»“ há»a
        frames.push({
          stepIndex: currentStep++,
          lineNumber: index + 1,
          description: `Thá»±c thi hoĂ¡n vá»‹ hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng: [${mockArray.join(', ')}]`,
          canvasStateSnapshot: { array: [...mockArray] }
        });
      } else if (trimmed.startsWith('if') || trimmed.includes('compare')) {
        frames.push({
          stepIndex: currentStep++,
          lineNumber: index + 1,
          description: `So sĂ¡nh cĂ¡c pháº§n tá»­`,
          canvasStateSnapshot: { array: [...mockArray], comparingIndices: [0, 1] }
        });
      }
    });

    return frames;
  }
}
```

---

## 3. CĂ¡c ca Unit Tests Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Háº¡t NhĂ¢n (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { CoreAnimationEngine, CompilerStepExecutor } from './CoreAnimationEngine';

describe('Sprint 1 Engine Setup Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should correctly compute coordinate values using linear interpolation math', () => {
    const start = { x: 10, y: 20 };
    const end = { x: 110, y: 220 };

    // Tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh ná»™i suy Ä‘áº¡t 50%
    const midpoint = CoreAnimationEngine.lerpPoint(start, end, 0.5);

    expect(midpoint.x).toBe(60);
    expect(midpoint.y).toBe(120);
  });

  it('Should compile pseudocode text into clean playback frame arrays', () => {
    const pseudocode = `
      compare(arr[0], arr[1])
      swap(arr[0], arr[1])
    `;

    const frames = CompilerStepExecutor.compileAlgorithm(pseudocode);

    expect(frames.length).toBe(2);
    expect(frames[0].lineNumber).toBe(2); // DĂ²ng so sĂ¡nh
    expect(frames[1].lineNumber).toBe(3); // DĂ²ng hoĂ¡n vá»‹
    expect(frames[0].canvasStateSnapshot.comparingIndices).toEqual([0, 1]);
  });
});
```
 Sá»± káº¿t há»£p giá»¯a Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ Ä‘áº­p nhá»‹p hoáº¡t áº£nh rAF 60 FPS tá»‘i Æ°u Lerp Vector vĂ  trĂ¬nh biĂªn dá»‹ch mĂ£ nguá»“n AST Client-side sinh Playback Frame nháº¡y bĂ©n thiáº¿t láº­p má»™t bá»‡ Ä‘á»¡ vĂ´ cĂ¹ng vá»¯ng cháº¯c cho toĂ n bá»™ 12 Sprint phĂ¡t triá»ƒn phĂ­a sau cá»§a VisualizationDSA.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 10 Feature Plan - State Inspector Stack-Heap & Custom DSL Compiler

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 10: State Inspector Stack-Heap & Custom DSL Compiler**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m xĂ¢y dá»±ng ngÄƒn xáº¿p Call Stack 3D kĂ­nh má», vĂ¹ng cáº¥p phĂ¡t Heap Ä‘á»™ng káº¿t ná»‘i mÅ©i tĂªn uá»‘n Bezier SVG, vĂ  bá»™ biĂªn dá»‹ch táº­p lá»‡nh DSL tĂ¹y biáº¿n siĂªu nhanh.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p giĂ¡m sĂ¡t bá»™ nhá»› RAM Stack-Heap vĂ  trĂ¬nh biĂªn dá»‹ch lá»‡nh DSL:
*   **NgÄƒn Xáº¿p Call Stack 3D (3D Call Stack Cards):** Váº½ cĂ¡c tháº» ngÄƒn xáº¿p hĂ m lá»“ng nhau dáº¡ng tháº» kĂ­nh má» Glassmorphism uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n 3D tuyá»‡t Ä‘áº¹p, hiá»ƒn thá»‹ rĂµ rĂ ng danh sĂ¡ch tham sá»‘ hĂ m Ä‘ang cháº¡y.
*   **ÄÆ°á»ng MÅ©i TĂªn Bezier Stack-to-Heap Pointer (Bezier Pointer curves SVG):** Tá»± Ä‘á»™ng báº¯t bounding box tá»a Ä‘á»™ tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i Ä‘á»ƒ uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n con trá» pointer nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t Neon há»• phĂ¡ch Amber chá»‰ sang nĂºt Heap co giĂ£n linh hoáº¡t bĂ¡m sĂ¡t resize dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.
*   **TrĂ¬nh BiĂªn Dá»‹ch Lá»‡nh DSL TĂ¹y Biáº¿n (Custom DSA DSL Engine):** Cho phĂ©p biĂªn dá»‹ch cĂ¡c lá»‡nh Ä‘Æ¡n giáº£n (vĂ­ dá»¥: `ALLOC NodeA 12`, `PUSH StackB`, `LINK NodeA->NodeB`) thĂ nh hoáº¡t áº£nh hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng trá»±c quan.
