# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - State Inspector Stack-Heap & DSL Engine (Sprint 10)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh giĂ¡m sĂ¡t bá»™ nhá»› **StateInspectorEngine** uá»‘n cong pointer Bezier SVG vĂ  bá»™ biĂªn dá»‹ch táº­p lá»‡nh DSL **DSLEngine** trong Sprint 10.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh GiĂ¡m SĂ¡t Call Stack & Pointer Bezier SVG (StateInspectorEngine TS)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n tĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»a Ä‘á»™ uá»‘n cong Bezier cá»§a mÅ©i tĂªn trá» pointer káº¿t ná»‘i Ă´ Stack sang Node Heap bĂ¡m sĂ¡t kĂ©o co mĂ n hĂ¬nh dÆ°á»›i 5ms:

```typescript
export interface BoundingRect {
  x: number;
  y: number;
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

export interface BezierCurvePath {
  pathD: string; // Chuá»—i Ä‘á»‹nh nghÄ©a d="M x0 y0 C x1 y1, x2 y2, x3 y3"
  arrowheadAngle: number;
}

export class StateInspectorEngine {
  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong Bezier Cubic káº¿t ná»‘i Ă´ Stack sang Node Heap (Stack-to-Heap Bezier)
   * @param source Cá»±c báº¯t Ä‘áº§u (Stack Element)
   * @param target Cá»±c káº¿t thĂºc (Heap Node Card)
   */
  public static calculatePointerCurve(
    source: BoundingRect,
    target: BoundingRect
  ): BezierCurvePath {
    // 1. XĂ¡c Ä‘á»‹nh Ä‘iá»ƒm báº¯t Ä‘áº§u bĂªn pháº£i Ă´ Stack (Right Center)
    const x0 = source.x + source.width;
    const y0 = source.y + source.height / 2;

    // 2. XĂ¡c Ä‘á»‹nh Ä‘iá»ƒm káº¿t thĂºc bĂªn trĂ¡i Node Heap (Left Center)
    const x3 = target.x;
    const y3 = target.y + target.height / 2;

    // 3. TĂ­nh toĂ¡n cĂ¡c Ä‘iá»ƒm Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn kĂ©o uá»‘n má»m máº¡i (Cubic Bezier Control Points)
    const dx = Math.abs(x3 - x0);
    const controlOffset = Math.min(dx * 0.5, 150); // Giá»›i háº¡n uá»‘n tá»‘i Ä‘a 150px

    const x1 = x0 + controlOffset;
    const y1 = y0;

    const x2 = x3 - controlOffset;
    const y2 = y3;

    // 4. Táº¡o chuá»—i SVG Path D
    const pathD = `M ${x0} ${y0} C ${x1} ${y1}, ${x2} ${y2}, ${x3} ${y3}`;

    // 5. TĂ­nh gĂ³c quay cho Ä‘áº§u mÅ©i tĂªn (Arrowhead rotation angle)
    const dy = y3 - y2;
    const dxControl = x3 - x2;
    const arrowheadAngle = Math.atan2(dy, dxControl) * (180 / Math.PI);

    return {
      pathD,
      arrowheadAngle
    };
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Äá»™ng CÆ¡ BiĂªn Dá»‹ch Lá»‡nh DSL TĂ¹y Biáº¿n (DSLEngine TS)

Bá»™ biĂªn dá»‹ch táº­p lá»‡nh cáº¥u trĂºc dá»¯ liá»‡u tá»‘i giáº£n (DSL Engine) phá»¥c vá»¥ hoáº¡t áº£nh trá»±c quan hĂ³a nhanh:

```typescript
export type DSLCommandType = 'ALLOC' | 'PUSH' | 'LINK';

export interface DSLCommand {
  type: DSLCommandType;
  params: string[];
}

export class DSLEngine {
  /**
   * PhĂ¢n tĂ­ch biĂªn dá»‹ch má»™t dĂ²ng lá»‡nh DSL (DSL Line Parser)
   * @param line DĂ²ng lá»‡nh vĂ­ dá»¥: "ALLOC NodeA 12", "PUSH StackB", "LINK NodeA->NodeB"
   */
  public static parseDSLCommand(line: string): DSLCommand {
    const cleaned = line.trim();
    if (!cleaned) {
      throw new Error('DĂ²ng lá»‡nh DSL rá»—ng!');
    }

    const tokens = cleaned.split(/\s+/);
    const typeToken = tokens[0].toUpperCase();

    if (typeToken === 'ALLOC') {
      if (tokens.length < 3) {
        throw new Error("Lá»‡nh ALLOC sai cĂº phĂ¡p! Äá»‹nh dáº¡ng Ä‘Ăºng: ALLOC <nodeId> <value>");
      }
      return { type: 'ALLOC', params: [tokens[1], tokens[2]] };
    } else if (typeToken === 'PUSH') {
      if (tokens.length < 2) {
        throw new Error("Lá»‡nh PUSH sai cĂº phĂ¡p! Äá»‹nh dáº¡ng Ä‘Ăºng: PUSH <value>");
      }
      return { type: 'PUSH', params: [tokens[1]] };
    } else if (typeToken === 'LINK') {
      if (tokens.length < 2 || !tokens[1].includes('->')) {
        throw new Error("Lá»‡nh LINK sai cĂº phĂ¡p! Äá»‹nh dáº¡ng Ä‘Ăºng: LINK <sourceId>-><targetId>");
      }
      const linkParts = tokens[1].split('->');
      return { type: 'LINK', params: [linkParts[0], linkParts[1]] };
    }

    throw new Error(`Tá»« khĂ³a lá»‡nh DSL '${typeToken}' khĂ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c há»— trá»£!`);
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng State Inspector & DSL (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { StateInspectorEngine, BoundingRect, DSLEngine } from './StateInspectorEngine';

describe('Sprint 10 State Inspector & DSL Compiler Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should correctly compute Bezier control coordinates and arrowhead angle', () => {
    const source: BoundingRect = { x: 100, y: 100, width: 50, height: 40 }; // Stack Element
    const target: BoundingRect = { x: 400, y: 300, width: 80, height: 60 }; // Heap Node Card

    const curve = StateInspectorEngine.calculatePointerCurve(source, target);

    // Äiá»ƒm báº¯t Ä‘áº§u (150, 120), Káº¿t thĂºc (400, 330)
    expect(curve.pathD).toContain('M 150 120');
    expect(curve.pathD).toContain('C');
    expect(curve.pathD).toContain('400 330');
    expect(curve.arrowheadAngle).toBeCloseTo(0, 0); // MÅ©i tĂªn hÆ°á»›ng ngang pháº£i gáº§n Ä‘Ăºng
  });

  it('Should successfully compile custom DSL commands and reject invalid syntax', () => {
    // 1. Kiá»ƒm tra lá»‡nh ALLOC
    const cmdAlloc = DSLEngine.parseDSLCommand('ALLOC NodeA 12');
    expect(cmdAlloc.type).toBe('ALLOC');
    expect(cmdAlloc.params).toEqual(['NodeA', '12']);

    // 2. Kiá»ƒm tra lá»‡nh LINK
    const cmdLink = DSLEngine.parseDSLCommand('LINK NodeA->NodeB');
    expect(cmdLink.type).toBe('LINK');
    expect(cmdLink.params).toEqual(['NodeA', 'NodeB']);

    // 3. Sai tá»« khĂ³a lá»‡nh -> Pháº£i nĂ©m ngoáº¡i lá»‡ bĂ¡o lá»—i sáº­p
    expect(() => {
      DSLEngine.parseDSLCommand('DELETE NodeA');
    }).toThrowError("Tá»« khĂ³a lá»‡nh DSL 'DELETE' khĂ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c há»— trá»£!");
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ giáº£i thuáº­t tĂ­nh toĂ¡n uá»‘n cong pointer Bezier SVG bĂ¡m sĂ¡t resize cá»­a sá»• cá»±c nháº¡y dÆ°á»›i 5ms cĂ¹ng bá»™ biĂªn dá»‹ch táº­p lá»‡nh DSL tĂ¹y biáº¿n siĂªu nhanh 100% Client-side Ä‘áº£m báº£o mĂ´i trÆ°á»ng giĂ¡m sĂ¡t bá»™ nhá»› Call Stack-Heap cá»§a sinh viĂªn luĂ´n chuáº©n chá»‰ vĂ  sá»‘ng Ä‘á»™ng nháº¥t.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 11 Feature Plan - System Design Network Simulator & Failover Smoke

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 11: System Design Network Simulator & Failover Smoke**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m trá»±c quan hĂ³a cĂ¡c kiáº¿n trĂºc phĂ¢n tĂ¡n thá»±c táº¿ (MĂ´ hĂ¬nh Server Client, Táº£i cĂ¢n báº±ng Load Balancer, Äá»“ng bá»™ dá»¯ liá»‡u DB Replication) vĂ  mĂ´ phá»ng sá»± cá»‘ máº¡ng bá»‘c khĂ³i sáº­p nguá»“n mĂ¡y chá»§.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p mĂ´ phá»ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n máº¡ng phĂ¢n tĂ¡n vĂ  Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ khĂ³i sáº­p nguá»“n Canvas 2D:
*   **MĂ´ Phá»ng PhĂ¢n Phá»‘i Táº£i TrĂ²n (Round-Robin Load Balancer):** Minh há»a Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n táº£i HTTP request. MÆ°a háº¡t Neon Green HTTP bay dá»“n dáº­p Ä‘áº¿n Load Balancer vĂ  Ä‘Æ°á»£c phĂ¢n phá»‘i trĂ²n Ä‘á»u (Round-Robin) tá»›i cĂ¡c Web Servers.
*   **Äá»“ng Bá»™ Database Trá»… Äá»™ng (DB Replication Lag Queue):** Minh há»a trá»… Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ (100ms - 5000ms slider) giá»¯a DB Primary vĂ  Replica báº±ng hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i sá»± kiá»‡n hoĂ£n thá»i gian thá»±c.
*   **KhĂ³i Bá»‘c Háº¡t Khi Sáº­p MĂ¡y Chá»§ (Failover Smoke Canvas Emitter):** Khi click sáº­p nguá»“n Server dÆ°á»›i **5ms**, má»™t mĂ¡y phun luá»“ng háº¡t bá»¥i khĂ³i xĂ¡m tá»± phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng phun cuá»“n cuá»™n 60 FPS, tá»± thu há»“i GC thĂ¡o dá»¡ RAM khi háº¡t tan biáº¿n biáº¿n máº¥t.

---

## 2. Danh sĂ¡ch cĂ´ng viá»‡c (Task Backlog)

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   Bá»™ mĂ´ phá»ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n háº¡t HTTP Neon bay mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS Canvas.

*   Giáº£i phĂ³ng sáº¡ch sáº½ 100% háº¡t khĂ³i khá»i RAM mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch khi tan biáº¿n trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ GC.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - System Design & Failover Smoke (Sprint 11)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh mĂ´ phá»ng kiáº¿n trĂºc há»‡ thá»‘ng **SystemDesignEngine** phĂ¢n phá»‘i táº£i, Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ trá»… vĂ  mĂ¡y phun háº¡t bá»¥i khĂ³i sáº­p nguá»“n Canvas **FailureSmokeEmitterEngine** trong Sprint 11.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Äiá»u Phá»‘i PhĂ¢n Phá»‘i Táº£i & Trá»… Äá»“ng Bá»™ (SystemDesignEngine TS)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i máº¡ng lÆ°á»›i Load Balancer Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n háº¡t HTTP Neon vĂ  phĂ¢n bá»• hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i trá»… Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ DB Replication:

```typescript
export interface NetworkNode {
  id: string;
  type: 'CLIENT' | 'LOAD_BALANCER' | 'WEB_SERVER' | 'DATABASE_PRIMARY' | 'DATABASE_REPLICA';
  status: 'HEALTHY' | 'DOWN';
}

export class SystemDesignEngine {
  private nodes: Map<string, NetworkNode> = new Map();
  private webServerRoundRobinIndex = 0;

  public registerNode(node: NetworkNode): void {
    this.nodes.set(node.id, node);
  }

  /**
   * Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n phĂ¢n phá»‘i táº£i vĂ²ng trĂ²n (Round-Robin Load Balancer Router)
   */
  public routeRequest(): string {
    const servers = Array.from(this.nodes.values()).filter(
      n => n.type === 'WEB_SERVER' && n.status === 'HEALTHY'
    );

    if (servers.length === 0) {
      throw new Error('503 Service Unavailable: ToĂ n bá»™ cá»¥m Web Servers Ä‘Ă£ sáº­p nguá»“n!');
    }

    // Láº¥y Server tiáº¿p theo theo vĂ²ng trĂ²n (Round-Robin index)
    const targetServer = servers[this.webServerRoundRobinIndex % servers.length];
    this.webServerRoundRobinIndex++;

    return targetServer.id;
  }

  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n hĂ ng Ä‘á»£i trá»… Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ cÆ¡ sá»Ÿ dá»¯ liá»‡u (DB Replication delay math)
   * @param baseDelayMs Äá»™ trá»… cáº¥u hĂ¬nh máº·c Ä‘á»‹nh (100ms - 5000ms slider)
   * @param dataSizeKb KĂ­ch thÆ°á»›c gĂ³i dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘á»“ng bá»™
   */
  public static calculateReplicationLag(baseDelayMs: number, dataSizeKb: number): number {
    // Äá»™ trá»… tá»‰ lá»‡ thuáº­n vá»›i dung lÆ°á»£ng dá»¯ liá»‡u: delay = baseDelay + (size * 1.5)
    return baseDelayMs + dataSizeKb * 1.5;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. MĂ¡y Phun Háº¡t Bá»¥i KhĂ³i Khi Sáº­p MĂ¡y Chá»§ (FailureSmokeEmitterEngine TS)

Äá»™ng cÆ¡ váº­t lĂ½ Canvas 2D phun háº¡t bá»¥i khĂ³i xĂ¡m tá»± phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng 60 FPS khi sáº­p mĂ¡y chá»§, tĂ­ch há»£p thĂ¡o dá»¡ thĂ¡o thu há»“i háº¡t tan biáº¿n khá»i RAM trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ GC Client-side:

```typescript
export interface SmokeParticle {
  x: number;
  y: number;
  vx: number;
  vy: number;
  alpha: number;
  size: number;
  life: number; // Tuá»•i thá» háº¡t cĂ²n láº¡i [ms]
}

export class FailureSmokeEmitterEngine {
  private particles: SmokeParticle[] = [];
  private maxParticles = 60;

  /**
   * KĂ­ch ná»• phĂ¡t tháº£i luá»“ng khĂ³i xĂ¡m khi Server sáº­p nguá»“n (Emit Smoke Shockwave)
   */
  public emitFailureSmoke(centerX: number, centerY: number): void {
    for (let i = 0; i < 25; i++) {
      this.particles.push({
        x: centerX,
        y: centerY,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2, // VĂ¢n tá»‘c ngang ngáº«u nhiĂªn
        vy: -Math.random() * 2 - 1,    // VĂ¢n tá»‘c hÆ°á»›ng bay lĂªn
        alpha: 0.8,
        size: Math.random() * 15 + 8,
        life: 1000 // Sá»‘ng trong 1 giĂ¢y (1000ms)
      });
    }
  }

  /**
   * Cáº­p nháº­t tá»a Ä‘á»™ háº¡t khĂ³i bay vĂ  triá»‡t tiĂªu thu há»“i háº¡t cÅ© (Update & GC cycle)
   * Váº­n hĂ nh 60 FPS rAF
   */
  public updateParticles(deltaTime: number): void {
    this.particles.forEach(p => {
      p.x += p.vx * (deltaTime / 16.67);
      p.y += p.vy * (deltaTime / 16.67);
      p.alpha -= 0.012 * (deltaTime / 16.67); // Giáº£m dáº§n Ä‘á»™ má» áº£o alpha
      p.life -= deltaTime;
    });

    // Thu há»“i rĂ¡c GC Client-side: ThĂ¡o dá»¡ lá»c sáº¡ch sáº½ cĂ¡c háº¡t Ä‘Ă£ cháº¿t hoáº·c tan biáº¿n
    this.particles = this.particles.filter(p => p.life > 0 && p.alpha > 0);
  }

  public getParticles(): SmokeParticle[] {
    return this.particles;
  }

  public clear(): void {
    this.particles = [];
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Kiáº¿n TrĂºc Há»‡ Thá»‘ng (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { SystemDesignEngine, NetworkNode, FailureSmokeEmitterEngine } from './SystemDesignEngine';

describe('Sprint 11 System Design Simulator Unit Tests', () => {
  let engine: SystemDesignEngine;

  beforeEach(() => {
    engine = new SystemDesignEngine();
  });

  it('Should route HTTP requests sequentially using Round-Robin load balancing rules', () => {
    engine.registerNode({ id: 'SRV_A', type: 'WEB_SERVER', status: 'HEALTHY' });
    engine.registerNode({ id: 'SRV_B', type: 'WEB_SERVER', status: 'HEALTHY' });

    // Request 1 -> Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n mĂ¡y chá»§ A
    expect(engine.routeRequest()).toBe('SRV_A');
    // Request 2 -> Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n mĂ¡y chá»§ B (Round-Robin xoay vĂ²ng)
    expect(engine.routeRequest()).toBe('SRV_B');
    // Request 3 -> Quay láº¡i mĂ¡y chá»§ A
    expect(engine.routeRequest()).toBe('SRV_A');
  });

  it('Should recalculate database replication latency based on slider input values and payload sizes', () => {
    const lag = SystemDesignEngine.calculateReplicationLag(500, 100); // 500ms cÆ¡ báº£n, 100kb data

    expect(lag).toBe(650); // 500 + 100 * 1.5 = 650ms
  });

  it('Should successfully emit failure smoke particles and filter out dead particles during GC cycles', () => {
    const emitter = new FailureSmokeEmitterEngine();

    // Sáº­p server táº¡i tá»a Ä‘á»™ (200, 200) -> Phun 25 háº¡t khĂ³i
    emitter.emitFailureSmoke(200, 200);
    expect(emitter.getParticles().length).toBe(25);

    // Giáº£ láº­p trĂ´i Ä‘i thá»i gian 2 giĂ¢y (2000ms) -> ToĂ n bá»™ háº¡t khĂ³i Ä‘á»u cháº¿t
    emitter.updateParticles(2000);

    // Bá»™ lá»c GC hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng -> XĂ³a sáº¡ch sáº½ háº¡t cháº¿t khá»i máº£ng RAM
    expect(emitter.getParticles().length).toBe(0);
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ bá»™ mĂ´ phá»ng phĂ¢n phá»‘i táº£i cĂ¢n báº±ng Load Balancer trĂ²n Ä‘á»u káº¿t há»£p Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ bá»¥i khĂ³i sáº­p nguá»“n Canvas 60 FPS tá»‘i Æ°u giáº£i phĂ³ng rĂ¡c RAM GC mang láº¡i má»™t cĂ¡i nhĂ¬n trá»±c quan sinh Ä‘á»™ng sĂ¢u sáº¯c nháº¥t vá» cáº¥u trĂºc máº¡ng kiáº¿n trĂºc phĂ¢n tĂ¡n cho há»c viĂªn.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 12 Feature Plan - Gamification Rewards & Embed Widget Generator

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 12: Gamification Rewards & Embed Widget Generator**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m tĂ­ch há»£p pháº§n thÆ°á»Ÿng thÄƒng háº¡ng há»c viĂªn (XP, Huy hiá»‡u Ä‘áº¡t Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m) vĂ  bá»™ sinh mĂ£ Embed Iframe chia sáº» khá»‘i trá»±c quan hĂ³a tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c DSA lĂªn blog/tĂ i liá»‡u cĂ¡ nhĂ¢n cá»§a sinh viĂªn.

*   **Há»‡ Thá»‘ng TĂ­ch LÅ©y XP Há»c Táº­p (Gamification Reward Engine):** TĂ­nh toĂ¡n tĂ­ch lÅ©y Ä‘iá»ƒm kinh nghiá»‡m XP khi lĂ m tráº¯c nghiá»‡m Ä‘Ăºng hoáº·c giáº£i bĂ i táº­p, tá»± Ä‘á»™ng tĂ­nh toĂ¡n thÄƒng cáº¥p level vĂ  hiá»ƒn thá»‹ huy hiá»‡u Ä‘áº¡t thĂ nh tĂ­ch Neon phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng.
*   **TrĂ¬nh Sinh MĂ£ Embed Widget (Embedding Code Generator):** Cho phĂ©p xuáº¥t mĂ£ nhĂºng Iframe cáº¥u hĂ¬nh kĂ­ch thÆ°á»›c vĂ  giao diá»‡n tĂ¹y chá»n (KĂ­nh má» Neon Slate) Ä‘á»ƒ há»c viĂªn nhĂºng trá»±c tiáº¿p bá»™ trá»±c quan hĂ³a thuáº­t toĂ¡n tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c DSA vĂ o Blog, WordPress hoáº·c Notion cá»§a há».

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Gamification Rewards & Embed Widget (Sprint 12)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh sinh mĂ£ nhĂºng **EmbeddingWidgetGenerator** vĂ  há»‡ thá»‘ng tĂ­nh toĂ¡n thÄƒng cáº¥p thÄƒng Ä‘iá»ƒm **GamificationRewardEngine** trong Sprint 12.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Sinh Chuá»—i MĂ£ NhĂºng Iframe TĂ¹y Biáº¿n (EmbeddingWidgetGenerator TS)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m xĂ¢y dá»±ng cĂ¡c tham sá»‘ cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Iframe nhĂºng nháº¹ Ä‘á»™c láº­p táº£i siĂªu nhanh dÆ°á»›i mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch:

```typescript
export interface WidgetOptions {
  algorithmId: string;
  theme: 'GLASS_SLATE_DARK' | 'NEON_CYAN_LIGHT';
  width: number;
  height: number;
  allowInteraction: boolean;
}

export class EmbeddingWidgetGenerator {
  /**
   * Sinh chuá»—i tháº» nhĂºng Iframe an toĂ n (Iframe Embed Tag Builder)
   * @param baseUrl Äá»‹a chá»‰ gá»‘c cá»§a trang cháº¡y standalone widget
   * @param options CĂ¡c tĂ¹y chá»n kĂ­ch thÆ°á»›c, giao diá»‡n cáº¥u hĂ¬nh
   */
  public static generateIframeHtml(baseUrl: string, options: WidgetOptions): string {
    if (!baseUrl) {
      throw new Error('Äá»‹a chá»‰ gá»‘c Base URL khĂ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c rá»—ng!');
    }

    // XĂ¢y dá»±ng chuá»—i tham sá»‘ truy váº¥n an toĂ n (Safe URL query param builder)
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    params.set('algo', options.algorithmId);
    params.set('theme', options.theme);
    params.set('interactive', options.allowInteraction ? '1' : '0');
    params.set('embed', 'true'); // Cháº·n thanh Ä‘iá»u hÆ°á»›ng gá»‘c trĂ¡nh cháº­t chá»™i layout

    const embedUrl = `${baseUrl}?${params.toString()}`;

    // Táº¡o mĂ£ nhĂºng Iframe chuáº©n HTML5 tĂ­ch há»£p báº£o máº­t sandbox
    return `<iframe src="${embedUrl}" width="${options.width}" height="${options.height}" style="border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 12px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.37);" allow="autoplay; fullscreen" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>`;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Há»‡ Thá»‘ng TĂ­nh Äiá»ƒm XP ThÄƒng Cáº¥p ThĂ nh TĂ­ch (GamificationRewardEngine TS)

```typescript
export interface UserProgress {
  userId: string;
  currentXp: number;
  currentLevel: number;
  achievements: string[];
}

export class GamificationRewardEngine {
  private static XP_PER_LEVEL = 1000; // NgÆ°á»¡ng thÄƒng háº¡ng 1000 XP/Level

  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n tĂ­ch lÅ©y XP há»c táº­p vĂ  thÄƒng háº¡ng cáº¥p Ä‘á»™ (XP Accumulator & Level Up)
   * @param progress Tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh hiá»‡n táº¡i cá»§a sinh viĂªn
   * @param earnedXp Äiá»ƒm XP má»›i tĂ­ch lÅ©y Ä‘Æ°á»£c
   */
  public static addXp(progress: UserProgress, earnedXp: number): { updatedProgress: UserProgress; leveledUp: boolean } {
    if (earnedXp < 0) {
      throw new Error('KhĂ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c cá»™ng Ä‘iá»ƒm XP Ă¢m!');
    }

    const updated = { ...progress, achievements: [...progress.achievements] };
    updated.currentXp += earnedXp;

    // TĂ­nh toĂ¡n cáº¥p Ä‘á»™ má»›i (LÅ©y tiáº¿n tuyáº¿n tĂ­nh: Level = floor(xp / threshold) + 1)
    const newLevel = Math.floor(updated.currentXp / this.XP_PER_LEVEL) + 1;
    const leveledUp = newLevel > updated.currentLevel;

    if (leveledUp) {
      updated.currentLevel = newLevel;
      
      // Táº·ng huy hiá»‡u Ä‘áº·c biá»‡t chĂºc má»«ng thÄƒng cáº¥p Neon phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng
      const badgeName = `LEVEL_${newLevel}_ACHIEVER`;
      if (!updated.achievements.includes(badgeName)) {
        updated.achievements.push(badgeName);
      }
    }

    return {
      updatedProgress: updated,
      leveledUp
    };
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Xuáº¥t Báº£n & ThÄƒng Háº¡ng (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { EmbeddingWidgetGenerator, WidgetOptions, GamificationRewardEngine, UserProgress } from './EmbeddingWidgetGenerator';

describe('Sprint 12 Gamification & Embedding Widget Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should successfully generate secure HTML iframe tag with search parameters', () => {
    const options: WidgetOptions = {
      algorithmId: 'dijkstra',
      theme: 'GLASS_SLATE_DARK',
      width: 800,
      height: 600,
      allowInteraction: true
    };

    const iframeHtml = EmbeddingWidgetGenerator.generateIframeHtml('https://dsa.edu.vn', options);

    // XĂ¡c thá»±c cáº¥u trĂºc tháº» Iframe
    expect(iframeHtml).toContain('<iframe');
    expect(iframeHtml).toContain('src="https://dsa.edu.vn?algo=dijkstra&theme=GLASS_SLATE_DARK&interactive=1&embed=true"');
    expect(iframeHtml).toContain('width="800"');
    expect(iframeHtml).toContain('height="600"');
    expect(iframeHtml).toContain('sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"');
  });

  it('Should successfully accrue learning XP and trigger levels promotion badges', () => {
    const startProgress: UserProgress = {
      userId: 'STD_99',
      currentXp: 850, // Äang á»Ÿ 850 XP
      currentLevel: 1,
      achievements: []
    };

    // LĂ m bĂ i tráº¯c nghiá»‡m Ä‘Ăºng Ä‘Æ°á»£c táº·ng +200 XP -> VÆ°á»£t ngÆ°á»¡ng 1000 XP -> ThÄƒng cáº¥p level 2
    const result = GamificationRewardEngine.addXp(startProgress, 200);

    expect(result.leveledUp).toBeTruthy();
    expect(result.updatedProgress.currentLevel).toBe(2);
    expect(result.updatedProgress.currentXp).toBe(1050);
    expect(result.updatedProgress.achievements).toContain('LEVEL_2_ACHIEVER');
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ bá»™ sinh chuá»—i tháº» nhĂºng Iframe an toĂ n cáº¥u hĂ¬nh cao cáº¥p káº¿t há»£p Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ tĂ­ch lÅ©y XP há»c táº­p vĂ  thÄƒng háº¡ng huy hiá»‡u thÄƒng háº¡ng 100% Client-side giĂºp há»c viĂªn hĂ o há»©ng thá»±c hĂ nh, chia sáº» kiáº¿n thá»©c trá»±c quan hĂ³a tá»›i cá»™ng Ä‘á»“ng má»™t cĂ¡ch uy tĂ­n, sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u báº­c nháº¥t.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 2 Feature Plan - Basic DSA Array & Sorting Visualizers

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 2: Basic DSA Library - Array & Sorting**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m xĂ¢y dá»±ng cĂ¡c bá»™ trá»±c quan hĂ³a máº£ng sáº¯p xáº¿p hoĂ¡n vá»‹ Ä‘á»™ng (Bubble, Quick, Merge, Heap Sort) cháº¡y mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
Táº¡o dá»±ng cá»¥m thÆ° viá»‡n trá»±c quan hĂ³a máº£ng dá»¯ liá»‡u vĂ  cĂ¡c thuáº­t toĂ¡n sáº¯p xáº¿p kinh Ä‘iá»ƒn:
*   **HoĂ¡n vá»‹ Lerp MÆ°á»£t mĂ  (Smooth Swap Animations):** Khi 2 pháº§n tá»­ máº£ng hoĂ¡n Ä‘á»•i vá»‹ trĂ­, chĂºng di chuyá»ƒn uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n lÆ°á»›t qua nhau báº±ng phĂ©p toĂ¡n Lerp mÆ°á»£t mĂ  dÆ°á»›i **300ms** thay vĂ¬ dá»‹ch chuyá»ƒn giáº­t cá»¥c.
*   **TĂ´ sĂ¡ng PhĂ¢n hoáº¡ch (Partitioning & Compare Glows):** TĂ´ sĂ¡ng viá»n Neon Cyan cĂ¡c pháº§n tá»­ Ä‘ang so sĂ¡nh, viá»n Neon Amber cho chá»‘t Pivot trong QuickSort vĂ  viá»n Neon Emerald khi hoĂ n thĂ nh.
*   **Há»— trá»£ 4 Thuáº­t toĂ¡n Kinh Ä‘iá»ƒn:** Bubble Sort, QuickSort, Merge Sort vĂ  Heap Sort.

---

## 2. Danh sĂ¡ch cĂ´ng viá»‡c (Task Backlog)

2.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh giáº£i thuáº­t hoĂ¡n vá»‹ Lerp Vector di chuyá»ƒn tá»a Ä‘á»™ cĂ¡c cá»™t bar máº£ng.
3.  [ ] TĂ­ch há»£p bá»™ táº¡o hoáº¡t áº£nh hoĂ¡n Ä‘á»•i vá»‹ trĂ­ trong `VCRPlaybackEngine` tá»« Sprint 1.
4.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh logic tĂ´ sĂ¡ng Pivot vĂ  con trá» so sĂ¡nh chá»‰ sá»‘ `i`, `j` bĂ¡m Ä‘uá»•i.
5.  [ ] Viáº¿t Unit tests kiá»ƒm thá»­ hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng sáº¯p xáº¿p Ä‘á»™ng.

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   Hoáº¡t áº£nh hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng co giĂ£n vĂ  hoĂ¡n Ä‘á»•i vá»‹ trĂ­ cháº¡y mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS.
*   CĂ¡c con trá» chá»‰ sá»‘ so sĂ¡nh `i`, `j` vĂ  chá»‘t Pivot Ä‘Æ°á»£c tĂ´ sĂ¡ng Ä‘Ăºng mĂ u Neon HSL quy chuáº©n.
*   Giáº£i phĂ³ng vĂ  há»§y bá» toĂ n bá»™ render loops rAF khi unmount trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ bá»™ nhá»› RAM.
*   Unit tests bao phá»§ 100% logic hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng vĂ  giáº£i thuáº­t sáº¯p xáº¿p.
# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Basic DSA Array & Sorting (Sprint 2)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript vĂ  giáº£i thuáº­t toĂ¡n há»c ná»™i suy Lerp di chuyá»ƒn tá»a Ä‘á»™ cĂ¡c cá»™t bar máº£ng khi hoĂ¡n vá»‹ trong cĂ¡c bá»™ sáº¯p xáº¿p (Bubble, Quick, Merge, Heap Sort) cá»§a Sprint 2.

---

## 1. Thuáº­t toĂ¡n HoĂ¡n vá»‹ Máº£ng Lerp MÆ°á»£t mĂ  (Array Swap Math)

Khi 2 cá»™t bar Ä‘áº¡i diá»‡n cho pháº§n tá»­ máº£ng hoĂ¡n vá»‹ vá»‹ trĂ­, thay vĂ¬ dá»‹ch chuyá»ƒn tá»©c thá»i, há»‡ thá»‘ng sá»­ dá»¥ng phĂ©p ná»™i suy Lerp chuyá»ƒn tiáº¿p tá»a Ä‘á»™ X uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n dÆ°á»›i Ä‘á»“ há»a 60 FPS:

```typescript
export interface BarElement {
  value: number;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  width: number;
  height: number;
  color: string; // HSL Neon Glow
  status: 'IDLE' | 'COMPARING' | 'PIVOT' | 'SWAPPED' | 'SORTED';
}

export class ArraySortingVisualizer {
  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n ná»™i suy Lerp di chuyá»ƒn vá»‹ trĂ­ 2 cá»™t bar hoĂ¡n vá»‹ (Lerp Swap)
   * @param barA Cá»™t pháº§n tá»­ A
   * @param barB Cá»™t pháº§n tá»­ B
   * @param progress Tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh hoĂ¡n vá»‹ [0.0 -> 1.0]
   */
  public static interpolateSwap(
    barA: BarElement,
    barB: BarElement,
    progress: number
  ): { xA: number; xB: number; curveY: number } {
    const targetXA = barB.x;
    const targetXB = barA.x;

    // Ná»™i suy vá»‹ trĂ­ trá»¥c X pháº³ng (Linear X transition)
    const currentXA = barA.x + (targetXA - barA.x) * progress;
    const currentXB = barB.x + (targetXB - barB.x) * progress;

    // Táº¡o Ä‘Æ°á»ng cong uá»‘n lÆ°á»£n hĂ¬nh cung trĂ¡nh Ä‘Ă¨ lĂªn nhau (Arc Y movement)
    // parabol: y = -4 * h * x * (1 - x)
    const arcHeight = 40; 
    const curveY = -4 * arcHeight * progress * (1 - progress);

    return {
      xA: currentXA,
      xB: currentXB,
      curveY: curveY
    };
  }
}
```

---

## 2. TrĂ¬nh BiĂªn Dá»‹ch Hoáº¡t áº¢nh Sáº¯p Xáº¿p Bubble/Quick Sort (Frame Generators)

```typescript
export interface SortFrame {
  stepIndex: number;
  arrayState: number[];
  comparingIndices: [number, number] | null;
  pivotIndex: number | null;
  swappedIndices: [number, number] | null;
  description: string;
}

export class BubbleSortFrameGenerator {
  /**
   * BiĂªn dá»‹ch Bubble Sort sinh cĂ¡c khung hĂ¬nh hoáº¡t áº£nh dĂ²ng thá»i gian
   */
  public static generateFrames(inputArray: number[]): SortFrame[] {
    const frames: SortFrame[] = [];
    const arr = [...inputArray];
    const n = arr.length;
    let step = 0;

    // Khung hĂ¬nh khá»Ÿi táº¡o ban Ä‘áº§u
    frames.push({
      stepIndex: step++,
      arrayState: [...arr],
      comparingIndices: null,
      pivotIndex: null,
      swappedIndices: null,
      description: 'Khá»Ÿi táº¡o máº£ng dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘áº§u vĂ o'
    });

    for (let i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {
      for (let j = 0; j < n - i - 1; j++) {
        // 1. BÆ°á»›c so sĂ¡nh (Comparing)
        frames.push({
          stepIndex: step++,
          arrayState: [...arr],
          comparingIndices: [j, j + 1],
          pivotIndex: null,
          swappedIndices: null,
          description: `So sĂ¡nh máº£ng[${j}] = ${arr[j]} vĂ  máº£ng[${j+1}] = ${arr[j+1]}`
        });

        if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {
          // HoĂ¡n vá»‹
          const temp = arr[j];
          arr[j] = arr[j + 1];
          arr[j + 1] = temp;

          // 2. BÆ°á»›c hoĂ¡n vá»‹ (Swapped)
          frames.push({
            stepIndex: step++,
            arrayState: [...arr],
            comparingIndices: null,
            pivotIndex: null,
            swappedIndices: [j, j + 1],
            description: `HoĂ¡n vá»‹ ${arr[j+1]} vĂ  ${arr[j]}`
          });
        }
      }
      
      // ÄĂ¡nh dáº¥u pháº§n tá»­ cuá»‘i cĂ¹ng Ä‘Ă£ Ä‘Æ°á»£c sáº¯p xáº¿p
      frames.push({
        stepIndex: step++,
        arrayState: [...arr],
        comparingIndices: null,
        pivotIndex: null,
        swappedIndices: null,
        description: `Pháº§n tá»­ máº£ng[${n - i - 1}] Ä‘Ă£ yĂªn vá»‹ Ä‘Ăºng vá»‹ trĂ­`
      });
    }

    return frames;
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Giáº£i Thuáº­t (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { ArraySortingVisualizer, BarElement, BubbleSortFrameGenerator } from './ArraySortingVisualizer';

describe('Sprint 2 Array & Sorting Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should perfectly calculate linear coordinates and parabolic arc height during swap', () => {
    const barA: BarElement = { value: 10, x: 0, y: 100, width: 20, height: 100, color: 'cyan', status: 'IDLE' };
    const barB: BarElement = { value: 20, x: 100, y: 100, width: 20, height: 200, color: 'cyan', status: 'IDLE' };

    // Tiáº¿n trĂ¬nh hoĂ¡n vá»‹ Ä‘áº¡t 50%
    const interpolation = ArraySortingVisualizer.interpolateSwap(barA, barB, 0.5);

    expect(interpolation.xA).toBe(50);
    expect(interpolation.xB).toBe(50);
    expect(interpolation.curveY).toBe(-40); // Äá»‰nh parabol uá»‘n cong vĂ²ng lĂªn Ä‘á»ƒ trĂ¡nh va cháº¡m
  });

  it('Should successfully generate chronological animation frames for Bubble Sort', () => {
    const startArray = [3, 1, 2];
    const frames = BubbleSortFrameGenerator.generateFrames(startArray);

    expect(frames.length).toBeGreaterThan(2);
    expect(frames[0].description).toBe('Khá»Ÿi táº¡o máº£ng dá»¯ liá»‡u Ä‘áº§u vĂ o');
    
    // Kiá»ƒm tra káº¿t quáº£ khung hĂ¬nh cuá»‘i cĂ¹ng Ä‘Ă£ Ä‘Æ°á»£c sáº¯p xáº¿p hoĂ n háº£o
    const lastFrame = frames[frames.length - 1];
    expect(lastFrame.arrayState).toEqual([1, 2, 3]);
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ giáº£i thuáº­t hoĂ¡n vá»‹ máº£ng Lerp Parabol vĂ²ng cung chá»‘ng va cháº¡m 60 FPS cĂ¹ng bá»™ biĂªn dá»‹ch bÆ°á»›c hoáº¡t áº£nh Bubble/Quick Sort sinh cĂ¡c khung hĂ¬nh dĂ²ng thá»i gian cháº·t cháº½ giĂºp há»c viĂªn tiáº¿p thu giáº£i thuáº­t sáº¯p xáº¿p dá»… dĂ ng, trá»±c quan nháº¥t.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 3 Feature Plan - Pseudocode Synchronization & Code Tracking

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 3: Pseudocode Synchronization & Code Tracking**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m liĂªn káº¿t mĂ£ giáº£ (pseudocode) hoáº·c mĂ£ nguá»“n thá»±c táº¿ vá»›i hoáº¡t áº£nh trá»±c quan hĂ³a trĂªn Canvas, Ä‘áº£m báº£o bĂ´i sĂ¡ng chĂ­nh xĂ¡c dĂ²ng lá»‡nh Ä‘ang cháº¡y.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ mĂ£ giáº£ vĂ  Ä‘iá»u hÆ°á»›ng gá»¡ lá»—i trá»±c tiáº¿p:
*   **TĂ´ sĂ¡ng DĂ²ng Ä‘ang cháº¡y (Active Line Highlighting):** Khi giáº£i thuáº­t di chuyá»ƒn qua cĂ¡c bÆ°á»›c (hoĂ¡n vá»‹, so sĂ¡nh, gĂ¡n), dĂ²ng lá»‡nh tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng trong khung Pseudocode hoáº·c Monaco Editor Ä‘Æ°á»£c bĂ´i sĂ¡ng vĂ ng rá»±c Neon Amber ngay láº­p tá»©c dÆ°á»›i **10ms**.
*   **Äá»“ng bá»™ Hai chiá»u (Bi-directional Sync):** 
    *   *Chiá»u xuĂ´i:* Playback VCR cháº¡y bÆ°á»›c K -> TĂ´ sĂ¡ng dĂ²ng lá»‡nh L cá»§a bÆ°á»›c K.
    *   *Chiá»u ngÆ°á»£c:* Nháº¥p chá»n dĂ²ng lá»‡nh L trĂªn Monaco -> VCR tá»± Ä‘á»™ng nháº£y (seek) vá» bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t Ä‘áº§u tiĂªn thá»±c thi dĂ²ng lá»‡nh L Ä‘Ă³.
*   **Báº£ng Äiá»u hÆ°á»›ng DĂ²ng lá»‡nh (Monaco Line Click Decorators):** ThĂªm phĂ­m táº¯t nháº¥p click á»Ÿ lá» Monaco (gutter) Ä‘á»ƒ kĂ­ch hoáº¡t gá»¡ lá»—i nhanh.

---

## 2. Danh sĂ¡ch cĂ´ng viá»‡c (Task Backlog)
1.  [ ] Thiáº¿t káº¿ Component `PseudocodePanel.vue` kĂ­nh má» hiá»ƒn thá»‹ cĂ¡c dĂ²ng mĂ£ giáº£.
2.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh sá»± kiá»‡n káº¿t ná»‘i `MonacoLineSyncerCoordinator` Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ `revealLineInCenter`.
3.  [ ] XĂ¢y dá»±ng báº£n Ä‘á»“ Ă¡nh xáº¡ bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t sang dĂ²ng code `StepToLineMapping` trong AST compiler.
4.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh cÆ¡ cháº¿ cháº·n click lá» trĂ¡i dĂ²ng (gutter click pointer interceptors) Ä‘á»ƒ Ä‘áº·t breakpoints mĂ´ phá»ng.
5.  [ ] Viáº¿t Unit tests kiá»ƒm thá»­ Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ hai chiá»u bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t vĂ  dĂ²ng code.

---

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   BĂ´i sĂ¡ng dĂ²ng lá»‡nh pháº£n há»“i nháº¡y bĂ©n dÆ°á»›i **10ms** khi chuyá»ƒn bÆ°á»›c VCR.
*   Nháº¥p chá»n dĂ²ng lá»‡nh Monaco nháº£y chĂ­nh xĂ¡c VCR vá» bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng.
*   Giáº£i phĂ³ng vĂ  há»§y bá» toĂ n bá»™ custom listeners sá»± kiá»‡n Monaco khi unmount Ä‘á»ƒ trĂ¡nh rĂ² rá»‰ RAM.
*   Unit tests bao phá»§ 100% logic Ă¡nh xáº¡ chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t sang sá»‘ dĂ²ng code.
# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Pseudocode Synchronization & Monaco Hooks (Sprint 3)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript vĂ  cÆ¡ cháº¿ tĂ­ch há»£p Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ hai chiá»u giá»¯a bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t Canvas vĂ  sá»‘ dĂ²ng code hiá»ƒn thá»‹ trĂªn Monaco Editor trong Sprint 3.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh Äá»“ng Bá»™ Hai Chiá»u Code & Giáº£i Thuáº­t (PseudocodeSyncer TypeScript)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m Ă¡nh xáº¡ hai chiá»u giá»¯a chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c hoáº¡t áº£nh giáº£i thuáº­t vĂ  sá»‘ dĂ²ng code dĂ²ng lá»‡nh Ä‘ang thá»±c thi:

```typescript
export interface LineMapping {
  stepIndex: number;
  lineNumber: number;
  codeSnippet: string;
}

export class PseudocodeSyncer {
  private mappings: LineMapping[] = [];

  constructor(mappings: LineMapping[]) {
    this.mappings = mappings;
  }

  /**
   * Truy váº¥n sá»‘ dĂ²ng code á»©ng vá»›i chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t K (Forward Lookup)
   */
  public getLineForStep(stepIndex: number): number | null {
    const found = this.mappings.find(m => m.stepIndex === stepIndex);
    return found ? found.lineNumber : null;
  }

  /**
   * Truy váº¥n bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t Ä‘áº§u tiĂªn thá»±c thi sá»‘ dĂ²ng code L (Reverse Lookup - Seek Step)
   */
  public getFirstStepForLine(lineNumber: number): number | null {
    const found = this.mappings.find(m => m.lineNumber === lineNumber);
    return found ? found.stepIndex : null;
  }

  /**
   * Cáº­p nháº­t lá»›p CSS bĂ´i sĂ¡ng dĂ²ng Ä‘ang cháº¡y trĂªn Monaco Editor dÆ°á»›i 10ms
   */
  public static highlightMonacoLine(
    editorInstance: any,
    lineNumber: number,
    previousDecorations: string[]
  ): string[] {
    if (!editorInstance) return previousDecorations;

    // Cuá»™n dĂ²ng code vá» trung tĂ¢m mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS
    editorInstance.revealLineInCenter(lineNumber, 0); // 0 = ScrollType.Smooth

    const newDecorations = [
      {
        range: {
          startLineNumber: lineNumber,
          startColumn: 1,
          endLineNumber: lineNumber,
          endColumn: 1
        },
        options: {
          isWholeLine: true,
          className: 'monaco-pseudocode-active-line-glow', // TĂªn lá»›p CSS bá»c Neon Amber viá»n trĂ¡i
          marginClassName: 'monaco-pseudocode-gutter-decorator'
        }
      }
    ];

    // Cáº­p nháº­t Ä‘Ă¨ trang trĂ­ cÅ©
    return editorInstance.deltaDecorations(previousDecorations, newDecorations);
  }
}
```

---

## 2. TÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c Nháº¥p chá»n DĂ²ng lá»‡nh Nháº£y BÆ°á»›c (Gutter Click Interceptor)

Äá»ƒ cho phĂ©p há»c viĂªn tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c nháº¥p dĂ²ng nháº£y bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t, Monaco Editor Ä‘Æ°á»£c cĂ i Ä‘áº·t sá»± kiá»‡n cháº·n click:

```typescript
export class MonacoGutterClickInterceptor {
  private editorInstance: any = null;
  private onLineClickCallback: (lineNumber: number) => void;

  constructor(editor: any, onLineClick: (lineNumber: number) => void) {
    this.editorInstance = editor;
    this.onLineClickCallback = onLineClick;
    this.setupListeners();
  }

  private setupListeners(): void {
    if (!this.editorInstance) return;

    // Láº¯ng nghe sá»± kiá»‡n click chuá»™t trĂªn Monaco Editor
    this.editorInstance.onMouseDown((e: any) => {
      // e.target.type: 3 = Gutter (Lá» trĂ¡i sá»‘ dĂ²ng)
      if (e.target.type === 3 || e.target.type === 4) {
        const lineNumber = e.target.position.lineNumber;
        this.onLineClickCallback(lineNumber);
      }
    });
  }

  public destroy(): void {
    this.editorInstance = null;
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Äá»“ng Bá»™ Hai Chiá»u (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import { PseudocodeSyncer, LineMapping } from './PseudocodeSyncer';

describe('Sprint 3 Pseudocode Synchronization Unit Tests', () => {
  let syncer: PseudocodeSyncer;
  let mockMappings: LineMapping[];

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockMappings = [
      { stepIndex: 0, lineNumber: 5, codeSnippet: 'let pivot = arr[high]' },
      { stepIndex: 1, lineNumber: 8, codeSnippet: 'swap(arr, i, j)' },
      { stepIndex: 2, lineNumber: 12, codeSnippet: 'return i + 1' }
    ];
    syncer = new PseudocodeSyncer(mockMappings);
  });

  it('Should correctly find matching line number for current playback step index', () => {
    const line = syncer.getLineForStep(1);

    expect(line).toBe(8); // BÆ°á»›c 1 á»©ng vá»›i dĂ²ng 8 hoĂ¡n vá»‹
  });

  it('Should successfully seek to first algorithm step when clicking line number', () => {
    const step = syncer.getFirstStepForLine(12);

    expect(step).toBe(2); // DĂ²ng 12 á»©ng vá»›i bÆ°á»›c káº¿t thĂºc 2
  });

  it('Should return null for non-existent step indices or line bounds', () => {
    const line = syncer.getLineForStep(99);
    expect(line).toBeNull();

    const step = syncer.getFirstStepForLine(99);
    expect(step).toBeNull();
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ bá»™ giáº£i mĂ£ Ă¡nh xáº¡ hai chiá»u bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t sang dĂ²ng code Monaco Editor vĂ  bá»™ Ä‘Ă¡nh cháº·n nháº¥p chá»n gutter lá» dĂ²ng mang láº¡i sá»± kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t gá»¡ lá»—i nháº¡y bĂ©n, khoa há»c hĂ ng Ä‘áº§u cho sinh viĂªn tá»± tin thá»±c hĂ nh giáº£i thuáº­t.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 4 Feature Plan - Interactive Quiz & Lecture System

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 4: Interactive Quiz & Lecture System**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m tĂ­ch há»£p bĂ i giáº£ng Ä‘iá»‡n tá»­ lĂ½ thuyáº¿t slide lÆ°á»›t Ăªm vá»›i bá»™ mĂ¡y Ä‘áº­p nhá»‹p hoáº¡t áº£nh DSA VCR vĂ  bá»™ cĂ¢u há»i tráº¯c nghiá»‡m Canvas tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tá»± Ä‘á»™ng.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ bĂ i giáº£ng slide lĂ½ thuyáº¿t vĂ  cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m mĂ£ nguá»“n:
*   **Äá»“ng bá»™ Slide & Giáº£i thuáº­t (Slide-to-Algorithm Sync):** Khi há»c viĂªn Ä‘á»c tá»›i slide sá»‘ 3 giáº£i thĂ­ch "Pivot Partitioning QuickSort", Canvas trá»±c quan bĂªn pháº£i tá»± Ä‘á»™ng nháº£y Ä‘áº¿n Ä‘Ăºng bÆ°á»›c hoáº¡t áº£nh gá»¡ lá»—i tÆ°Æ¡ng thĂ­ch Ä‘á»ƒ minh há»a trá»±c quan.
*   **Cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm Tráº¯c nghiá»‡m Canvas (Canvas Interactive Quiz Engine):** Cung cáº¥p cĂ¡c cĂ¢u há»i tráº¯c nghiá»‡m lá»±a chá»n Ä‘Ă¡p Ă¡n hoáº·c click chá»n trá»±c tiáº¿p dĂ²ng code Monaco Editor, cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tá»± Ä‘á»™ng tĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»· lá»‡ Ä‘áº¡t 80%.
*   **Kiá»ƒm tra tĂ­nh tuĂ¢n thá»§ mĂ£ (Code Compliance Linter):** Soi xĂ©t mĂ£ nguá»“n tĂ¹y biáº¿n há»c viĂªn viáº¿t dÆ°á»›i Client-side báº±ng AST Linter kiá»ƒm tra Ä‘áº§y Ä‘á»§ cĂ¡c tá»« khĂ³a báº¯t buá»™c trÆ°á»›c khi cháº¡y.

---

## 2. Danh sĂ¡ch cĂ´ng viá»‡c (Task Backlog)
1.  [ ] Thiáº¿t káº¿ Component `InteractiveLectureSlides.vue` kĂ­nh má» hiá»ƒn thá»‹ vÄƒn báº£n slide.
2.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i viĂªn slide `LecturePlaybackCoordinator` báº¯t sá»± kiá»‡n Ä‘á»•i trang.
3.  [ ] XĂ¢y dá»±ng bá»™ mĂ¡y cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m thĂ´ng minh `QuizEvaluationEngine` Client-side.
4.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh static linter `verifyCodeCompliance` phĂ¢n tĂ­ch tá»« khĂ³a báº¯t buá»™c dÆ°á»›i RAM.
5.  [ ] Viáº¿t Unit tests kiá»ƒm thá»­ cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ slide.

---

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   Äá»•i trang Slide tá»± Ä‘á»™ng kĂ­ch hoáº¡t nháº£y VCR bÆ°á»›c hoáº¡t áº£nh Canvas tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng chuáº©n xĂ¡c.
*   Bá»™ linter mĂ£ nguá»“n kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t cháº·t cháº½ tá»« khĂ³a báº¯t buá»™c, pháº£n há»“i thĂ´ng bĂ¡o sai dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.
*   Thu há»“i sáº¡ch sáº½ cĂ¡c listeners sá»± kiá»‡n slide khi unmount Ä‘á» phĂ²ng rĂ² rá»‰ RAM.
*   Unit tests bao phá»§ 100% logic cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m vĂ  kiá»ƒm tra code compliance.
# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Interactive Quiz & Lecture System (Sprint 4)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript vĂ  cÆ¡ cháº¿ Ä‘iá»u phá»‘i Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ Slide bĂ i giáº£ng Ä‘iá»‡n tá»­ cĂ¹ng bá»™ cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m thĂ´ng minh Client-side trong Sprint 4.

---

## 1. Bá»™ Äiá»u Phá»‘i BĂ i Giáº£ng Slide & Giáº£i Thuáº­t (LecturePlaybackCoordinator TS)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m phá»‘i há»£p Ä‘á»•i trang slide lĂ½ thuyáº¿t vĂ  Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ tá»± nháº£y bÆ°á»›c giáº£i thuáº­t VCR:

```typescript
export interface SlideEvent {
  slideId: string;
  triggerFrameIndex: number; // Chá»‰ sá»‘ bÆ°á»›c hoáº¡t áº£nh DSA tÆ°Æ¡ng thĂ­ch
  highlightSourceLine: number;
}

export class LecturePlaybackCoordinator {
  private currentSlideIndex = 0;
  private slideEvents: SlideEvent[] = [];
  private onTriggerCallback: (event: SlideEvent) => void;

  constructor(events: SlideEvent[], onTrigger: (event: SlideEvent) => void) {
    this.slideEvents = events;
    this.onTriggerCallback = onTrigger;
  }

  /**
   * Chuyá»ƒn slide lĂ½ thuyáº¿t tiáº¿p theo (Next Slide)
   */
  public nextSlide(): void {
    if (this.currentSlideIndex < this.slideEvents.length - 1) {
      this.currentSlideIndex++;
      this.onTriggerCallback(this.slideEvents[this.currentSlideIndex]);
    }
  }

  /**
   * LĂ¹i láº¡i slide lĂ½ thuyáº¿t phĂ­a trÆ°á»›c (Prev Slide)
   */
  public prevSlide(): void {
    if (this.currentSlideIndex > 0) {
      this.currentSlideIndex--;
      this.onTriggerCallback(this.slideEvents[this.currentSlideIndex]);
    }
  }

  public getCurrentSlideIndex(): number {
    return this.currentSlideIndex;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Äá»™ng CÆ¡ Cháº¥m Äiá»ƒm Tráº¯c Nghiá»‡m & Kiá»ƒm Tra Code (QuizEvaluationEngine TS)

```typescript
export interface QuizQuestion {
  id: string;
  correctAnswer: string;
  maxScore: number;
}

export class QuizEvaluationEngine {
  /**
   * Cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm Ä‘Ă¡p Ă¡n tráº¯c nghiá»‡m tĂ­nh toĂ¡n tá»‰ lá»‡ vÆ°á»£t qua 80%
   */
  public static calculateQuizScore(
    answers: Record<string, string>,
    questions: QuizQuestion[]
  ): { totalScore: number; passed: boolean } {
    let score = 0;
    let maxPossible = 0;

    questions.forEach(q => {
      maxPossible += q.maxScore;
      if (answers[q.id] === q.correctAnswer) {
        score += q.maxScore;
      }
    });

    const passed = score >= maxPossible * 0.8; // NgÆ°á»¡ng Ä‘áº¡t 80% Ä‘iá»ƒm sá»‘
    return { totalScore: score, passed };
  }

  /**
   * Kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t tÄ©nh mĂ£ nguá»“n tĂ¹y biáº¿n cá»§a há»c viĂªn (Static compliance check)
   * Kiá»ƒm duyá»‡t tá»« khĂ³a báº¯t buá»™c dÆ°á»›i RAM dÆ°á»›i 2ms
   */
  public static verifyCodeCompliance(
    studentCode: string,
    mandatoryKeywords: string[]
  ): boolean {
    const tokens = studentCode.toLowerCase();
    
    for (const kw of mandatoryKeywords) {
      if (!tokens.includes(kw.toLowerCase())) {
        return false;
      }
    }
    return true;
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng ÄĂ¡nh GiĂ¡ Há»c Táº­p (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { QuizEvaluationEngine, QuizQuestion, LecturePlaybackCoordinator, SlideEvent } from './QuizEvaluationEngine';

describe('Sprint 4 Interactive Quiz & Lecture Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should successfully transition slide index and trigger playback sync callbacks', () => {
    let triggeredEvent: SlideEvent | null = null;
    const mockEvents: SlideEvent[] = [
      { slideId: 'slide-1', triggerFrameIndex: 0, highlightSourceLine: 1 },
      { slideId: 'slide-2', triggerFrameIndex: 5, highlightSourceLine: 10 }
    ];

    const coordinator = new LecturePlaybackCoordinator(mockEvents, (ev) => {
      triggeredEvent = ev;
    });

    expect(coordinator.getCurrentSlideIndex()).toBe(0);

    // Chuyá»ƒn slide tiáº¿p theo -> KĂ­ch hoáº¡t callback Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ bÆ°á»›c 5 giáº£i thuáº­t
    coordinator.nextSlide();
    expect(coordinator.getCurrentSlideIndex()).toBe(1);
    expect(triggeredEvent?.slideId).toBe('slide-2');
    expect(triggeredEvent?.triggerFrameIndex).toBe(5);
  });

  it('Should score multiple-choice answers correctly and lint student code for required keywords', () => {
    const studentCode = `
      function bubbleSort(arr) {
        let temp = arr[i];
        arr[i] = arr[i+1];
        arr[i+1] = temp;
      }
    `;

    // Pháº£i chá»©a tá»« khĂ³a 'temp' vĂ  'bubblesort'
    const isCompliant = QuizEvaluationEngine.verifyCodeCompliance(studentCode, ['temp', 'bubbleSort']);
    expect(isCompliant).toBeTruthy();

    // Thiáº¿u tá»« khĂ³a 'quickSort' -> BĂ¡o vi pháº¡m compliance linter
    const isMissing = QuizEvaluationEngine.verifyCodeCompliance(studentCode, ['quickSort']);
    expect(isMissing).toBeFalsy();
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ bá»™ láº­p lá»‹ch Ä‘á»“ng bá»™ Slide bĂ i giáº£ng hoáº¡t áº£nh Canvas káº¿t há»£p Ä‘á»™ng cÆ¡ cháº¥m Ä‘iá»ƒm tráº¯c nghiá»‡m thĂ´ng minh vĂ  static code compliance linter Client-side Ä‘áº£m báº£o cháº¥t lÆ°á»£ng giáº£ng dáº¡y DSA lĂ½ thuyáº¿t thá»±c hĂ nh luĂ´n cháº·t cháº½, tá»‘i tĂ¢n tuyá»‡t Ä‘á»‘i.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 5 Feature Plan - Interactive Playground & Custom Input

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 5: Interactive Playground & Custom Input**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m xĂ¢y dá»±ng sĂ¢n chÆ¡i tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c tá»± do (Playground) giĂºp há»c sinh click váº½ Ä‘á»“ thá»‹/cĂ¢y nhá»‹ phĂ¢n vĂ  há»™p náº¡p dá»¯ liá»‡u máº£ng tĂ¹y biáº¿n (Custom Input) gá»¡ lá»—i thuáº­t toĂ¡n cá»§a riĂªng mĂ¬nh.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p náº¡p dá»¯ liá»‡u máº£ng tĂ¹y chá»‰nh vĂ  tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c tá»± tay váº½ Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ Canvas:
*   **Há»™p Náº¡p Dá»¯ Liá»‡u TĂ¹y Biáº¿n (Custom Input Parser):** Cho phĂ©p há»c viĂªn nháº­p chuá»—i máº£ng tĂ¹y chá»‰nh (vĂ­ dá»¥: `[12, 5, 8, 20]`), ma tráº­n ká» Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ hoáº·c tham sá»‘ cĂ¢y nhá»‹ phĂ¢n, tá»± Ä‘á»™ng biĂªn dá»‹ch phĂ¢n tĂ­ch lá»—i cĂº phĂ¡p dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.
*   **SĂ¢n ChÆ¡i Váº½ Tá»± Do Äá»“ Há»a (Interactive Canvas Playground):** Há»c viĂªn nháº¥p Ä‘Ăºp chuá»™t lĂªn mĂ n hĂ¬nh Ä‘á»ƒ tá»± táº¡o cĂ¡c nĂºt Ä‘á»“ thá»‹, nháº¥p kĂ©o chuá»™t ná»‘i liĂªn káº¿t Bezier Neon giá»¯a 2 nĂºt, tá»± Ä‘á»‹nh cáº¥u hĂ¬nh Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ thá»±c hĂ nh giáº£i thuáº­t Dijkstra tĂ¹y chá»n.
*   **XĂ¡c Thá»±c TĂ­nh ÄĂºng Äáº¯n Dá»¯ Liá»‡u (Dynamic Validation):** Kiá»ƒm tra tĂ­nh há»£p lá»‡ cá»§a máº£ng nháº­p vĂ o (trĂ¡nh nháº­p chá»¯, máº£ng quĂ¡ dĂ i hay rá»—ng) trÆ°á»›c khi náº¡p vĂ o VCR engine.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Interactive Playground & Custom Input (Sprint 5)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh phĂ¢n tĂ­ch dá»¯ liá»‡u tĂ¹y biáº¿n **CustomInputParser** vĂ  bá»™ Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c tá»± tay click váº½ nĂºt Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ **InteractivePlaygroundEngine** trong Sprint 5.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh PhĂ¢n TĂ­ch Dá»¯ Liá»‡u TĂ¹y Biáº¿n (CustomInputParser TypeScript)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m biĂªn dá»‹ch cĂ¡c chuá»—i chá»¯ do há»c viĂªn nháº­p thĂ nh máº£ng sá»‘ hoáº·c ma tráº­n ká» Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ há»£p lá»‡:

```typescript
export interface ParsedGraph {
  nodes: Array<{ id: string }>;
  edges: Array<{ sourceId: string; targetId: string; weight: number }>;
}

export class CustomInputParser {
  /**
   * PhĂ¢n tĂ­ch chuá»—i máº£ng tĂ¹y biáº¿n cá»§a sinh viĂªn (vĂ­ dá»¥: "12, 5, 8, 20")
   */
  public static parseNumberArray(input: string): number[] {
    const cleaned = input.trim();
    if (!cleaned) return [];

    // TĂ¡ch báº±ng dáº¥u pháº©y vĂ  lĂ m sáº¡ch khoáº£ng tráº¯ng
    const tokens = cleaned.split(',').map(t => t.trim());
    const result: number[] = [];

    for (const token of tokens) {
      const num = Number(token);
      if (isNaN(num)) {
        throw new Error(`GiĂ¡ trá»‹ '${token}' khĂ´ng pháº£i lĂ  sá»‘ há»£p lá»‡!`);
      }
      result.push(num);
    }

    if (result.length > 20) {
      throw new Error('Äá»™ dĂ i máº£ng tĂ¹y biáº¿n khĂ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c vÆ°á»£t quĂ¡ 20 pháº§n tá»­!');
    }

    return result;
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¢n tĂ­ch ma tráº­n ká» Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ dáº¡ng chuá»—i vÄƒn báº£n (Adjacency Matrix Text Parser)
   * Äá»‹nh dáº¡ng mong Ä‘á»£i: "A-B:10, B-C:20, A-C:50"
   */
  public static parseAdjacencyList(input: string): ParsedGraph {
    const cleaned = input.trim();
    if (!cleaned) return { nodes: [], edges: [] };

    const nodesSet = new Set<string>();
    const edges: Array<{ sourceId: string; targetId: string; weight: number }> = [];

    const tokens = cleaned.split(',').map(t => t.trim());

    for (const token of tokens) {
      // Biá»ƒu thá»©c Regex kiá»ƒm tra Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng "Source-Target:Weight"
      const match = token.match(/^([A-Za-z0-9]+)-([A-Za-z0-9]+):([0-9]+)$/);
      if (!match) {
        throw new Error(`Äá»‹nh dáº¡ng cáº¡nh ná»‘i '${token}' khĂ´ng Ä‘Ăºng! Äá»‹nh dáº¡ng chuáº©n: Source-Target:Weight (VĂ­ dá»¥: A-B:10)`);
      }

      const source = match[1];
      const target = match[2];
      const weight = Number(match[3]);

      nodesSet.add(source);
      nodesSet.add(target);
      edges.push({ sourceId: source, targetId: target, weight });
    }

    const nodes = Array.from(nodesSet).map(id => ({ id }));
    return { nodes, edges };
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Äá»™ng CÆ¡ Váº½ Äá»“ Thá»‹ TÆ°Æ¡ng TĂ¡c (InteractivePlaygroundEngine TS)

Bá»™ Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn nháº¥p chuá»™t Canvas táº¡o má»›i Vertex Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ vĂ  kĂ©o liĂªn káº¿t Bezier cáº¡nh ná»‘i:

```typescript
export interface Vertex {
  id: string;
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

export class InteractivePlaygroundEngine {
  private vertices: Vertex[] = [];
  private selectedVertexId: string | null = null;
  private onStateChange: (vertices: Vertex[]) => void;

  constructor(onStateChange: (vertices: Vertex[]) => void) {
    this.onStateChange = onStateChange;
  }

  /**
   * Táº¡o Vertex Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ má»›i khi nháº¥p Ä‘Ăºp chuá»™t lĂªn tá»a Ä‘á»™ Canvas (Double Click)
   */
  public handleDoubleClick(x: number, y: number): void {
    // Táº¡o ID tá»± Ä‘á»™ng báº±ng chá»¯ cĂ¡i: A, B, C, D...
    const nextId = String.fromCharCode(65 + this.vertices.length); // A = ASCII 65
    
    // Kiá»ƒm tra va cháº¡m khoáº£ng cĂ¡ch trĂ¡nh nĂºt Ä‘Ă¨ khĂ­t lĂªn nhau
    const isOverlap = this.vertices.some(v => {
      const dist = Math.hypot(v.x - x, v.y - y);
      return dist < 50; // BĂ¡n kĂ­nh va cháº¡m 50px
    });

    if (isOverlap) return;

    this.vertices.push({ id: nextId, x, y });
    this.onStateChange([...this.vertices]);
  }

  public selectVertex(id: string): void {
    this.selectedVertexId = id;
  }

  public getSelectedVertexId(): string | null {
    return this.selectedVertexId;
  }

  public clear(): void {
    this.vertices = [];
    this.selectedVertexId = null;
    this.onStateChange([]);
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng PhĂ¢n TĂ­ch & Váº½ NĂºt (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import { CustomInputParser, InteractivePlaygroundEngine } from './CustomInputParser';

describe('Sprint 5 Custom Input & Playground Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should successfully parse numbers list string and reject invalid characters', () => {
    const input = '5, 8, 12, 20';
    const arr = CustomInputParser.parseNumberArray(input);

    expect(arr).toEqual([5, 8, 12, 20]);

    // Nháº­p chá»¯ cĂ¡i -> Báº¯t buá»™c nĂ©m ra ngoáº¡i lá»‡ bĂ¡o lá»—i
    expect(() => {
      CustomInputParser.parseNumberArray('5, abc, 12');
    }).toThrowError("GiĂ¡ trá»‹ 'abc' khĂ´ng pháº£i lĂ  sá»‘ há»£p lá»‡!");
  });

  it('Should successfully parse graph adjacency list formatting text', () => {
    const input = 'A-B:10, B-C:20';
    const graph = CustomInputParser.parseAdjacencyList(input);

    expect(graph.nodes.length).toBe(3);
    expect(graph.nodes.map(n => n.id)).toContain('A');
    expect(graph.edges[0]).toEqual({ sourceId: 'A', targetId: 'B', weight: 10 });

    // Sai Ä‘á»‹nh dáº¡ng -> NĂ©m lá»—i cáº£nh bĂ¡o
    expect(() => {
      CustomInputParser.parseAdjacencyList('A-B=10');
    }).toThrow();
  });

  it('Should add vertices on canvas click avoiding vertex overlapping bounds', () => {
    const mockCallback = vi.fn();
    const engine = new InteractivePlaygroundEngine(mockCallback);

    // Click nĂºt thá»© nháº¥t táº¡i (100, 100) -> ThĂªm thĂ nh cĂ´ng nĂºt 'A'
    engine.handleDoubleClick(100, 100);
    expect(mockCallback).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);

    // Click nĂºt thá»© hai Ä‘Ă¨ sĂ¡t (110, 110) -> Bá»‹ cháº·n va cháº¡m overlap -> KhĂ´ng thĂªm nĂºt 'B'
    engine.handleDoubleClick(110, 110);
    expect(mockCallback).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1); // Sá»‘ láº§n gá»i khĂ´ng tÄƒng
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ bá»™ giáº£i mĂ£ phĂ¢n tĂ­ch máº£ng tĂ¹y biáº¿n vĂ  ma tráº­n ká» Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ cháº·t cháº½ káº¿t há»£p bá»™ cháº·n va cháº¡m chá»“ng Ä‘Ă¨ nĂºt Canvas tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c 60 FPS Ä‘áº£m báº£o sinh viĂªn thá»a sá»©c sĂ¡ng táº¡o máº¡ng lÆ°á»›i tá»± váº½ trá»±c quan há»c táº­p.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 6 Feature Plan - OOP Concepts Visualizer & VTable Sandboxing

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 6: OOP Concepts Visualizer & VTable Sandboxing**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m xĂ¢y dá»±ng sĂ¢n chÆ¡i trá»±c quan hĂ³a cĂ¡c khĂ¡i niá»‡m láº­p trĂ¬nh hÆ°á»›ng Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng nĂ¢ng cao (ÄĂ³ng gĂ³i, Káº¿ thá»«a, Äa hĂ¬nh), biá»ƒu diá»…n cáº¥u trĂºc báº£ng phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c áº£o VTable vĂ  cáº¥p phĂ¡t Ă´ nhá»› Heap lá»›p Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng sandbox mĂ´ phá»ng pháº£n xáº¡ Class OOP vĂ  báº£ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Ä‘a hĂ¬nh VTable:
*   **MĂ´ Phá»ng Pháº£n Xáº¡ Äá»‘i TÆ°á»£ng (OOPReflectionEngine):** MĂ´ phá»ng cĂ¡ch biĂªn dá»‹ch Class káº¿ thá»«a, lÆ°u trá»¯ thuá»™c tĂ­nh ÄĂ³ng gĂ³i (Private/Public/Protected), phĂ¡t hiá»‡n vĂ  bĂ¡o lá»—i truy cáº­p trĂ¡i phĂ©p báº±ng á»• khĂ³a viá»n laser Ä‘á» phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng.
*   **Báº£ng PhÆ°Æ¡ng Thá»©c áº¢o Äa HĂ¬nh (VTable Dispatch Map):** Minh há»a trá»±c quan nguyĂªn lĂ½ Äa hĂ¬nh (Polymorphism) báº±ng báº£ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c áº£o VTable. Khi Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng gá»i hĂ m, háº¡t Neon bay Ä‘áº¿n VTable Ä‘á»ƒ tĂ¬m Ä‘á»‹a chá»‰ hĂ m thá»±c táº¿ cá»§a lá»›p con.
*   **Cáº¥p PhĂ¡t Ă” Nhá»› Heap Äá»‘i TÆ°á»£ng (Heap Allocation Cards):** Váº½ tháº» kĂ­nh má» Glassmorphism mĂ´ táº£ cáº¥u trĂºc váº­t lĂ½ vĂ¹ng nhá»› Heap cá»§a Instance Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng khi khai bĂ¡o tá»« khĂ³a `new`.

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   Sandbox pháº£n xáº¡ OOP hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng Client-side mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS, pháº£n há»“i Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Ä‘a hĂ¬nh dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - OOP Concepts & VTable Dispatch (Sprint 6)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh mĂ´ phá»ng pháº£n xáº¡ Class **OOPReflectionEngine** vĂ  báº£ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Ä‘a hĂ¬nh áº£o **VirtualMethodTable** trong Sprint 6.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh MĂ´ Phá»ng Pháº£n Xáº¡ Lá»›p OOP (OOPReflectionEngine TypeScript)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m biĂªn dá»‹ch vĂ  quáº£n lĂ½ má»‘i quan há»‡ káº¿ thá»«a, Ä‘Ă³ng gĂ³i báº£o máº­t (Private/Public) cá»§a cĂ¡c lá»›p Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Client-side dÆ°á»›i 10ms:

```typescript
export type AccessModifier = 'PUBLIC' | 'PRIVATE' | 'PROTECTED';

export interface ClassProperty {
  name: string;
  type: string;
  modifier: AccessModifier;
}

export interface ClassMethod {
  name: string;
  isVirtual: boolean;
  modifier: AccessModifier;
  overrideClass?: string; // TĂªn lá»›p con override
}

export interface OOPClass {
  name: string;
  parentName: string | null;
  properties: ClassProperty[];
  methods: ClassMethod[];
}

export class OOPReflectionEngine {
  private classRegistry: Map<string, OOPClass> = new Map();

  public registerClass(clazz: OOPClass): void {
    this.classRegistry.set(clazz.name, clazz);
  }

  /**
   * Kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t quyá»n truy cáº­p thuá»™c tĂ­nh (Encapsulation Guard)
   */
  public checkAccessViolation(
    targetClassName: string,
    propertyName: string,
    callerClassName: string
  ): { isViolated: boolean; reason: string } {
    const clazz = this.classRegistry.get(targetClassName);
    if (!clazz) {
      return { isViolated: true, reason: `KhĂ´ng tĂ¬m tháº¥y lá»›p '${targetClassName}'` };
    }

    const prop = clazz.properties.find(p => p.name === propertyName);
    if (!prop) {
      return { isViolated: true, reason: `KhĂ´ng tĂ¬m tháº¥y thuá»™c tĂ­nh '${propertyName}'` };
    }

    if (prop.modifier === 'PRIVATE' && targetClassName !== callerClassName) {
      return {
        isViolated: true,
        reason: `Vi pháº¡m ÄĂ³ng gĂ³i: Thuá»™c tĂ­nh '${propertyName}' cá»§a lá»›p '${targetClassName}' lĂ  PRIVATE. KhĂ´ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c truy cáº­p tá»« lá»›p '${callerClassName}'!`
      };
    }

    return { isViolated: false, reason: 'Há»£p lá»‡' };
  }

  /**
   * DĂ² tĂ¬m phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c káº¿ thá»«a dá»c cĂ¢y pháº£ há»‡ Class (Inheritance lookup)
   */
  public lookupMethod(className: string, methodName: string): string | null {
    let currentName: string | null = className;

    while (currentName !== null) {
      const clazz = this.classRegistry.get(currentName);
      if (!clazz) break;

      const method = clazz.methods.find(m => m.name === methodName);
      if (method) {
        return currentName; // Tráº£ vá» lá»›p thá»±c táº¿ sá»Ÿ há»¯u hĂ m
      }

      currentName = clazz.parentName; // Dá»‹ch chuyá»ƒn ngÆ°á»£c lĂªn cha
    }

    return null;
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Báº£ng Äá»‹nh Tuyáº¿n PhÆ°Æ¡ng Thá»©c áº¢o Äa HĂ¬nh (VirtualMethodTable TS)

MĂ´ táº£ cĂ¡ch thá»©c trĂ¬nh biĂªn dá»‹ch liĂªn káº¿t Ä‘á»™ng (Dynamic Dispatch) tĂ¬m kiáº¿m phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c Ä‘a hĂ¬nh thá»i gian thá»±c:

```typescript
export class VirtualMethodTable {
  /**
   * Äá»‹nh tuyáº¿n Äa hĂ¬nh Äá»™ng phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c áº£o (Dynamic Method Dispatch)
   * @param instanceClassName Lá»›p thá»±c táº¿ cá»§a thá»±c thá»ƒ Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Ä‘Æ°á»£c new
   * @param methodName TĂªn hĂ m Ä‘Æ°á»£c gá»i
   * @param reflectionEngine Äá»™ng cÆ¡ pháº£n xáº¡
   */
  public static dispatch(
    instanceClassName: string,
    methodName: string,
    reflectionEngine: OOPReflectionEngine
  ): { resolvedClass: string; isDynamic: boolean } {
    // DĂ² tĂ¬m lá»›p thá»±c táº¿ chá»©a phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c Ä‘a hĂ¬nh theo pháº£ há»‡
    const resolvedClass = reflectionEngine.lookupMethod(instanceClassName, methodName);
    if (!resolvedClass) {
      throw new Error(`KhĂ´ng thá»ƒ Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c '${methodName}' cho lá»›p '${instanceClassName}'!`);
    }

    // ÄĂ¡nh dáº¥u lĂ  liĂªn káº¿t Ä‘á»™ng náº¿u hĂ m Ä‘Æ°á»£c káº¿ thá»«a hoáº·c override
    const isDynamic = resolvedClass !== instanceClassName;

    return {
      resolvedClass,
      isDynamic
    };
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Pháº£n Xáº¡ & Äa HĂ¬nh (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { OOPReflectionEngine, OOPClass, VirtualMethodTable } from './OOPReflectionEngine';

describe('Sprint 6 OOP Reflection & VTable Unit Tests', () => {
  let engine: OOPReflectionEngine;

  beforeEach(() => {
    engine = new OOPReflectionEngine();

    // Dá»±ng lá»›p Cha: Shape
    const shapeClass: OOPClass = {
      name: 'Shape',
      parentName: null,
      properties: [
        { name: 'color', type: 'string', modifier: 'PUBLIC' },
        { name: 'secretCode', type: 'int', modifier: 'PRIVATE' }
      ],
      methods: [
        { name: 'draw', isVirtual: true, modifier: 'PUBLIC' }
      ]
    };

    // Dá»±ng lá»›p Con: Circle káº¿ thá»«a Shape vĂ  override 'draw'
    const circleClass: OOPClass = {
      name: 'Circle',
      parentName: 'Shape',
      properties: [
        { name: 'radius', type: 'double', modifier: 'PUBLIC' }
      ],
      methods: [
        { name: 'draw', isVirtual: true, modifier: 'PUBLIC', overrideClass: 'Circle' }
      ]
    };

    engine.registerClass(shapeClass);
    engine.registerClass(circleClass);
  });

  it('Should enforce encapsulation rules and catch illegal private access violations', () => {
    // Truy cáº­p há»£p lá»‡ tá»« chĂ­nh Shape tá»›i public color
    let access = engine.checkAccessViolation('Shape', 'color', 'Shape');
    expect(access.isViolated).toBeFalsy();

    // Lá»›p Circle cá»‘ gáº¯ng truy cáº­p private 'secretCode' cá»§a cha Shape -> Pháº£i bĂ¡o vi pháº¡m ÄĂ³ng gĂ³i
    access = engine.checkAccessViolation('Shape', 'secretCode', 'Circle');
    expect(access.isViolated).toBeTruthy();
    expect(access.reason).toContain('Vi pháº¡m ÄĂ³ng gĂ³i');
  });

  it('Should resolve polymorphic dynamic method dispatch VTable route correctly', () => {
    // Khai bĂ¡o kiá»ƒu Shape nhÆ°ng trá» thá»±c thá»ƒ instance cá»§a Circle: Shape s = new Circle()
    // Gá»i s.draw() -> Pháº£i Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n Ä‘á»™ng gá»i hĂ m draw() cá»§a lá»›p con Circle (Dynamic Dispatch)
    const route = VirtualMethodTable.dispatch('Circle', 'draw', engine);

    expect(route.resolvedClass).toBe('Circle');
    expect(route.isDynamic).toBeFalsy(); // resolvedClass trĂ¹ng khá»›p vá»›i instance class thá»±c táº¿
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ sandbox pháº£n xáº¡ Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng OOP kiá»ƒm duyá»‡t Ä‘Ă³ng gĂ³i PRIVATE nghiĂªm ngáº·t káº¿t há»£p báº£ng Ä‘á»‹nh tuyáº¿n phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c áº£o VTable liĂªn káº¿t Ä‘á»™ng 100% Client-side giĂºp há»c viĂªn tháº¥u hiá»ƒu sĂ¢u sáº¯c báº£n cháº¥t khoa há»c mĂ¡y tĂ­nh Ä‘áº±ng sau OOP.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - SOLID Principles & LCOM4 Mathematics (Sprint 7)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh phĂ¢n tĂ­ch káº¿t dĂ­nh lá»›p **SOLIDLCOM4Calculator** Ä‘o lÆ°á»ng nguyĂªn lĂ½ SRP vĂ  bá»™ kiá»ƒm tra tĂ­nh thay tháº¿ **LiskovSubstitutionGuard** trong Sprint 7.

---

## 1. Thuáº­t toĂ¡n TĂ­nh toĂ¡n Chá»‰ sá»‘ Káº¿t dĂ­nh Lá»›p LCOM4 (SRP Cohesion Spec)

NguyĂªn lĂ½ SRP (Single Responsibility Principle) Ä‘Æ°á»£c Ä‘á»‹nh lÆ°á»£ng cá»¥ thá»ƒ báº±ng chá»‰ sá»‘ LCOM4 (Lack of Cohesion in Methods). Thuáº­t toĂ¡n biá»ƒu diá»…n cĂ¡c phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c lá»›p thĂ nh cĂ¡c Ä‘á»‰nh Ä‘á»“ thá»‹, káº¿t ná»‘i 2 phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c náº¿u chĂºng truy cáº­p chung Ă­t nháº¥t má»™t trÆ°á»ng dá»¯ liá»‡u (field):

```typescript
export interface MethodNode {
  name: string;
  accessedFields: Set<string>;
}

export class SOLIDLCOM4Calculator {
  /**
   * TĂ­nh toĂ¡n chá»‰ sá»‘ LCOM4 (SRP Cohesion Math) báº±ng cĂ¡ch Ä‘áº¿m sá»‘ Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ con liĂªn thĂ´ng
   */
  public static calculateLCOM4(methods: MethodNode[]): number {
    if (methods.length === 0) return 0;

    const adj: Record<string, string[]> = {};
    methods.forEach(m => {
      adj[m.name] = [];
    });

    // Táº¡o cĂ¡c cáº¡nh káº¿t ná»‘i Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ giá»¯a cĂ¡c phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c náº¿u chĂºng cĂ³ trÆ°á»ng dá»¯ liá»‡u truy xuáº¥t chung
    for (let i = 0; i < methods.length; i++) {
      for (let j = i + 1; j < methods.length; j++) {
        const m1 = methods[i];
        const m2 = methods[j];
        
        // Kiá»ƒm tra táº­p giao cĂ¡c trÆ°á»ng (Set Intersection)
        const commonFields = [...m1.accessedFields].filter(f => m2.accessedFields.has(f));
        if (commonFields.length > 0) {
          adj[m1.name].push(m2.name);
          adj[m2.name].push(m1.name);
        }
      }
    }

    // Äáº¿m cĂ¡c thĂ nh pháº§n liĂªn thĂ´ng Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ rá»i ráº¡c báº±ng duyá»‡t BFS (Breadth-First Search)
    const visited: Set<string> = new Set();
    let disjointComponentsCount = 0;

    methods.forEach(m => {
      if (!visited.has(m.name)) {
        disjointComponentsCount++;
        this.bfs(m.name, adj, visited);
      }
    });

    return disjointComponentsCount; // LCOM4 = sá»‘ Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ rá»i ráº¡c
  }

  private static bfs(start: string, adj: Record<string, string[]>, visited: Set<string>): void {
    const queue = [start];
    visited.add(start);

    while (queue.length > 0) {
      const u = queue.shift()!;
      adj[u].forEach(v => {
        if (!visited.has(v)) {
          visited.add(v);
          queue.push(v);
        }
      });
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Bá»™ Kiá»ƒm Tra Quy Táº¯c Thay Tháº¿ Liskov (LiskovSubstitutionGuard TS)

Minh há»a viá»‡c kiá»ƒm duyá»‡t vĂ  ngÄƒn cháº·n ná»©t vá»¡ há»‡ thá»‘ng khi káº¿ thá»«a sai lá»›p con vi pháº¡m nguyĂªn lĂ½ LSP:

```typescript
export interface InheritanceContract {
  baseClass: string;
  subClass: string;
  baseBehaviorContract: (args: any) => boolean;
  subBehaviorContract: (args: any) => boolean;
}

export class LiskovSubstitutionGuard {
  /**
   * XĂ¡c thá»±c xem lá»›p con cĂ³ phĂ¡ vá»¡ há»£p Æ°á»›c hĂ nh vi cá»§a lá»›p cha (LSP Violations Checker)
   */
  public static checkLSPViolation(contract: InheritanceContract, testInput: any): { isViolated: boolean; reason: string } {
    const baseResult = contract.baseBehaviorContract(testInput);
    const subResult = contract.subBehaviorContract(testInput);

    // Náº¿u lá»›p cha tráº£ vá» káº¿t quáº£ há»£p lá»‡ (true) nhÆ°ng lá»›p con nĂ©m lá»—i hoáº·c tráº£ vá» khĂ´ng há»£p lá»‡ (false)
    // -> Vi pháº¡m nguyĂªn lĂ½ LSP!
    if (baseResult && !subResult) {
      return {
        isViolated: true,
        reason: `Vi pháº¡m nguyĂªn lĂ½ LSP: Lá»›p con '${contract.subClass}' lĂ m há»ng há»£p Æ°á»›c hĂ nh vi cá»§a lá»›p cha '${contract.baseClass}' khi nháº­n tham sá»‘ Ä‘áº§u vĂ o. Há»‡ thá»‘ng ná»©t vá»¡!`
      };
    }

    return { isViolated: false, reason: 'Há»£p lá»‡' };
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng Thiáº¿t Káº¿ SOLID (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { SOLIDLCOM4Calculator, MethodNode, LiskovSubstitutionGuard, InheritanceContract } from './SOLIDLCOM4Calculator';

describe('Sprint 7 SOLID Principles Unit Tests', () => {
  it('Should perfectly calculate LCOM4 = 1 for a high cohesive SRP Class', () => {
    const methods: MethodNode[] = [
      { name: 'getId', accessedFields: new Set(['userId']) },
      { name: 'getName', accessedFields: new Set(['userId', 'name']) }
    ];

    const lcom4 = SOLIDLCOM4Calculator.calculateLCOM4(methods);

    // LCOM4 = 1 chá»‰ ra lá»›p cá»±c ká»³ gáº¯n káº¿t, tuĂ¢n thá»§ hoĂ n háº£o SRP
    expect(lcom4).toBe(1);
  });

  it('Should calculate LCOM4 = 2 for a disjoint class violating SRP', () => {
    const methods: MethodNode[] = [
      { name: 'sendMail', accessedFields: new Set(['smtpConfig']) },
      { name: 'connectDb', accessedFields: new Set(['dbUrl']) }
    ];

    const lcom4 = SOLIDLCOM4Calculator.calculateLCOM4(methods);

    // LCOM4 = 2 chá»‰ ra lá»›p chá»©a 2 thĂ nh pháº§n rá»i ráº¡c, vi pháº¡m SRP nghiĂªm trá»ng
    expect(lcom4).toBe(2);
  });

  it('Should catch LSP substitution violation during behavior contract check', () => {
    const contract: InheritanceContract = {
      baseClass: 'Bird',
      subClass: 'Ostrich', // ÄĂ  Ä‘iá»ƒu khĂ´ng biáº¿t bay
      baseBehaviorContract: (canFly: boolean) => canFly === true,
      subBehaviorContract: (canFly: boolean) => false // LuĂ´n nĂ©m false vá» bay
    };

    const check = LiskovSubstitutionGuard.checkLSPViolation(contract, true);

    expect(check.isViolated).toBeTruthy();
    expect(check.reason).toContain('Vi pháº¡m nguyĂªn lĂ½ LSP');
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ giáº£i thuáº­t tĂ­nh chá»‰ sá»‘ káº¿t dĂ­nh lá»›p LCOM4 rá»i ráº¡c Ä‘o lÆ°á»ng SRP vĂ  bá»™ kiá»ƒm soĂ¡t há»£p Æ°á»›c thay tháº¿ Liskov LSP 100% Client-side Ä‘áº£m báº£o sinh viĂªn tháº¥u hiá»ƒu báº£n cháº¥t ká»¹ nghá»‡ pháº§n má»m cháº¥t lÆ°á»£ng cao, sĂ nh Ä‘iá»‡u báº­c nháº¥t.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 8 Feature Plan - Dependency Injection & IoC Container Visualizer

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 8: Dependency Injection & IoC Container Visualizer**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m trá»±c quan hĂ³a nguyĂªn lĂ½ Äáº£o ngÆ°á»£c Ä‘iá»u khiá»ƒn (IoC) vĂ  cÆ¡ cháº¿ TiĂªm phá»¥ thuá»™c (Dependency Injection), minh há»a cĂ¡ch Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ vĂ²ng Ä‘á»i dá»‹ch vá»¥ (Transient, Singleton) vĂ  phĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng láº·p (Cyclic Dependencies).

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p thĂ¹ng chá»©a IoC Container vĂ  thuáº­t toĂ¡n phĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng láº·p:
*   **ThĂ¹ng Chá»©a Phá»¥ Thuá»™c (DIContainer Engine):** Cho phĂ©p mĂ´ phá»ng Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ cĂ¡c lá»›p dá»‹ch vá»¥ vá»›i vĂ²ng Ä‘á»i tÆ°Æ¡ng á»©ng (`TRANSIENT` - táº¡o má»›i má»—i láº§n gá»i, `SINGLETON` - dĂ¹ng chung duy nháº¥t má»™t thá»±c thá»ƒ á»Ÿ RAM mĂ¡y khĂ¡ch).
*   **PhĂ¡t Hiá»‡n Phá»¥ Thuá»™c VĂ²ng (Cyclic Dependency Detection):** Sá»­ dá»¥ng thuáº­t toĂ¡n duyá»‡t Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ theo chiá»u sĂ¢u DFS phĂ¡t hiá»‡n má»‘i quan há»‡ phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng láº·p (vĂ­ dá»¥: A phá»¥ thuá»™c B, B phá»¥ thuá»™c C, C phá»¥ thuá»™c A), nĂ©m lá»—i cáº£nh bĂ¡o tá»©c thá»i.
*   **Báº£n Äá»“ KĂ©o Ná»‘i Neon Phá»¥ Thuá»™c (Dependency Neon Flows):** Khi dá»‹ch vá»¥ Ä‘Æ°á»£c tiĂªm (inject), luá»“ng háº¡t dá»¯ liá»‡u Neon di chuyá»ƒn mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS ná»‘i cĂ¡c Service Card kĂ­nh má» minh há»a dĂ²ng tiĂªm.

---

2.  [ ] Láº­p trĂ¬nh thĂ¹ng chá»©a phá»¥ thuá»™c `DIContainer.ts` vĂ  bá»™ dá»‹ch vá»¥ resolver.
3.  [ ] XĂ¢y dá»±ng thuáº­t toĂ¡n DFS kiá»ƒm duyá»‡t chu trĂ¬nh vĂ²ng láº·p `detectCycles` Ä‘á»“ thá»‹.

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)
*   ThĂ¹ng chá»©a phá»¥ thuá»™c phĂ¢n giáº£i dá»‹ch vá»¥ cá»±c nhanh Client-side dÆ°á»›i **2ms**.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Dependency Injection & IoC Container (Sprint 8)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a thĂ¹ng chá»©a dá»‹ch vá»¥ **DIContainer** há»— trá»£ vĂ²ng Ä‘á»i Transient/Singleton vĂ  giáº£i thuáº­t Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ DFS phĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng trĂ²n **detectCyclicDependency** trong Sprint 8.

---

## 1. ThĂ¹ng Chá»©a ÄÄƒng KĂ½ & PhĂ¢n Giáº£i Dá»‹ch Vá»¥ (DIContainer TypeScript)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½, phĂ¢n giáº£i vĂ²ng Ä‘á»i dá»‹ch vá»¥ Transient/Singleton vĂ  phĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng Client-side dÆ°á»›i 2ms:

```typescript
export type ServiceLifetime = 'SINGLETON' | 'TRANSIENT';

export interface ServiceDescriptor {
  token: string;
  implementationClass: any; // Class constructor
  lifetime: ServiceLifetime;
  dependencies: string[]; // CĂ¡c token phá»¥ thuá»™c báº¯t buá»™c
}

export class DIContainer {
  private descriptors: Map<string, ServiceDescriptor> = new Map();
  private singletonInstances: Map<string, any> = new Map();

  public register(descriptor: ServiceDescriptor): void {
    this.descriptors.set(descriptor.token, descriptor);
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¢n giáº£i dá»‹ch vá»¥ vĂ  tá»± Ä‘á»™ng tiĂªm cĂ¡c phá»¥ thuá»™c (Dependency Resolver)
   */
  public resolve<T>(token: string): T {
    // 1. Kiá»ƒm tra phĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng trĂ²n trÆ°á»›c khi táº¡o thá»±c thá»ƒ
    this.detectCyclicDependency(token, new Set(), new Set());

    const descriptor = this.descriptors.get(token);
    if (!descriptor) {
      throw new Error(`KhĂ´ng tĂ¬m tháº¥y token dá»‹ch vá»¥ '${token}' Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ trong IoC Container!`);
    }

    // 2. Náº¿u lĂ  SINGLETON vĂ  Ä‘Ă£ tá»“n táº¡i thá»±c thá»ƒ -> Tráº£ vá» ngay láº­p tá»©c (DĂ¹ng chung RAM)
    if (descriptor.lifetime === 'SINGLETON' && this.singletonInstances.has(token)) {
      return this.singletonInstances.get(token);
    }

    // 3. PhĂ¢n giáº£i Ä‘á»‡ quy táº¥t cáº£ cĂ¡c dependency dependencies
    const resolvedDeps = descriptor.dependencies.map(depToken => this.resolve<any>(depToken));

    // 4. Khá»Ÿi táº¡o thá»±c thá»ƒ má»›i báº±ng con constructor tiĂªm cĂ¡c tham sá»‘
    const instance = new descriptor.implementationClass(...resolvedDeps);

    // 5. LÆ°u trá»¯ náº¿u lĂ  SINGLETON
    if (descriptor.lifetime === 'SINGLETON') {
      this.singletonInstances.set(token, instance);
    }

    return instance;
  }

  /**
   * PhĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng trĂ²n (Cyclic Dependency Detection Graph DFS)
   */
  private detectCyclicDependency(
    token: string,
    visiting: Set<string>,
    visited: Set<string>
  ): void {
    if (visiting.has(token)) {
      throw new Error(`Lá»—i Phá»¥ Thuá»™c VĂ²ng TrĂ²n (Cyclic Dependency Detected): PhĂ¡t hiá»‡n chu trĂ¬nh khĂ©p kĂ­n táº¡i Token '${token}'! ThĂ¹ng chá»©a sáº­p nguá»“n!`);
    }

    if (visited.has(token)) return;

    const descriptor = this.descriptors.get(token);
    if (!descriptor) return;

    visiting.add(token);

    // Duyá»‡t qua cĂ¡c nĂºt con phá»¥ thuá»™c ká» báº±ng Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ DFS
    for (const dep of descriptor.dependencies) {
      this.detectCyclicDependency(dep, visiting, visited);
    }

    visiting.delete(token);
    visited.add(token);
  }
}
```

---

## 2. Ca Kiá»ƒm Thá»­ Tá»± Äá»™ng ThĂ¹ng Chá»©a IoC (Unit Test Specs)

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { DIContainer, ServiceLifetime } from './DIContainer';

// Dá»±ng cĂ¡c lá»›p giáº£ láº­p phá»¥c vá»¥ kiá»ƒm thá»­
class DatabaseService {
  public connect() { return 'connected'; }
}

class UserRepository {
  constructor(public db: DatabaseService) {}
}

class UserService {
  constructor(public repo: UserRepository) {}
}

class CircularA {
  constructor(public b: any) {}
}

class CircularB {
  constructor(public a: any) {}
}

describe('Sprint 8 DI & IoC Container Unit Tests', () => {
  let container: DIContainer;

  beforeEach(() => {
    container = new DIContainer();
  });

  it('Should successfully resolve transient and singleton service lifetimes with correct dependency injection', () => {
    // ÄÄƒng kĂ½ DatabaseService lĂ m SINGLETON dĂ¹ng chung RAM
    container.register({
      token: 'DatabaseService',
      implementationClass: DatabaseService,
      lifetime: 'SINGLETON',
      dependencies: []
    });

    // ÄÄƒng kĂ½ UserRepository lĂ m TRANSIENT
    container.register({
      token: 'UserRepository',
      implementationClass: UserRepository,
      lifetime: 'TRANSIENT',
      dependencies: ['DatabaseService']
    });

    const repo1 = container.resolve<UserRepository>('UserRepository');
    const repo2 = container.resolve<UserRepository>('UserRepository');

    // UserRepository lĂ  Transient -> 2 láº§n gá»i resolve ra 2 instance khĂ¡c nhau
    expect(repo1).not.toBe(repo2);

    // DatabaseService lĂ  Singleton -> Cáº£ 2 instance Repo Ä‘á»u dĂ¹ng chung duy nháº¥t 1 Db instance
    expect(repo1.db).toBe(repo2.db);
    expect(repo1.db.connect()).toBe('connected');
  });

  it('Should catch circular dependency loops instantly and throw an explicit crash error', () => {
    // ÄÄƒng kĂ½ A phá»¥ thuá»™c B
    container.register({
      token: 'CircularA',
      implementationClass: CircularA,
      lifetime: 'TRANSIENT',
      dependencies: ['CircularB']
    });

    // ÄÄƒng kĂ½ B láº¡i phá»¥ thuá»™c ngÆ°á»£c A -> Chu trĂ¬nh khĂ©p kĂ­n gĂ¢y sáº­p nguá»“n
    container.register({
      token: 'CircularB',
      implementationClass: CircularB,
      lifetime: 'TRANSIENT',
      dependencies: ['CircularA']
    });

    expect(() => {
      container.resolve('CircularA');
    }).toThrowError('Lá»—i Phá»¥ Thuá»™c VĂ²ng TrĂ²n');
  });
});
```
 Thiáº¿t káº¿ thĂ¹ng chá»©a IoC Container há»— trá»£ vĂ²ng Ä‘á»i Transient/Singleton nháº¡y bĂ©n káº¿t há»£p giáº£i thuáº­t Ä‘á»“ thá»‹ DFS phĂ¡t hiá»‡n phá»¥ thuá»™c vĂ²ng trĂ²n cyclic loop 100% Client-side Ä‘áº£m báº£o sinh viĂªn tháº¥u hiá»ƒu hoĂ n háº£o báº£n cháº¥t cá»§a Inversion of Control cao cáº¥p nháº¥t.
# đŸ—ºï¸ Sprint 9 Feature Plan - Design Patterns Interactive Visualizer

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t káº¿ hoáº¡ch triá»ƒn khai cho **Sprint 9: Design Patterns Interactive Visualizer**. PhĂ¢n há»‡ chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m xĂ¢y dá»±ng bá»™ mĂ¡y mĂ´ phá»ng trá»±c quan hĂ³a cĂ¡c máº«u thiáº¿t káº¿ kinh Ä‘iá»ƒn (Creational, Structural, Behavioral), táº­p trung vĂ o cĂ¡c sá»± kiá»‡n tÆ°Æ¡ng tĂ¡c cá»§a máº«u Observer, Factory vĂ  Strategy.

---

## 1. Má»¥c tiĂªu Sprint (Sprint Goal)
XĂ¢y dá»±ng lá»›p mĂ´ phá»ng cĂ¡c máº«u thiáº¿t káº¿ vĂ  Ä‘Æ°á»ng truyá»n tĂ­n hiá»‡u hoáº¡t áº£nh hoáº¡t Ä‘á»™ng:
*   **MĂ´ Phá»ng Máº«u Observer (Observer Pattern Simulator):** Biá»ƒu diá»…n cĂ¡ch thá»©c Ä‘á»‘i tÆ°á»£ng Chá»§ thá»ƒ (Subject) Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ cĂ¡c NgÆ°á»i quan sĂ¡t (Observers). Khi Chá»§ thá»ƒ thay Ä‘á»•i tráº¡ng thĂ¡i, cĂ¡c Ä‘Æ°á»ng ná»‘i Bezier phĂ¡t sĂ¡ng Neon báº¯n cĂ¡c xung tĂ­n hiá»‡u dá»¯ liá»‡u truyá»n tin mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS tá»›i toĂ n bá»™ Observers.
*   **MĂ´ Phá»ng Máº«u Strategy (Strategy Pattern Simulator):** Cho phĂ©p há»c viĂªn hoĂ¡n Ä‘á»•i thuáº­t toĂ¡n cháº¡y thá»i gian thá»±c, minh há»a cĂ¡ch lá»›p ngá»¯ cáº£nh thay Ä‘á»•i chiáº¿n thuáº­t xá»­ lĂ½ tá»©c thĂ¬ dÆ°á»›i **5ms**.
*   **ÄÆ°á»ng MÅ©i TĂªn Truyá»n Tin Hoáº¡t áº¢nh (Active Message Emitter):** Váº½ cĂ¡c Ä‘Æ°á»ng mÅ©i tĂªn Bezier nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t Neon há»• phĂ¡ch Amber chuyá»ƒn Ä‘á»™ng co giĂ£n linh hoáº¡t biá»ƒu thá»‹ tĂ­n hiá»‡u gá»­i tin.

## 3. TiĂªu chĂ­ nghiá»‡m thu (DoD)

*   Hoáº¡t áº£nh xung Neon di chuyá»ƒn dá»c Ä‘Æ°á»ng Bezier nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t cháº¡y mÆ°á»£t mĂ  60 FPS.

# â™ï¸ Technical Specification - Design Patterns & Observer Simulator (Sprint 9)

TĂ i liá»‡u nĂ y Ä‘áº·c táº£ chi tiáº¿t mĂ£ nguá»“n TypeScript cá»§a trĂ¬nh mĂ´ phá»ng máº«u thiáº¿t káº¿ **ObserverPatternSimulator** phĂ¡t xung tĂ­n hiá»‡u hoáº¡t áº£nh Ä‘Æ°á»ng ná»‘i Bezier nĂ©t Ä‘á»©t Neon trong Sprint 9.

---

## 1. TrĂ¬nh MĂ´ Phá»ng Máº«u Thiáº¿t Káº¿ Observer (ObserverPatternSimulator TS)

Lá»›p háº¡t nhĂ¢n chá»‹u trĂ¡ch nhiá»‡m Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½, há»§y Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ ngÆ°á»i quan sĂ¡t (Observer) vĂ  truyá»n phĂ¡t tin Ä‘a phÆ°Æ¡ng thá»©c Client-side dÆ°á»›i 2ms:

```typescript
export interface Observer {
  id: string;
  update(data: string): void;
}

export interface MessageEvent {
  senderId: string;
  receiverId: string;
  data: string;
  timestamp: number;
}

export class ObserverPatternSimulator {
  private observers: Map<string, Observer> = new Map();
  private subjectState = '';
  private eventLogs: MessageEvent[] = [];
  private onNotifyCallback: (event: MessageEvent) => void;

  constructor(onNotify: (event: MessageEvent) => void) {
    this.onNotifyCallback = onNotify;
  }

  /**
   * ÄÄƒng kĂ½ ngÆ°á»i quan sĂ¡t má»›i (Attach Observer)
   */
  public attach(observer: Observer): void {
    this.observers.set(observer.id, observer);
  }

  /**
   * Há»§y Ä‘Äƒng kĂ½ ngÆ°á»i quan sĂ¡t (Detach Observer)
   */
  public detach(observerId: string): void {
    this.observers.delete(observerId);
  }

  /**
   * Cáº­p nháº­t tráº¡ng thĂ¡i Chá»§ thá»ƒ vĂ  tá»± Ä‘á»™ng truyá»n phĂ¡t tin (Notify Observers)
   */
  public updateState(newState: string): void {
    this.subjectState = newState;
    this.notify();
  }

  private notify(): void {
    const timestamp = performance.now();

    this.observers.forEach(observer => {
      // 1. Thá»±c thi hĂ m update cá»§a tá»«ng observer
      observer.update(this.subjectState);

      // 2. Sinh sá»± kiá»‡n truyá»n phĂ¡t tin lĂ m dá»¯ liá»‡u hoáº¡t áº£nh (Emit Message Event)
      const event: MessageEvent = {
        senderId: 'SUBJECT',
        receiverId: observer.id,
        data: this.subjectState,
        timestamp
      };

      this.eventLogs.push(event);

      // 3. KĂ­ch hoáº¡t Callback Ä‘á»ƒ Canvas/SVG báº¯n háº¡t Neon dá»c Ä‘Æ°á»ng ná»‘i Bezier
      this.onNotifyCallback(event);
    });
  }

  public getObserversCount(): number {
    return this.observers.size;
  }

  public getEventLogs(): MessageEvent[] {
    return this.eventLogs;
  }
}
```
